Yashtimadhu Kwatha (यष्टिमधुक्वाथ)	Glycyrrhiza glabra decoction — for Bhavana	As required
Madhu (मधु)	Honey — for final mixing/Anupana	As required
Sita / Mishri (सिता/मिश्री)	Rock candy/Sugar — for final mixing/Anupana	As required
preparation:
1. First, in a mortar, triturate Parada and Shu. Haritala to form good Kajjali.
2. Then add all other Bhasmas (Tiksna Loha, Svarna Makshika, Kanta Loha, Abhraka, Tamra) and mix thoroughly in the Kajjali.
3. Give 1 Bhavana with Devadali Svaras (Luffa echinata juice), triturate well, then dry.
4. Place in a Sharava Samputa with clay sealing and process in Baluka Yantra (sand bath).
5. When Svangasheetal, remove and Triturate in mortar for 3 days.
6. Add Guduchisattva or Guduchi Churna, Kamala Pushpa Churna, Kalhara Kanda Churna, and Draksha Kalka — each equal to Parada's weight — to the Baluka Yantra-processed medicine.
7. Give Bhavana with Yashtimadhu Kwatha and triturate.
8. Form pills of 3–3 Ratti (375 mg), dry in shade, and store in a glass vessel.
shloka:
तीक्ष्णमाक्षिककान्ताभ्रशुल्बसूतकतालकम् । देवदालीरसैः पिष्टं बालुकायन्त्रमूर्च्छितम् ।।९४।।
अमृतोत्पलकह्लारकन्दद्राक्षासमन्वितम् । पिष्टं यष्ट्यम्भसा क्षौद्रसिताभ्यां कामलाप्रणुत् ।।९५।।

name: Triyoni Ras
benefits: Shotha (Oedema/Swelling) and Pandu (Anaemia)
ingredients:
Shu. Tamra Patra (शु. ताम्रपत्र)	Purified Copper foil sheets	4 parts
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury — for coating copper foil	1 part
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur — spread below and above Tamra Patra	4 parts
Matsyakshi Churna (मत्स्याक्षीचूर्ण)	Alternanthera sessilis powder — spread over Gandhaka	1 part
Nimbu Svaras (निम्बुस्वरस)	Lemon juice — for solar processing (3–4 days)	As required
Haritaki Churna (हरीतकीचूर्ण)	Terminalia chebula powder — Anupana	2 gm per dose
Guda (गुड)	Jaggery — Anupana	2 gm per dose
preparation:
1. In a mortar, triturate Parada and Gandhaka (Kajjali) and coat the copper foil thoroughly so Parada adheres well to the Tamra Patra.
2. Then add Nimbu Svaras (lemon juice) sufficiently to submerge the copper foil, and place in strong sunlight for 3–4 days.
3. Then in a Sharava: first spread 2 parts Shu. Gandhaka; lay the Tamra Patra (coated with Parada) on top; cover again with the remaining 2 parts Shu. Gandhaka powder so the Tamra Patra is sandwiched.
4. Sprinkle Matsyakshi (Alternanthera sessilis) Churna 1 part on top of the Gandhaka.
5. Seal in Sharava Samputa with clay (Sandhilepana) tightly.
6. Cook in Baluka Yantra for 6 hours (two Yaama/Prahara).
7. When Svangasheetal, open, remove the medicine, Triturate in mortar, and store in a glass vessel.
shloka:
ताम्रस्य तुर्यभागेन रसेनोत्प्लुत्य लेपयेत् । निम्बुद्रावेण संयोज्य सूर्यतापे विनिक्षिपेत् ।। ९६ ।।
ऊर्ध्वाधो गन्धकं दत्त्वा पाचयेदतियत्नतः । मत्स्याक्षीमभितो दत्त्वा मृत्स्नया सन्निरुध्य च ।। ९७ ।।
यामद्वयं सुपक्वं च स्वाङ्गशीतं समुद्धरेत् । गुञ्जामात्रं ददीतास्य साभयं गुडसंयुतम् ।।
त्रियोन्याख्यो रसो ह्येष शोफपाण्ड्वपनोदनः ।।९८।।

name: Hamsamandura
benefits: Pandu, Kamala, Halimak, Urustambha, and Arsha
ingredients:
Shu. Mandura (शु. मण्डूर)	Purified Iron rust/calx	1 part
Gomutra (गोमूत्र)	Cow's urine — for cooking Mandura	8 parts
Goghrita (गोघृत)	Cow's ghee — added at end of cooking	1 part (equal to Mandura)
Shunthi Churna (शुण्ठीचूर्ण)	Dry Ginger powder	1 part each
Maricha Churna (मरिचचूर्ण)	Black Pepper powder	1 part each
Pippali Churna (पिप्पलीचूर्ण)	Long Pepper powder	1 part each
Haritaki Churna (हरीतकीचूर्ण)	Terminalia chebula powder	1 part each
Bibhitaka Churna (बिभीतकचूर्ण)	Terminalia bellirica powder	1 part each
Amalaki Churna (आमलकीचूर्ण)	Emblica officinalis powder	1 part each
Musta Churna (मुस्ताचूर्ण)	Cyperus rotundus powder	1 part each
Vidanga Churna (विडङ्गचूर्ण)	Embelia ribes powder	1 part each
Chavya Churna (चव्यचूर्ण)	Piper retrofractum powder	1 part each
Chitraka Mool Churna (चित्रकमूलचूर्ण)	Plumbago zeylanica root powder	1 part each
Daruharidra Churna (दारुहल्दीचूर्ण)	Berberis aristata powder	1 part each
Pippali Mool Churna (पिप्पलीमूलचूर्ण)	Long Pepper root powder	1 part each
Devadaru Churna (देवदारुचूर्ण)	Cedrus deodara powder	1 part each
preparation:
1. Triturate Shu. Mandura finely.
2. Cook in 8 times its quantity of Gomutra (cow's urine) on low fire in an iron vessel (Loha Patra) until the Gomutra evaporates and Mandura is well-cooked.
3. Separately prepare fine Churna of all the above herbs (1 part each).
4. At the end of cooking, add Goghrita (cow's ghee — equal to Mandura quantity) to the Mandura, mix all herb powders in thoroughly.
5. Filter through cloth strainer, and store in a glass vessel.
shloka:
मण्डूरं मर्दयेच्छ्लक्ष्णं गोमूत्रेऽष्टगुणे पचेत् । त्र्यूषणं त्रिफलां मुस्तां विडङ्ग चव्यचित्रकौ ।।४२।।
दार्वी ग्रन्थीं देवदारुं तुल्यं तुल्यं विचूर्णयेत् । घृतं मण्डूरतुल्यं च पाकान्ते मिश्रयेत्ततः ।।४३।।
भक्षयेत्कर्षमात्रं च जीर्णान्ते तक्रभोजनम् । पाण्डुरोगं हलीमं च ऊरुस्तम्भं च कामलाम् ।।
अर्शासि हन्ति नो चित्रं हंसमण्डूरकाह्वयम् ।।४४।।

name: Jaypala Ras
benefits: Shotha (Oedema/Swelling) and Pandu (Anaemia)
ingredients:
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	Equal part
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	Equal part
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated  Copper  (Mruta Tamra)	Equal part
Shu. Jaypala (शु. जयपाल)	Purified Croton tiglium (Jamal Gota) seed	Equal part
Shu. Guggulu (शु. गुग्गुलु)	Purified Commiphora mukul resin	Equal part
Goghrita (गोघृत)	Cow's ghee — for forming pills	As required
preparation:
1. First, in a mortar, firmly triturate Parada and Gandhaka to form good Kajjali.
2. Then add Tamra Bhasma and Shu. Jaypala (Purified Croton tiglium) to the Kajjali and triturate.
3. Dissolve Shu. Guggulu in warm water and blend into the above mixture.
4. Add Goghrita (cow's ghee) and triturate all well.
5. Form pills of 125 mg (Valla Pramaana).
6. Dry in shade and store in a glass vessel.
shloka:
रसं गन्धं मृतं ताम्र जयपालं च गुग्गुलुम् । समांशमाज्यसंयुक्तां गुटिकां कारयेन्मिताम् ।।
एकैकां खादयेद्वैद्यः शोफपाण्ड्वपनुत्तये ।।८९।।

name: Kaalavidhvamsana Rasa
benefits: Pandu Roga (Anaemia / Pallor disease)
ingredients:
Rasasindura (रससिन्दूर)	Purified Mercuric Sulphide	1 part
Svarna Bhasma (स्वर्णभस्म)	Incinerated Gold 	1 part
Rajata Bhasma (रजतभस्म)	Incinerated Silver	1 part
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper 	1 part
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury (additional)	4 parts
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	24 parts
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron	6 parts
Shu. Vatsanabha Churna (शु. वत्सनाभचूर्ण)	Purified Aconitum ferox powder — added last	1/10th part of total
Jambiri Nimbu Svaras (जम्बीरी रस)	Lemon juice — for trituration and Gandhaka processing	As required
Dhattura Phala / Patra Svaras (धत्तूरफल/पत्रस्वरस)	Datura metel seed/leaf juice — for Dolayantra	As required
Kantakari Kaatha (कण्टकारीकाथ)	Solanum xanthocarpum decoction — Bhavanas	As required
Brihati Svaras (बृहतीकाथ)	Solanum indicum juice — Bhavanas	As required
Arka Patra Svaras (अर्कपत्रस्वरस)	Calotropis procera leaf juice — Bhavanas	As required
Karanja Patra Svaras (करञ्जपत्रस्वरस)	Pongamia pinnata leaf juice — Bhavanas	As required
Haritaki Kaatha (हरीतकीकाथ)	Terminalia chebula decoction — Anupana	As required
preparation:
1. Triturate Rasasindura to fine powder. Add Svarna, Rajata and Tamra Bhasma. Triturate with Jambiri lemon juice for 1 day in sunlight. Add Shu. Parada (4 parts) and Triturate to paste-like consistency.
2. Fill the prepared paste into hollowed Datura seeds (sized by dose). Tie with thread and wrap in cloth to form a Pottali. Hang in Dolayantra filled with Datura patra svaras and process on mild heat for 3 days, refilling juice as it dries.
3. On day 4, remove Pottali. In Ishtika Yantra, spread Jambiri-processed Shu. Gandhaka powder below, place Pottali, cover above with more Gandhaka powder and fire in Laghu Puta. Repeat several times.
4. Then give 2 Bhavanas and 2 Laghu Putas each with: Brihati svaras, Kantakari Kaatha and Arka-Karanja patra svaras (total 6 Bhavanas, 6 Putas). Add equal Loha Bhasma and Triturate with Kantakari svaras for 1 day. Give 3 more Laghu Putas with Vanopal.
5. Weigh the final product. Add 1/10th part Shu. Vatsanabha Churna. Triturate well and store in glass vessel.
anupana: Haritaki Kaatha (Terminalia chebula decoction) or Gomutra
shloka:
शुद्धसूतं हेम तारं ताम्र तुल्यं च मर्दयेत् । जम्बीरनीरसंयुक्तमातपे मर्दयेद्दिनम् ।।४५।।
सर्वतुल्यं पुनः सूतं क्षिप्त्वा पिष्टं प्रकल्पयेत् । धत्तूरफलमध्ये तु दोलायन्त्रे त्र्यहं पचेत् ।।४६।।
धत्तूरोत्थद्रवैरेव यन्त्रं पूर्यं पुनः पुनः । आदाय बन्धयेद्वस्त्रे इष्टिकायन्त्रगं पचेत् ।।४७।।
जम्बीरैर्गन्धकं पिष्ट्वा अधश्चोर्ध्व च दापयेत् । तुल्यं पुनः पुनर्देयं रुद्ध्वा लघुपुटे पचेत् ।।४८।।
षड्गुणे गन्धके जीर्णे तत्तुल्यं मृतलोहकम् । दत्त्वा मर्धं दिनैकं च कण्टकार्या द्रवैर्दिनम् ।।४९।।
रुद्धाथ करिषाग्निस्थकपोताख्यपुटे पचेत् । पुनर्मह्यं पुनः पाच्यं त्रिवारं पूर्वजैर्द्रवैः ।।५०।।
बृहत्युत्थरसैस्तद्वत्त्रिधामधं पुटेत्त्रिधा । वह्नयर्कंनक्तमालानां पृथग्द्रावैर्द्विधा द्विधा ।।५१।।
मर्धं रुद्ध्वा पुटेत्तद्वद्दशांशं वत्सनाभकम् । दत्त्वा तस्मिन्विचूर्याथ गुञ्जामात्रं प्रयोजयेत् ।। ५२ ।।
कालविध्वंसनो नाम रसः पाण्ड्वामयापहः । अभयाऽथ गवां मूत्रैः पिष्ट्वा चानुप्रदापयेत् ।। ५३ ।।

name: Panduhariharitaki
benefits: Pandu Roga (Anaemia / Pallor disease)
ingredients:
Sahachara (सहचरयवकुट)	Barleria prionitis / Strobilanthes ciliatus	7 Pala (325g)
Bhringaraja (भृङ्गराजयवकुट)	Eclipta alba	7 Pala (325g)
Shatavari (शतावरीयवकुट)	Asparagus racemosus	7 Pala (325g)
Punarnava (पुनर्नवायवकुट)	Boerhavia diffusa	7 Pala (325g)
Badi Haritaki (हरीतकी)	Terminalia chebula — large fruits	360 Nag (360 fruits)
Go Dugdha (गोदूध)	Cow's milk — for second cooking	As required
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury — for kajjali	140g
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur — for kajjali and Parpati	140g
Guduchi Sattva (गूडूचीसत्त्व)	Pure starch extract of Tinospora cordifolia	8 Pala (375g)
Madhu (मधु)	Honey — for pill making and storage	As required
preparation:
1. Make decoction of Sahachara, Bhringaraja, Shatavari and Punarnava (7 Pala each) in 8 times water (18 litres). Reduce to one quarter and filter.
2. In this decoction, cook 360 large Haritaki fruits until the decoction is absorbed. When Haritaki cools, cook again in cow's milk until milk reduces to one-quarter or dries. Remove seeds from cooled Haritaki. Keep the fruit flesh/skins separate.
3. Prepare good kajjali from Shu. Parada 140g + Shu. Gandhaka 140g. Make Rasa Parpati (flat thin cake). Break and powder the Parpati finely.
4. Mix Parpati powder with Guduchi Sattva (375g). Add a little Honey. Form 360 pills. Slightly dry them.
5. Place 1 pill inside each Haritaki fruit skin/covering. Tie with thread. Fill all 360 Haritakis into a large glass jar. Cover with pure Honey. Tie cloth over jar mouth.
6. After 1 week: perform Virechana (purgation) to cleanse the bowels. Then take 1 stuffed Haritaki with 1 Vati in the morning daily with cow's milk.
shloka:
कोरण्टी भृङ्गराजश्च शतावरिपुनर्नवौ । एते सप्तपला ग्राह्याः प्रत्येकं सूक्ष्मचूर्णिताः ।।७५।।
एतत्क्वाथे पचेत्सम्यग्घरीतक्याः शतत्रयम् । षष्ट्याधिकं ततः शुष्कं गव्यदुग्धेन पाचयेत् ।। ७६ ।।
शोषयित्वा शनैर्हत्वा वटिकाभिः प्रपूरयेत् । रसस्य त्रिपलं दत्त्वां गन्धके त्रिपलात्मके ।।७७।।
पक्त्वाथ पातयेत्पत्रे चूर्णयित्वा ततः पुनः । गुडूचीसत्त्वमादाय शुष्कं सत्त्वं पलाष्टकम् ।। ७८।।
चूर्णयित्वा ततः सर्वं मधुना गुटिकाः किरेत् । तास्तु सूत्रे समाबध्वा मधुभाण्डे विनिक्षिपेत् ।।
एकैकां भक्षयेन्नित्यं शुष्कपाण्डुविनाशिनीम् ।। ७९।।

name: Pittapandu Vari Gutika
benefits: Pittaja Pandu Roga (Pitta-type Anaemia / Pallor disease)
ingredients:
Rasasindura (रससिन्दूर)	Purified Mercuric Sulphide	4 parts
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron	2 parts
Chitraka Moola Churna (चित्रकमूलचूर्ण)	Plumbago zeylanica root powder	2 parts
Nagarmotha Churna (नागरमोथाचूर्ण)	Cyperus rotundus powder	2 parts
Vidanga Churna (विडङ्गचूर्ण)	Embelia ribes (false black pepper) powder	2 parts
Trikatu Churna (त्रिकटचूर्ण)	Shunthee + Maricha + Pippali combined powder	2 parts
Triphala Churna (त्रिफलाचूर्ण)	Haritaki + Vibhitaka + Amalaki combined powder	2 parts
Kutaja Tvak Churna (कुटजत्वक्चूर्ण)	Holarrhena antidysenterica bark powder	2 parts
Madhu (मधु)	Honey — for pill binding	As required
preparation: 1. In a mortar, Triturate Rasasindura to fine powder. Add Loha Bhasma and all other powdered ingredients. Mix thoroughly.\n2. Add Madhu (honey) and form pills of 375 mg each.\n3. Dry well and store in glass vessel.
shloka:
रसस्य भागाश्चत्वारो लोहस्य द्वौ प्रकीर्तितौ । वह्निमुस्ताविडङ्गानां त्रिकटुत्रिफलस्य च ।।८० ।।
भागास्त्वनेकशो ग्राह्याः कुटजस्य तथाऽपरः । चूर्णयित्वा ततः सर्वं मधुना गुटिकाः किरेत् ।।
एकैकां भक्षयेत्प्रातः पित्तपाण्ड्वपनुत्तये ।।८१।।

name: Trailokya Sundar Rasa
benefits: Shotha (Oedema) and Pandu Roga (Anaemia)
ingredients:
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	1 part
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	1 part
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron	1 part
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica 	1 part
Guduchi Sattva (गुडूचीसत्त्व)	Tinospora cordifolia pure starch extract	1 part
Varahikanda (वाराहीकन्द)	Dioscorea bulbifera (Air potato) powder	1 part
Triphala Churna (त्रिफलाचूर्ण)	Haritaki + Vibhitaka + Amalaki combined powder	1 part
Sahajana Moola Churna (सहजनमूलचूर्ण)	Moringa oleifera (Drumstick tree) root powder	1 part
Bhringaraja Svaras (भृङ्गराजस्वरस)	Eclipta alba juice — for 1 Bhavana	As required
preparation:
1. In a stone mortar, prepare kajjali from Shu. Parada and Shu. Gandhaka. Add Loha Bhasma and Abhraka Bhasma and Triturate well.
2. Add all four herbal powders (Guduchi Sattva, Varahikanda, Triphala, Sahajana Moola) and Triturate all together.
3. Give one Bhavana (trituration + drying) with Bhringaraja svaras. Dry well in shade.
4. Form pills of 375 mg each. Dry thoroughly in shade and store in glass vessel.
anupana: Madhu (Honey) + Goghrita (Cow's ghee) + Mishri Churna (Sugar candy powder)
shloka:
रसगन्धकलोहाभ्रगुडूचीसत्त्वसूकरः । त्रिफलाशित्रुमूलानि भृङ्गसारेण भावयेत् ।।८२।।
त्रैलोक्यसुन्दरः सोऽयं सघृतक्षौद्रशर्करः । मृगाङ्कवत्पथ्यभुजः पाण्डुशोफं नियच्छति ।।८३ ।।

name: Vijaya Gutika
benefits: Shotha (Oedema) and Pandu Roga (Anaemia)
ingredients:
Haritaki Churna (हरीतकीचूर्ण)	Terminalia chebula powder	140g
Chitraka Moola Churna (चित्रकमूलचूर्ण)	Plumbago zeylanica root powder	140g
Choti Elaichi Churna (छोटी इलायचीचूर्ण)	Elettaria cardamomum (small cardamom) powder	23g
Dalchini (दालचीनी)	Cinnamomum verum (Cinnamon) powder	23g
Tejpata Churna (तेजपातचूर्ण)	Cinnamomum tamala (Bay leaf) powder	23g
Nagarmotha Churna (नागरमोथाचूर्ण)	Cyperus rotundus powder	23g
Renuka Beeja Churna (रेणुकाबीजचूर्ण)	Vitex agnus-castus (Nagkeshar alternative) seed powder	23g
Nagkeshar Churna (नागकेशरचूर्ण)	Mesua ferrea (Indian rose chestnut) powder	12g
Trikatu Churna (त्रिकटुचूर्ण)	Shunthee + Maricha + Pippali combined powder	46g
Pippali Moola Churna (पिप्पलीमूलचूर्ण)	Piper longum root powder	46g
Shu. Vatsanabha Churna (शु. वत्सनाभचूर्ण)	Purified Aconitum ferox powder	46g
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	46g
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	46g
Purana Guda (पुरानागुड)	Old Jaggery (aged, not fresh)	2,335g (half the total weight of all above)
preparation:
1. In a stone mortar, prepare kajjali from Shu. Parada (46g) and Shu. Gandhaka (46g). Add all other powdered ingredients and mix very well. Sieve through a fine cloth strainer.
2. Prepare old Jaggery syrup (Chaasni): dissolve Purana Guda in water, filter through cloth, and cook to Laddu Chaasni (semi-thick syrup) consistency.
3. Add the mixed kajjali-powder to the hot syrup. Mix thoroughly so all powder is uniformly incorporated.
4. While still warm, form pills of 4 Ratti (500 mg) each, shaped like Jangali Ber (wild jujube). Dry in shade and store in glass vessel.
shloka:
पलत्रयं हरीतक्याश्चित्रकस्य पलत्रयम् । एलात्वक्पत्रमुस्तानां भागोऽर्धपलिको मतः ।।८४।।
रेणुकार्द्धपलं प्रोक्तं तदर्थं नागकेशरम् । व्योषं च पिप्पलीमूलं विषं च पलमात्रकम् ।।८५।।
रसः पलो महागन्धः सूक्ष्मचूर्णानि कारयेत् । पुरातने गुडे पक्के तुलार्धे तद्विनिक्षिपेत् ।।८६ ।।
हिमस्पर्श तु गृहणीयाद् घृतेनाऽऽक्त्वा करं बुधः । बदरास्थिप्रमाणेन विजया गुटिका मता ।।८७।।
निशायां खादयेदेनां शोफपाण्डुविनाशिनीम् ।।८८।।

name: Lokanath Ras
benefits: Lokanath Ras treats significantlys: Yakrit Roga (liver diseases), Pliha Roga (spleen diseases), Udara Roga (abdominal disorders), Gulma (abdominal lump/tumour) and Shwayathu/Shotha (oedema/swelling).
ingredients:
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	1 part
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	1 part
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica	1 part
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron 	2 parts
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper 	2 parts
Kauri Bhasma (कौड़ीभस्म)	Incinerated Cowrie shell 	6 parts
Nagavalli Svaras (नागवल्ली रस)	Betel leaf juice — for trituration	As required
preparation:
1. Prepare Kajjali by Triturate Shu. Parada (1 part) and Shu. Gandhaka (1 part) together until a smooth black mass forms.
2. Add Abhraka Bhasma (1 part), Loha Bhasma (2 parts), Tamra Bhasma (2 parts) and Kauri Bhasma (6 parts). Mix all thoroughly.
3. Triturate with Nagavalli (betel leaf) juice until well mixed.
4. Heat in Gajaputa (cowdung cake fire). Remove when cooled to body temperature.
5. Form tablets. Dry in shade and store in glass. This is Lokanath Ras.
anupana: With Pippali + Honey; or Haritaki + Jaggery; or Jeera Churna + Gomuthra/Jaggery
shloka:
पारदं गन्धकञ्च व सम भागं विमर्दयेत् ।
मृताभ्र रसतुल्यञ्च पुनस्तत्रैव मदयेत् ॥ २ ॥
रसाद्विगुणलौहश्च लौहतुल्यञ्च ताम्रकम् ।
भस्म वराटिकायाश्च ताम्रतस्त्रिगुणं कुरु ॥ ३ ॥
नागवल्लीरसेनैव मयेद्यता.तो भिषक् ।
पुटेगनपुटे विद्वान् स्वाङ्गशीतं समुद्धरेत् ।। ४ ।
यकृत्लीहोदरं गुल्मं श्वयथुञ्च विनाशयेत् ।
पिप्पल। मधुसंयुक्तां सगुडां वा हरीतकीम् ।
गोमूत्रञ्च पिबेच्चानु गुडं वा जीरकान्वितम् ॥ ५ ॥

name: Agnikumar Loha
benefits: Agnikumar Loha treats significantlys: Yakrit Roga (liver diseases), Pliha Roga (spleen diseases), Udara Roga (abdominal diseases), Gulma (abdominal lump) and Halimaka (advanced anaemia/jaundice).
ingredients:
Tuthya / Tuttha (तूथ्य)	Copper Sulphate	1 Tola
Apamarga / Ramtangana (अपामार्ग)	Achyranthes aspera	1 Tola
Tankana / Suhaga (टंकण/सुहागा)	Borax	1 Tola
Saindhava Namak (सेंधानमक)	Rock Salt	1 Tola
Dhania (धनियाँ)	Coriander	1 Tola
Jeera (जीरा)	Cumin	1 Tola
Ajwain (अजवायन)	Carom seeds	1 Tola
Mirch (मिर्च)	Black Pepper	1 Tola
Sonth (सोंठ)	Dry Ginger	1 Tola
Laung (लौंग)	Clove	1 Tola
Elaichi (इलायची)	Cardamom	1 Tola
Vayavidanga (वायविडंग)	Embelia ribes	1 Tola
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron 	12 parts (= total of above)
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	½ Pala
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	½ Pala
preparation:
1. Take each of the 12 herbs/minerals in 1 Tola powder. Add Loha Bhasma — 12 parts (equal to total of the above).
2. Prepare Kajjali from Shu. Parada (½ Pala) and Shu. Gandhaka (½ Pala).
3. Combine Kajjali with all the powders and Triturate together until homogeneous.
4. Take with Ghee and honey. This is Agnikumar Loha.
shloka:
तुत्थरामठटंगानि सैन्धवं धान्यजीरकम् ।
यमानी मरिचं शुण्ठी लवंगेला विडंगकम् ॥ १८ ॥
प्रत्येक तोलकं चूर्ण लौहचूर्णन्तु तत्समम् ।
रसस्य गन्धकस्यापि पत्लैक कज्जलीकृतम् ॥ १६ ।।
घृतेन मधुना खाद्य लौहमग्निकुमारकम् ।
यकृत्लीहोदरहरं गुल्मञ्चापि हलोमकम् ॥ २० ॥
बलवर्णाग्निजननं कान्तिपुष्टिविवर्द्धनम् ।
श्रीमद्गहननाथेन निर्मितं विश्वसम्पदे ॥ २१ ॥

name: Loha Mrityunjaya Ras
benefits: Loha Mrityunjaya Ras treats significantlys: Pliha (spleen diseases), Yakrit (liver diseases), Gulma (abdominal lump), Ashthila (hard abdominal mass), Agra-mamsa (tissue overgrowth/hepatosplenomegaly), Shotha (oedema), all Udara Roga (abdominal diseases), Vatarakta (gout/haemorrhagic conditions), Kamath (hard tortoise-like swelling) and Antivridhi (inguinal hernia/intestinal prolapse).
ingredients:
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	1 part
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	1 part
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron 	1 part
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica	1 part
Shu. Manashila (शु. मैनसिल)	Purified Realgar	1 part
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper 	1 part
Shu. Kuchala (शु. कुचला)	Purified Nux vomica	1 part
Kauri Bhasma (कौड़ीभस्म)	Incinerated Cowrie shell 	1 part
Shu. Trituya / Tuthya (शु. तूतिया)	Copper Sulphate	1 part
Shankha Bhasma (शंखभस्म)	Incinerated Conch shell 	1 part
Rasaanjana (रसौत)	Berberis aqueous extract	1 part
Jaayaphala (जायफल)	Nutmeg	1 part
Kutaki (कुटकी)	Picrorhiza kurroa	1 part
Javakhar (जवाखार)	Potassium carbonate	1 part
Sajji (सजी)	Sodium carbonate	1 part
Shu. Jamalgota (शु. जमालगोटा)	Purified Croton tiglium	1 part
Sonth (सोंठ)	Dry Ginger	1 part
Mirch (मिर्च)	Black Pepper	1 part
Pippali (पिप्पली)	Long Pepper	1 part
Heeng (हींग)	Asafoetida	1 part
Sendha Namak (सेंधानमक)	Rock Salt	1 part
Sooryamukhi Svaras (सूर्यमुखी रस)	Sunflower leaf juice — for Bhavana	As required
Bilva Patra Ras (बेलपत्र रस)	Bael leaf juice — for Bhavana	As required
preparation: 1. Prepare Kajjali from Shu. Parada and Shu. Gandhaka (equal parts). Add all remaining bhasmas and powders in equal parts. Triturate thoroughly.\n2. Give one Bhavana with Sooryamukhi (sunflower) leaf juice and one Bhavana with Bilva (bael) leaf juice.\n3. Triturate again with Sooryamukhi juice and form tablets. Dry in shade. This is Loha Mrityunjaya Ras.
shloka:
रसगन्धकलौहाभ्र कुनटा मृतताम्रक्रम् ।
विषमुष्टिवराटश्च तुत्थं शङ्ख रसाञ्जनम् ।। ५५ ।।
जातीफलञ्च कटुकी द्विक्षारं कानकं तथा ।
व्योषं हिंगु सैन्धवश्च प्रत्येकं सूततुल्यकम् ॥ ५६ ॥
श्लक्ष्णचूर्णीकृतं सर्वमेकत्र भावयेत्ततः ।
सूर्य्यावर्त्तर सेनैव बिल्वपत्ररसेन च ।
सूर्यावर्त्तन मतिमान वटिकां कारयेत् ततः ॥ ५७ ॥
प्लीहानं यकृतं गुल्ममष्टीलाञ्च विनाशयेत् ।
अप्रमांसं तथा शोथं तथा सबोंदराणि च ॥
बातरक्तच कमठं चान्तविद्रधिमेव च ॥ ५८ ॥

name: Maha Mrityunjaya Ras
benefits: Treats significantlys many diseases swiftly, like the sun dispels darkness: Yakrit Roga (liver diseases), Gulma (abdominal lump), Udara Roga (abdominal disorders), Agra-mamsa (hepatosplenomegaly/tissue overgrowth), Pliha (spleen diseases), Agni-mandya (indigestion/weak digestive fire) and Aruchi (anorexia/loss of appetite).
ingredients:
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	1 Tola
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	1 Tola
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron 	1 Tola
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica	1 Tola
Shu. Manashila (शु. मैनसिल)	Purified Realgar	1 Tola
Shu. Trituya (शु. तूतिया)	Copper Sulphate	1 Tola
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper 	1 Tola
Sendha Namak (सेंधानमक)	Rock Salt	1 Tola
Kauri Bhasma (कौड़ीभस्म)	Incinerated Cowrie shell 	1 Tola
Vavachi (वावची)	Psoralea corylifolia (Bakuchi)	1 Tola
Vidanga (विडंगमक)	Embelia ribes	1 Tola
Shankha Bhasma (शंखभस्म)	Incinerated Conch shell 	1 Tola
Chitraka (चीता)	Plumbago zeylanica	1 Tola
Heeng (हींग)	Asafoetida	1 Tola
Kutaki (कुटकी)	Picrorhiza kurroa	1 Tola
Javakhar (जवाखार)	Potassium carbonate	1 Tola
Sajji (सजी)	Sodium carbonate	1 Tola
Kayapar / Kassia (कायफर)	Cassia fistula	1 Tola
Rasaanjana (रसौत)	Berberis aqueous extract	1 Tola
Jayanti (जयन्ती)	Sesbania sesban	1 Tola
Shu. Sohaga (शु. सोहागा)	Purified Borax	1 Tola
Ardraka Svaras (अद्रक)	Fresh Ginger juice — 1 day Bhavana	As required
Guduchi Svaras (गिलोय)	Tinospora cordifolia juice — 1 day Bhavana	As required
preparation: 1. Prepare Kajjali from Shu. Parada and Shu. Gandhaka. Add all other bhasmas and powders (each 1 Tola). Triturate all together finely.\n2. Give one Bhavana with Ardraka (fresh ginger) juice and one Bhavana with Guduchi (Giloy) juice — Triturate thoroughly after each.\n3. Form tablets of 1 Gunja (1 Ratti = 125 mg) each. Dry in shade and store in glass. This is Maha Mrityunjaya Ras.
shloka:
रसगन्धकलौहाम्र कुनटीतुत्थताम्रकम् ।
सैन्धवश्च वराटश्च वागुजी विशङ्खकम् ॥ ५६ ॥
चित्रकं हिंगु कटुकी द्विक्षारं कट्फल तथा ।
रसाब्जनं जयन्ती च टङ्गणं समभागिकम् ॥ ६० ॥
एतत्सर्वं विचूर्णाथ दिनमेकं विभावयेत् !
आर्द्रकस्वरसेनैव गुहूच्याः स्वरसेन च ॥ ६१ ॥
गुञ्जामात्रां वटीं कृत्वा भक्षयेन्मधुना सह ।
नानारोगप्रशमनो यकृद्गुल्मोदर्शाण च ॥ ६२ ॥
अग्रमांसं तथा प्लीहामग्निमान्यमरोचकम् ।
एतान्सर्वान्निहन्त्याशु भास्करस्तिमिरं यथा ।
महामृत्युञ्जयो नाम महेशेन प्रकाशितः ॥ ६३ ॥

name: Pliharnava Ras
benefits: Treats significantlys without doubt: all six types of Pliha (spleen diseases and enlargements), Jwara (fever), Manda Agni (weak digestive fire), Kasa (cough), Shwasa (asthma/breathlessness), Vamana (vomiting) and Bhrama (vertigo/dizziness).
ingredients:
Shu. Hingula (शु. सिंगरिफ/हिंगुल)	Purified Cinnabar (Mercuric Sulphide)	1 Pala
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	1 Pala
Shu. Tankana / Sohaga (शु. सुहागा)	Purified Borax	1 Pala
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica	1 Pala
Shu. Visha / Vatsanabha (शु. विष)	Purified Aconitum ferox	1 Pala
Pippali (पिप्पली)	Long Pepper	½ Pala
Mirch (मिर्च)	Black Pepper	½ Pala
Harisangara Svaras (हरिसिंगार रस)	Nyctanthes arbor-tristis (Parijata) juice — for administration	As required
Madhu (शहद)	Honey — for administration	As required
preparation: 1. Take Shu. Hingula, Shu. Gandhaka, Shu. Tankana, Abhraka Bhasma and Shu. Visha — each 1 Pala. Triturate all together very finely.\n2. Add Pippali (½ Pala) and Mirch (½ Pala) powders. Triturate all together thoroughly.\n3. Form tablets of 1½ Ratti (approx. 187 mg) each. Dry in shade and store in glass. This is Pliharnava Ras.
shloka:
हिंगलं गन्धकः टङ्गमभ्रकं विषमेव च ।
प्रत्येकं पलिक भागं चूर्णयेदतिचिक्कणम् ॥ ३८ ॥
पिप्पलीमरिचञ्चैव प्रत्येकञ्च पलार्द्धकम् ।
मर्दयित्वा वटीं कुर्याद्वल्लमात्रां प्रयत्नतः ।। ३६ ॥
सेव्या शेफालिदल जैर्वटी माक्षिकसंयुता ।
प्लीहानं षट्द्धकारं च हन्ति शीघ्र न संशयः ॥ ४० ॥
ज्वरं मन्दानलं चैव कासं श्वासं वमिं भ्रमिम् ।
प्लीहार्णव इति ख्यातो गहनानन्दभाषितः ॥ ४१ ॥

name: Plihahari Ras
benefits: Treats significantlys without doubt — even incurable (Asadhya) Pliha (spleen diseases/enlargement of all types), Yakrit Roga (liver diseases), Pandu (anaemia/jaundice), Gulma (abdominal lump/tumour) and Bhagandar (fistula-in-ano) and related disorders.
ingredients:
Shu. Haritala (शु. हड़तालका चूर्ण)	Purified Orpiment (Arsenic Trisulphide)	1 Karsha
Svarna Bhasma (स्वर्णभस्म)	Incinerated Gold 	1/4 Karsha
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper 	1/2 Pala
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica 	1/2 Pala (equal to Tamra Bhasma)
Mrigajina Bhasma (मृगचर्म भस्म)	Incinerated Deer skin 	1 Karsha
Bijaura Nimbu Jad Chhal (बिजौरा नींबू जड़ छाल)	Citron/Bijapura lemon root bark	1 Karsha
Madhu (शहद)	Honey — for administration	As required
Chitraka Churna (चीताके चूर्ण)	Plumbago zeylanica powder — for administration	As required
preparation: 1. Take all ingredients in the specified quantities and Triturate together thoroughly until homogeneous.\n2. Form tablets of 6 Ratti (approx. 750 mg) each. Dry in shade and store in glass.
shloka:
कर्षेकं तालचूर्णस्य तत्पादांशं सुवर्णकम् ।
पलाद्धं मृतताम्रश्च तत्समं शुद्धमभ्रक्रम् ॥ ५१ ॥
मृगाजिनस्य भस्मापि कर्पमत्र प्रदापयेत् ।
लिम्पाकांघ्रित्वचस्तद्वत्सर्वमेकत्र कारयेत् ॥ ५२ ॥
रसगुञ्जाप्रमाणेन वटिकां कारयेत्ततः ।
मधुना वह्निचूर्णेन खादेन्नित्यं यथाबलम् ॥ ५३ ॥
असाध्यमपि प्लीहानं हन्त्यवश्यं न संशयः ।
यकृतं पाण्डरोगश्च गुल्मादिकभगन्दरान् ॥ ५४ ॥

name: Plihashardul Ras
benefits: Plihashardul Ras treats significantlys: Pliha (spleen diseases), Agra-mamsa (hepatosplenomegaly), Yakrit (liver diseases), Gulma (abdominal lump — even difficult cases), all Ama-shaya Roga (stomach/intestinal diseases), Udara Roga (abdominal diseases), Shotha (oedema), Vidradhi (abscess), Agni-mandya (indigestion), Jwara (fever) and all types of Pliha-associated fevers.
ingredients:
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	1 part
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	1 part
Sonth (सोंठ)	Dry Ginger	1 part
Mirch (मिर्च)	Black Pepper	1 part
Pippali (पिप्पली)	Long Pepper	1 part
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper 	5 parts
Shu. Manashila (शु. मैनसिल)	Purified Realgar	1 part
Kauri Bhasma (कौड़ीभस्म)	Incinerated Cowrie shell 	1 part
Shu. Trituya (शु. तूतिया)	Copper Sulphate	1 part
Heeng (हींग)	Asafoetida	1 part
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron 	1 part
Jayanti (जयन्ती)	Sesbania sesban	1 part
Rohitaka Chhal (रोहेड़े की छाल)	Tecomella undulata / Rohitaka bark	1 part
Javakhar (जवाखार)	Potassium carbonate	1 part
Sohaga (सोहागा)	Borax	1 part
Sendha Namak (सेंधानमक)	Rock Salt	1 part
Vidanga (विडंगमक)	Embelia ribes	1 part
Chitraka (चीता)	Plumbago zeylanica	1 part
Shu. Jamalgota (शु. जमालगोटा)	Purified Croton tiglium	1 part
Trivrit Kwath (निसोथ काथ)	Ipomoea turpethum decoction — Bhavana	As required
Chitraka Kwath (चीता काथ)	Plumbago decoction — Bhavana	As required
Ardraka Kwath (अदरख काथ)	Ginger decoction — Bhavana	As required
preparation: 1. Prepare Kajjali from Shu. Parada and Shu. Gandhaka (1 part each). Add all remaining ingredients in specified parts and Triturate all together thoroughly.\n2. Give 3 Bhavanas each with Trivrit (Ipomoea turpethum), Chitraka (Plumbago) and Ardraka (ginger) decoctions — Triturate well after each.\n3. Form tablets of 1 Ratti (125 mg) each. Dry in shade and store in glass.
shloka:
सूतकं गन्धकं व्योषं समभागं पृथक् पृथक् ।
एभिः सम ताम्रभस्म योजयेच्चैव बुद्धिमान् ॥ ४२ ॥
मनःशिला वराट च तुत्थं रामठलौहकम् ।
जयन्ती रोहितं चैव क्षारटङ्गण सैन्धवम् ॥ ४३ ॥
विडं चित्रं कानकं च रसतुल्यं पृथक् पृथक् ।
भावयेत्त्रिदिनं यावत् त्रिवृच्चित्रकणार्द्रकैः ॥ ४४ ॥
मुञ्जामात्रां वटीं खादेत्सद्यः प्लीहविनाशिनीम् ।
पिप्पलीमधुसयुक्तां द्विगुञ्जां वा प्रयोजयेत् ॥ ४५ ॥
प्लीहानमग्रमांसं च यकृद्गुल्मं सुदुस्तरम् ।
आमाशयेषु सर्वेषु चोदरे शोथविद्रधौ ॥ ४६ ॥
अग्निमान्द्ये ज्वरे चैव प्लीहि सर्वज्वरेषु च ।
प्लीहशार्दूलनामायं गहनानन्दभाषितः ।॥ ४७ ॥

name: Rohitak Loha
benefits: Rohitak Loha treats significantlys: Pliha Roga (spleen diseases and enlargement), Yakrit Roga (liver diseases) and Agra-mamsa (hepatosplenomegaly/tissue overgrowth).
ingredients:
Rohitaka Chhal (रोहन वृक्ष की छाल)	Tecomella undulata (Rohitaka) bark	Equal part
Harad / Haritaki (हरड़)	Terminalia chebula	Equal part
Baheda / Bibhitaki (बहेड़ा)	Terminalia bellirica	Equal part
Amla / Amalaki (आँवला)	Phyllanthus emblica (Indian gooseberry)	Equal part
Sonth (सोंठ)	Dry Ginger	Equal part
Mirch (मिर्च)	Black Pepper	Equal part
Peepar / Pippali (पीपर)	Long Pepper	Equal part
Vidanga (विडंग)	Embelia ribes	Equal part
Motha (मोथा)	Cyperus rotundus (nut grass)	Equal part
Chitraka (चीता)	Plumbago zeylanica	Equal part
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron 	Equal to total of all above combined
preparation: 1.	Take all herbal ingredients in equal powder quantities. Triturate each to fine powder separately.\n2.	Combine all powders and mix well. Add Loha Bhasma (Incinerated Iron ) in quantity equal to the total combined weight of all herbs.\n3.	Mix all together thoroughly. This is Rohitak Loha.
shloka:
रोहितकसमायुक्तं त्रिकत्रययुतं त्वयः ।
प्लीहानमग्रमांसञ्च यकृतञ्च विनाशयेत् ।। १ ।।

name: Tamreshwar Vati
benefits: Tamreshwar Vati treats significantlys: Pliha (spleen diseases), Yakrit (liver diseases), Gulma (abdominal lump), Darun Amavata (severe rheumatoid arthritis), Bawasir/Arsha (piles/haemorrhoids), Ghor Udara Roga (severe abdominal diseases), Murchha (fainting), Pandu (anaemia/jaundice), Halimak (advanced anaemia), Grahani (malabsorption/IBS), Atisara (diarrhoea), Yakshma Roga (tuberculosis/wasting) and Shotha (oedema/swelling).
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Heeng (हींग)	Asafoetida	1 Tola
Sonth (सोंठ)	Dry Ginger	1 Tola
Mirch (मिर्च)	Black Pepper	1 Tola
Pippali (पिप्पली)	Long Pepper	1 Tola
Apamarga Patra (अपामार्ग पत्र)	Achyranthes aspera leaf	1 Tola
Arka / Madar Patra (मदार / आक पत्र)	Calotropis gigantea leaf	1 Tola
Snuhi / Sehund Patra (सेंहुड़ पत्र)	Euphorbia neriifolia leaf	1 Tola
Sendha Namak (सेंधानमक)	Rock Salt	7 Tola
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron 	7 Tola
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper 	7 Tola
preparation: 12.	Take all herbal ingredients (Heeng, Sonth, Mirch, Pippali, Apamarga leaf, Arka leaf, Snuhi leaf) — 1 Tola each. Triturate all to fine powder.\n13.	Add Sendha Namak, Loha Bhasma and Tamra Bhasma — 7 Tola each. Mix all together and Triturate thoroughly.\n14.	Form into tablets (Vati). Dry in shade and store in glass. This is Tamreshwar Vati.
shloka:
हिङ्गु त्रिकटुकञ्चैवापामार्गस्य च पत्रकम् ।
अर्कपत्रं स्नुहीपत्र तथा च समभागिकम् ॥ १०५ ॥
सैन्धवं तत्समं ग्राह्य लो । ताम्रञ्च तत्समम् ।
प्लीहानं यकृत गुल्ममामवातं सुदारुणम् ॥ १६ ॥
अर्शासि घोरमुदरं मुर्छापाण्डु हलीमकम् ।
ग्रहणीमतिसारञ्च यमाणं शोथमेव च ॥ १७ ॥

name: Yakritadi Loha
benefits: Plihodar, Kamala, Halimak, Kasa, Shwasa, Jwara, Vatgulma
ingredients:
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron 	2 Karsha
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica 	1/2 Pala
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper 	1 Karsha
Bijaura Nimbu Jad Chhal (बिजौरा नींबू जड़ छाल)	Bijapura/Citron lemon root bark	1 Pala
Mrigajina Bhasma (मृगचर्म भस्म)	Incinerated Deer skin 	1 Pala
preparation: 1.	Take all five ingredients in specified quantities. Triturate all together thoroughly until homogeneous.\n2.	Form tablets of 9 Gunja (9 Ratti = approx. 1125 mg) each. Dry in shade and store in glass. This is Yakritadi Loha.
shloka:
द्विकर्ष लौहचूर्णस्य चाभ्रकस्य पलार्द्धकम् ।
कर्ष शुद्धं मृतं ताम्र लिम्पाकांब्रित्वचं पलम् ॥ २७ ॥
मृगाजिनभस्मपल सर्वमेकत्र कारयेत् ।
नवगुञ्जाप्रमाणेन वटिकां कारयेद्भिषक् ।। २८ ।।
यावत्प्लीहोदरश्चैव कामलञ्च हलीमकम् ।
कासं श्वासं ज्वरं हन्याद्बलवर्णाग्निकारकम् ॥
यकृदरि त्विदं लौह वातगुल्मविनाशनम् ॥ २६ ॥

name: Mehkeshari
benefits: Prameha (Urinary/Diabetic disorders), Madhumeha (Diabetes mellitus), Shukra Pravaha (Spermatorrhoea)
ingredients:
Vanga Bhasma (वङ्गभस्म)	Incinerated Tin 	Equal part
Svarna Bhasma (स्वर्णभस्म)	Incinerated Gold 	Equal part
Kanta Loha Bhasma (कान्तलोहभस्म)	Incinerated Magnetic Iron 	Equal part
Rasa Sindura (रससिन्दूर)	Red Mercuric Sulphide (processed mercury)	Equal part
Mukta Bhasma (मुक्ताभस्म)	Incinerated Pearl 	Equal part
Dalchini Churna (दालचीनीचूर्ण / गुडत्वच)	Cinnamomum zeylanicum (Cinnamon) bark powder	Equal part
Sukshma Ela Churna (सूक्ष्मेलाचूर्ण / छोटी इलायची)	Small Cardamom powder	Equal part
Nagakeshara Churna (नागकेसरचूर्ण)	Mesua ferrea powder	Equal part
Ghrita Kumari Svaras (घृतकुमारीस्वरस)	Aloe vera juice — for Bhavana	As required
Gau Dugdha (गौदुग्ध)	Cow's milk — Anupana vehicle	As required
preparation: 1. Take all eight substances (Vanga Bhasma, Svarna Bhasma, Kanta Loha Bhasma, Rasa Sindura, Mukta Bhasma, Dalchini Churna, Sukshma Ela Churna, and Nagakeshara Churna) in equal parts. Powder finely and combine in a mortar.\n2. Give Bhavana with Ghrita Kumari Svaras (Aloe vera juice) until well incorporated.\n3. Form pills of 2 Masha (approx. 250 mg) each. Store in a glass vessel.
shloka:
मृतं वङ्गं सुनर्णञ्च कान्तलौहश्च पारदम् ।
मुक्तां गुडत्वचञ्चैव सूक्ष्मैलां नागकेशरम् ॥ ५० ॥
समभागं विचूर्णाथ कन्यानीरेण भावयेत् ।
द्विमाषां वटिकां खादेद् दुग्धान्नं प्रपिबेत्ततः ।
प्रमेहं नाशयत्याशु केशरी करिणं यथा ॥ ५१ ॥
शुक्रप्रवाहं शमयेत् त्रिरात्रान्नात्र संशयः ।
चिरजातं प्रमेहश्व मधुमेहञ्च नाशयत् ॥ ५२ ॥

name: Chandraprabha Vati — for Sarva Prameha
benefits: Sarva Prameha (all types of urinary/diabetic disorders), Stambhana, Swapna Prameha
ingredients:
Rasa Sindura (Mruta Soota) (रससिन्दूर)	Red Mercuric Sulphide	Equal part
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica	Equal part
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron 	Equal part
Naga Bhasma (नागभस्म)	Incinerated Lead 	Equal part
Vanga Bhasma (वङ्गभस्म)	Incinerated Tin 	Equal part
Elaichi Bija Churna (इलायचीबीजचूर्ण)	Cardamom seed powder	Equal part
Lavanga Churna (लवंगचूर्ण)	Clove powder	Equal part
Javitri Churna (जाविश्री / जातीकोशफलचूर्ण)	Mace powder	Equal part
Yashtimadhu Churna (यष्टिमधुचूर्ण / जाँवला)	Glycyrrhiza glabra powder	Equal part
Amalaki Churna (आमलकीचूर्ण / आँवला)	Emblica officinalis powder	Equal part
Sarkara (Mishri) (शक्कर / मिश्री)	Rock sugar/candy	Equal part
Karpura (कपूर)	Camphor	Equal part
Khadira Sara (खैरसार / खदिरसार)	Acacia catechu heartwood extract	Equal part
Shatahva Churna (सोंफ / शतह्वाचूर्ण)	Anethum sowa (Soya/dill seed) powder	Equal part
Kantakarika Churna (कण्टकारिकाचूर्ण / छोटी कटेरी)	Solanum xanthocarpum powder	Equal part
Amlavetas Churna (अम्लवेतसचूर्ण)	Garcinia indica powder	Equal part
Langali Svaras (लाङ्गलीद्रव)	Gloriosa superba extract — 1 day Bhavana	As required
Bhedi Dugdha (भेड़ी दूध)	Sheep's milk — 1 day Bhavana	As required
Pan Svaras (पान स्वरस)	Betel leaf juice — 1 day Bhavana	As required
dose: 500 mg to 1 gm (1 pill — Bera seed size)
preparation: 1. Make fine Churna of all Churna-worthy substances (herbs, minerals). Combine all.\n2. Give Bhavana with Langali Svaras for 1 day; then Bhedi Dugdha (sheep's milk) for 1 day; then Paan Svaras (betel leaf juice) for 1 day (3 total Bhavanas).\n3. Form pills of Bera seed size (approx. 500 mg).
anupana: Amalaki + Parwal Patta Kwatha with Madhu, or Guduchi Kwatha with Madhu
shloka:
मृतसूताभ्रकं लोहं नागं वङ्ग समं समम् ।
एलाबीजं लवङ्गश्च जातीकोषफलं तथा ॥ २३ ॥
मधुकं मधुयष्टिञ्च धात्रीच्च समशर्कराम् ।
कर्पूरं खादिरं सारं शताह्वां कण्टकारिकाम् ॥ २४ ॥
अम्लवेतसकं तुल्यं दिनैकं लाङ्गलीद्रवैः ।
भावयेन् मेषदुग्धेन नागवल्या रसैर्दिनम् ॥ २५ ॥
वटिका बदरास्थ्याभा कार्या चन्द्रप्रभा परा ।
भक्षयेद् वटिकामेकां सर्वमेहकुलान्तिकाम् ।। २६ ।।
धात्रीपटोलपत्राणां कषायं वाऽमृतायुतम् ।
सक्षोद्रं भक्षयेच्चानु सर्वमेहप्रशान्तये ॥ २७ ॥

name: Prameha Setu Ras
benefits: Sarva Roga; especially Paittika Prameha (Pitta-type urinary/diabetic disorders)
ingredients:
Rasa Sindura (रससिन्दूर)	Red Mercuric Sulphide (processed mercury)	Equal part
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica	Equal part
Vata Ksheera (बटक्षीर / वटक्षीर)	Ficus benghalensis (Banyan tree) milk sap — for trituration (2 Prahar)	As required
Triphala Kwatha (त्रिफलाक्वाथ)	Three-fruit decoction — Anupana	As required
Madhu (मधु)	Honey — Anupana	As required
preparation: 1. Take Rasa Sindura and Abhraka Bhasma in equal parts. Triturate both in a mortar with Vata Ksheera (Banyan tree milk sap) for two Prahar (approximately 6 hours) until well incorporated.\n2. Dry the mixture. Place in a Musha (crucible) and fire (Puta Paka).\n3. When Svangasheetal, remove and Triturate in mortar. Store in a glass vessel.
anupana: Triphala Kwatha with Madhu (honey) — especially for Prameha
shloka:
सूताभ्रञ्च वटक्षीरैर्मर्दयेत् प्रहरद्वयम् ।
विशोष्य पक्वं मूषायां सर्वरोगे प्रयोजयेत् ॥ ६ ॥
विशेषान्मेह रोगेषु त्रिफलामधुसंयुतम् ।
युञ्जीत वल्लमेकन्तु रसेन्द्रस्यास्य वैद्यराट् ॥ ७ ॥

name: Vangeshwara Ras
benefits: Vataja Prameha (Vata-type Urinary/Diabetic disorders)
ingredients:
Rasa Sindura (रससिन्दूर)	Red Mercuric Sulphide (Rasa Bhasma)	1 part (1 Ratti = 125 mg)
Vanga Bhasma (वङ्गभस्म)	Incinerated Tin 	1 part (1 Ratti = 125 mg)
Madhu (मधु)	Honey — for licking (Lehana)	As required
Mudga Yusha with Amalaki (मुद्रायूष + आमला)	Green gram soup with gooseberry — dietary Pathya	As diet
Takra (तक्र)	Buttermilk — dietary Pathya	As diet
Tilapindi (Khalli) (तिलपिण्डी / खल्ली)	Sesame oil cake — cooked in Takra with Hingu	25 gm
Shu. Hingu (शु. हींग)	Purified Asafoetida — cooked with Tilapindi in Takra	Small quantity
Tila Taila (तिलतेल)	Sesame oil — for cooking vegetables (dietary advice)	As cooking medium
preparation: 1. Take Rasa Sindura and Vanga Bhasma — 1 Ratti each (125 mg each = 250 mg total).\n2. Combine and lick with Madhu (honey). Administering this Lehana (licking preparation) with honey eliminates Vataja Prameha (Vata-type diabetes/urinary disorders).\n3. Dietary Management (Pathya): Prepare Mudga Amalaka Yusha (green gram + gooseberry broth) and give with Takra (buttermilk). Cook Tilapindi (sesame oil cake — 25 gm) in Takra with Shu. Hingu (purified asafoetida) and give to drink — this also helps in Prameha. Avoid excessive Ghrita (ghee); instead cook vegetables in Tila Taila (sesame oil).
anupana: Mudra Yusha with Amalaki and Hingu Takra
shloka:
रसस्य भस्मना तुल्यं वंगभस्म समाहरेत् । मधुना लेहयेत्प्राज्ञो वातमेहप्रशान्तये ।। २८ ।।
मुगामलकयूषेण पथ्यं देयं सतक्रकम् । तिलपिण्डीं च तक्रेण पक्त्वा दद्यान्न हिङ्गुकम् ।।
घृतं बहु न दद्याच्च तिलतैलेन भोजयेत् ।। २९ ।।

name: Vasanta Kusumakar Ras
benefits: Madhumeha, Sarva Prameha, Kshaya, Kasa, Trisha, Shwasa, Rakta Pitta, Visha, Amlapitta
ingredients:
Svarna Bhasma (स्वर्णभस्म)	Incinerated Gold 	2 parts
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica	2 parts
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron 	3 parts
Rasa Sindura (रससिन्दूर)	Red Mercuric Sulphide	4 parts
Vanga Bhasma (वङ्गभस्म)	Incinerated Tin 	3 parts
Pravala Bhasma (प्रवालभस्म)	Incinerated Coral 	4 parts
Mukta Pishti (मोतीपिष्ठी)	Pearl paste	4 parts
Kasturi (कस्तूरी)	Musk	4 parts
Gau Dugdha (गोदुग्ध)	Cow's milk — 7 Bhavanas	As required
Ikshu Rasa (इक्षुरस)	Sugarcane juice — 7 Bhavanas	As required
Vasa Patra Svaras (वासापत्रस्वरस)	Adhatoda vasica leaf juice — 7 Bhavanas	As required
Haridra Svaras (हरिद्रास्वरस)	Turmeric juice/water — 7 Bhavanas	As required
Kadalikanda Rasa (कदलीकन्दरस)	Banana/plantain juice — 7 Bhavanas	As required
Kamala Pushpa Rasa (कमलपुष्परस)	Lotus flower juice — 7 Bhavanas	As required
Chameli Pushpa Rasa (चमेलीपुष्परस)	Jasminum officinale flower juice — 7 Bhavanas	As required
Ushira Faant (उशीरफाण्ट)	Vetiveria zizanioides cold infusion — 7 Bhavanas	As required
Netrabalaka Faant (नेत्रबालाफाण्ट)	Pavonia odorata cold infusion — 7 Bhavanas	As required
Kasturi Gol (कस्तूरी घोल)	Musk solution — 1 Bhavana (final)	As required
preparation:
1. In a mortar, first Triturate Rasa Sindura finely.
2. Then add all other Bhasmas (Svarna, Abhraka, Loha, Vanga, Pravala, Mukta Pishti) and triturate firmly.
3. Then give 7–7 Bhavanas (levigations) with each of the 10 Bhavana liquids listed (Cow's milk, Sugarcane juice, Vasa Patra Svaras, Turmeric juice/water, Kadalikanda Rasa, Kamala Pushpa Rasa, Chameli Pushpa Rasa, Ushira Faant, Netrabalaka Faant, and Kasturi Gol) — total 70 Bhavanas plus final Kasturi Bhavana (as per text: 50 total Bhavanas with each liquid 7 times).
4. After all Bhavanas are complete, form pills of 1–1 Ratti (125 mg) and dry in shade. Store in a glass vessel.
anupana: Gau Dugdha (cow's milk); for Amlapitta: Shweta Chandana Faant with Mishri
shloka:
द्वौ भागौ हेमभूतेश्च गगनं चापि तत्समम् । लोहस्य च त्रयो भागाश्चत्वारो रसभस्मनः ।।१३४।।
वङ्गभस्म त्रिभागं स्यात्सर्वमेकत्र कारयेत् । प्रवालं मौक्तिकं चैव रससाम्येन योजयेत् ।। १३५ ।।
भावना गव्यदुग्धेन इक्षुवासारसेन च । हरिद्रावारिजेनैव मोचाकन्दरसेन च ।। १३६ ।।
शतपत्ररसेनैव मालत्याः कुसुमेन च । उशीरद्वयनीरेण सप्त सप्त च संख्यया ।।१३७।।
पश्चान्मृगमदैर्भाव्यं सुसिद्धो रसराड् भवेत् । कुसुमाकरविख्यातो वसन्तपदपूर्वकः ।।१३८ ।।
गुञ्जामात्रं ददीतास्य मधुना सर्वमेहजित् । क्षयकासतृषाश्वासरक्तपित्तविषार्तिजित् ।
सिताचन्दनसंयुक्तश्चाम्लपित्तादिरोगनुत् ।। १३९।।

name: Aananda Bhairav Rasa
benefits: Jeerna Prameha (Chronic Diabetes / Urinary disorders)
ingredients:
Ingredient
(Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Vanga Bhasma (वङ्गभस्म)	Incinerated Tin 	Equal part
Svarna Bhasma (स्वर्णभस्म)	Incinerated Gold 	Equal part
Rasasindura (रससिन्दूर)	Purified Mercuric Sulphide	Equal part
Gunja Moola Churna (गुञ्जामूल)	Abrus precatorius (Rosary pea) root powder — Anupana	As required
preparation: 1. Take equal parts of Vanga Bhasma, Svarna Bhasma and Rasasindura. Triturate together with Madhu (honey) in a mortar.\n2. Form pills of 2 Gunja (250 mg) each. Store in glass vessel. This is Aananda Bhairav Rasa.
anupana: Gunja Moola (Abrus precatorius root) powder and Honey
shloka:
बङ्गभस्म मृतं स्वर्णं रसं क्षौद्रेविमर्दयेत् ॥ ११ ॥
द्विगुञ्ज भक्षयेन्नित्यं हन्ति मेहं चिरोद्भवम् ।
गुञ्जामूलं तथा क्षोद्रेरनुपानं प्रशस्यते ॥ १२ ॥

name: Harishankara Rasa
benefits: Nila Prameha and all types of Prameha (Diabetes / Urinary disorders)
ingredients:
Ingredient
(Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Rasasindura (रससिन्दूर)	Purified Mercuric Sulphide	1 part
Krishna Vajra Abhraka Bhasma (कृष्णवज्राभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Black Vajra-processed Mica 	1 part
Amalaka Phala Svaras (आमलाफलस्वरस)	Fresh Phyllanthus emblica (Amla) fruit juice — for 7 Bhavanas	As required
preparation: 1. In a mortar, first Triturate Rasasindura thoroughly to fine powder. Add Krishna Vajra Abhraka Bhasma and mix well.\n2. Give 7 Bhavanas with fresh Amalaka (Amla) juice — Triturate and shade-drying each time.\n3. Form pills of 1 Ratti (125 mg) each. Dry in shade and store in glass vessel. This is Harishankara Rasa.
shloka:
मृतं सूताभ्रकं तुल्यं धात्रीफलनिजद्रवैः । सप्ताहं भावयेत्खल्ले रसोऽयं हरिशङ्करः ।। १४०।।
माषमेकां वटीं खादेन्नीलमेहप्रशान्तये । पूर्वयोगानुपानं स्यादसाध्यं साधयेत्क्षणात् ।।१११।।

name: Vanga Avaleha
benefits: Treats significantlys all 20 types of Prameha (diabetes and urinary disorders). Especially beneficial in Svapna Meha (nocturnal emission disorder) and general Prameha.
ingredients:
Ingredient
(Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Vanga Bhasma (वङ्गभस्म)	Incinerated Tin 	2 Valla (750 mg); or 60–250 mg per dose
Madhu (मधु)	Honey — for licking with Vanga Bhasma	As required
Shu. Gandhaka (गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur — taken separately with Guda	1 Karsha (10g) equal to Guda
Purana Guda (पुरानागुड़)	Old Jaggery — taken with Gandhaka	1 Karsha (10g) equal to Gandhaka
Guduchi Sattva (गुडूचीसत्त्व)	Tinospora cordifolia pure extract — alternative Anupana	As required
Sharkara (शर्करा)	Sugar — alternative Anupana for Gandhaka	As required
preparation: 1. Take Vanga Bhasma (750 mg or as per dose) and lick with Honey.\n2. Then take Shu. Gandhaka (10g) with old Jaggery (Purana Guda, 10g). Alternatively, take Gandhaka with Guduchi Sattva or with Sugar.\n3. Use daily as per individual strength and condition. This is Vanga Avaleha.
anupana: Madhu (Honey) with Vanga; Purana Guda / Guduchi Sattva / Sharkara with Gandhaka
shloka:
वङ्गभस्म द्विवल्लञ्च लेहयेन्मधुन । सह ।
ततो गुडसमं गन्धं भक्षयेत् कर्षमात्रकम् ॥ ४ ॥
गुडूचीसत्त्वमथवा शर्करासहितं तथा ।
सर्वमेहहरी ज्ञेयो वङ्गावलेह उत्तमः ॥ ५ ॥

name: Yogeshvara Rasa
benefits: Prameha, Bahumootra, Ashmari, Mootrakrichha, Vrana, Mahakushtha, Arsha, Bhagandara
ingredients:
Ingredient
(Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	1 part
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	1 part
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron 	1 part
Naga Bhasma (नागभस्म)	Incinerated Lead	1 part
Varatika Bhasma (वराटिकाभस्म)	Incinerated Cowrie shell 	1 part
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper 	1 part
Vanga Bhasma (वङ्गभस्म)	Incinerated Tin 	1 part
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica 	1 part
Choti Elaichi Churna (छोटी इलायची)	Elettaria cardamomum (Small cardamom) powder	2 parts
Tejpatra Churna (तेजपत्र)	Cinnamomum tamala (Bay leaf) powder	2 parts
Nagarmotha Churna (मोथा)	Cyperus rotundus powder	2 parts
Vayi Vidanga Churna (वायिविडङ्ग)	Embelia ribes (False black pepper) powder	2 parts
Nagkeshar Churna (नागकेशर)	Mesua ferrea (Indian rose chestnut) powder	2 parts
Renuka Beeja Churna (सम्भालू बीज/रेणुका)	Vitex agnus-castus seed powder	2 parts
Amalaka Churna (आँवला)	Phyllanthus emblica (Amla) powder	2 parts
Pippali Moola Churna (पिपरामूल)	Piper longum root powder	2 parts
Amalaka Svaras (आँवलारस)	Phyllanthus emblica (Amla) juice — for 1 Bhavana	As required
preparation: 1. Take all 8 Bhasmas (equal parts) and all 8 herb powders (double parts). Triturate together carefully and thoroughly.\n2. Give one Bhavana (trituration + drying) with Amalaka (Amla) juice.\n3. Form pills of Chana-matra (chickpea size, approx. 250–500 mg). Store in glass vessel. This is Yogeshvara Rasa — as described by Mahadeva (Lord Shiva).
shloka:
सूतकं गन्धको लोहो नागश्वापि वराटिका ।
ताम्रकं वङ्गभस्मापि व्योमकञ्च समांशकम् ॥ ५३ ॥
सूक्ष्मलापत्रमुस्तश्च विडङ्गं नागकेशरम् ।
रेणुकाऽऽमल कचैव पिप्पलीमूलमेव च ॥ ५४ ॥
एषाञ्च द्विगुणं भागं मर्दयित्वा प्रयत्नतः ।
भावना तत्र दातव्या धात्रीफलरसेन च ॥ ५५ ॥
मात्रा चणकतुल्या च गुडिकेयं प्रकीर्त्तिता ।
प्रमेहं बहुमूत्रञ्च अश्मरीं मूत्रकृच्छ्रकम् ।। ५६ ।।
व्रणं हन्ति महाकुष्ठं ह्यर्शासि च भगन्दरम् ।
योगेश्वरो रसो नाम महादेवेन भाषितः ॥ ५७ ॥

name: Prameha Gaj Simha Rasa
benefits: Prameha (Diabetes / Urinary disorders)
ingredients:
Ingredient
(Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Rasasindura (रससिन्दूर)	Purified Mercuric Sulphide	1 part
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica  (Upara Rasa = Abhraka Bhasma here)	1 part
Svarna Bhasma (स्वर्णभस्म)	Incinerated Gold 	1 part
Vanga Bhasma (वङ्गभस्म)	Incinerated Tin 	1 part
Naga Bhasma (नागभस्म)	Incinerated Lead	1 part
Shu. Tankana (शु. टङ्कण)	Purified Borax — added in two stages	1/4 part
Chandali / Rakshoghna Pushpa Svaras (चाण्डाली)	Chandali flower juice (Manduki Parni / Bacopa monnieri or Rakshoghna plant)	As required
Rakshasi Pushpa Svaras (राक्षसीपुष्प)	Rakshasi flower juice (uncertain; possibly Datura or Stramonium)	As required
Madhu (मधु)	Honey — used during trituration and in Moosha	As required
Goghrita (गोघृत)	Cow's ghee — added after first Kukkuta Puta	As required
preparation:
1. Triturate all 5 Bhasmas (Rasasindura, Abhraka, Svarna, Vanga, Naga Bhasma) together in a mortar with Chandali and Rakshasi flower juice, Honey and Ghee. Add Tankana (1/4 part). Mix well and form balls. Dry thoroughly in sunlight.
2. Place the dried balls in a Moosha (crucible). Add some Honey into the Moosha. Seal the Moosha with Sandhibandha. Fire in Kukkuta Puta. Allow to cool completely.
3. Remove medicine from Moosha. Add Goghrita (cow's ghee). Place in Moosha again. Seal and fire in Kukkuta Puta a second time.
4. Remove again. Add quarter-part Shu. Tankana. Triturate well. Place in Moosha again, seal and fire in Kukkuta Puta a third time.
5. After complete cooling, powder finely in a mortar and store in glass vessel. This is Prameha Gaj Simha Rasa.
shloka:
चाण्डालीराक्षसीपुष्परसमध्वाज्यटङ्कणम् । रसं समांशोपरसं समं हेम्नां विमर्दितम् ।।४३।।
समांशं पूतिलोहं वा मूषायां विपचेत्क्रमात् । प्रमेहगजसिंहोऽयं रसः क्षौद्रैर्द्विमाषकम् ।।४४।।

name: Hemgarbha Pottali Ras
benefits: Rajyakshma (Tuberculosis)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Rasa Sindura (रससिन्दूर)	Processed Mercury / Red Mercuric Sulphide	6 grams
Svarna Bhasma (स्वर्णभस्म)	Incinerated Gold 	3 grams
Shu. Gandhaka Churna (शु. गन्धकचूर्ण)	Purified Sulphur powder	6 grams
Badi Varatika (बड़ी वराटिका)	Large Cowrie shells	4–5 pieces
Tankana / Borax (टंकण)	Borax	10 grams
preparation:
17.	In a large stone mortar, Triturate Rasa Sindura to a very fine powder. Add Svarna Bhasma and Shu. Gandhaka powder and triturate together for 1 hour.
18.	Separately, in another mortar, Triturate Tankana (borax) with goat's milk to make a paste (Pesht).
19.	Fill the medicine mixture inside the large Varatika (cowrie shells). Seal the mouth of each cowrie with the Tankana paste.
20.	After drying, arrange the filled cowries in a Sharavasamputa (two clay saucers sealed together). Bind firmly and fire in Gajaputa (cowdung cake fire).
21.	When cooled to body temperature (Svaangasheetal), open the Samputa the next day. Remove the Tankana seal from the mouth of the Varatika.
22.	Triturate the medicine along with the Varatika to a very fine powder (Sukshma Churna). Collect in a glass vessel. This is called 'Hemgarbha Pottali'.
shloka:
द्विनिष्कं भस्मसूतस्य निष्कैकं स्वर्णभस्मकम् । शुद्धगन्धकनिष्कौ द्वौ चूर्णित्वा चित्रकद्रवैः ।।२१।।
द्वियामान्ते विशोष्याथ तेन पूर्या वराटिकाः। वराटान्मृण्मये भाण्डे रुद्ध्वा गजपुटे पचेत् ।।२२।।
स्वाङ्गशीतं विचूर्य्याऽथ पोटलीं हेमगर्भिताम्। मृगाङ्कवच्चतुर्गुत्रं भक्षितं राजयक्ष्मनुत् ।।२३।।

name: Kshayashamak Ras
benefits: Kshaya Roga (Tuberculosis)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	12 grams
Shu. Gandhaka Churna (शु. गन्धकचूर्ण)	Purified Sulphur powder	12 grams
Trikatu Churna (त्रिकटुचूर्ण)	Trikatu powder (Sonth + Mirch + Pippali)	24 grams
Shankha Bhasma (शंखभस्म)	Incinerated Conch shell	48 grams
Varatika Bhasma (वराटिकाभस्म)	Incinerated Cowrie shell 	96 grams
Shu. Tankana (शु. टंकण)	Purified Borax	3 grams
Mirch Churna (मिरचचूर्ण)	Black Pepper powder	195 grams
preparation: 23.	First prepare good Kajjali in a clean mortar by firmly Triturate Parada and Gandhaka together until a smooth black mass forms.\n24.	Add the powders of all other ingredients to the Kajjali and mix well. Triturate for 3 hours until homogeneous.\n25.	Sieve through a fine sieve and collect in a glass vessel. This is 'Kshayashamak Ras' (also called Lokanath Ras by some).
shloka:
तुल्यं पारदगन्धकं त्रिकटुकं ताभ्यां रजः कम्बुजं तैस्तुल्यं च भवेत्कपर्दभसितं स्यात्पारदादृङ्कणम् ।
पादांशं सकलैः समानमरिचं लिह्यात्क्रमात्साज्यकं यावन्निष्कमितं भवेत्प्रतिदिनं मासात्क्षयः शाम्यति ।। ३० ।।

name: Lokanath Ras — 2
benefits: Rajyakshma (Tuberculosis)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	1½ grams (1500 mg)
Shu. Tutha / Tuthya (शु. तुत्थ)	Copper Sulphate	1500 mg
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	12 grams
Shu. Tankana (शु. टंकण)	Purified Borax	12 grams
Shankha Bhasma (शंखभस्म)	Incinerated Conch shell 	12 grams
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper 	23 grams
Varatika Bhasma (वराटिकाभस्म)	Incinerated Cowrie shell (or 9 cowrie shells)	105 grams (Navakharsha)
Arka Patra Svaras (अर्कपत्र स्वरस)	Calotropis gigantea leaf juice — for Bhavana	As required
preparation:
26.	In a clean stone mortar, mix Parada and Gandhaka and Triturate firmly to prepare Kajjali. Add Shu. Tutha and Triturate well.
27.	Then add Shu. Tankana, Shankha Bhasma, Tamra Bhasma and Varatika Bhasma to the Kajjali and mix well.
28.	Give Bhavana with Arka Patra Svaras (Calotropis/Madar leaf juice). Form into a disc (Chakrika). Dry and place in Sharavasamputa. Fire in Varahaputa.
29.	When cooled to body temperature (Svaangasheetal), open the Samputa. Give a second Bhavana with Arka Patra Svaras. Form another Chakrika. Dry, seal in Sharavasamputa and fire again — this time with half the quantity of cowdung cakes (Upala Puta).
30.	When cooled, open the Samputa, remove the medicine, Triturate in mortar and collect in a glass vessel. This is called 'Lokanath Ras'.
shloka:
अध्यर्द्धनिष्कौ रसतुत्थभागौ पृथक्पृथग्गन्धकटङ्ककर्षम् । शंखस्य कर्षं मृतताम्रतो द्वौ वराटिकानां नव सम्पुटस्थान् ।।४६।।
पक्त्वा पचेदर्कदलद्रवार्डान् भूयोऽ र्धभागेन करीषकाणाम् अस्यार्द्धपादं मरिचार्द्धभागं गन्धाश्मनिष्कं च घृतेन लिह्यात् ।।४७।।
अश्नीयात्पूर्वकृत्पथ्यं वासराण्येकविंशतिः । लोकनाथरसो नाम्ना रोगराजनिकृन्तनः ।।४८।।

name: Mahaveer Ras
benefits: Kshaya (TB), Grahani, Atisara, Kasa, Pandu, Gulma
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Tuthya Bhasma (शु. तुत्थभस्म)	Copper Sulphate ash	6 grams
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	3 grams
Shu. Vatsanabha Churna (शु. वत्सनाभिविषचूर्ण)	Purified Aconitum ferox (aconite) powder	3 grams
Teekshna Loha Bhasma (तीक्ष्णलोहभस्म)	Incinerated Teekshna Iron ash	6 grams
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	12 grams
Moti Pishti (मोतीपिष्ठि)	Pearl powder	12 grams
Rajmriganka Pottali Ras	Added post-firing — 1/4 of total	1/4 of total
Agniparni Svaras (अग्निपर्णी)	Flemingia semialata / Arani juice — Bhavana	As required
Brahmi / Aparajita Svaras (हिरलता)	Bacopa monnieri or Aparajita juice — Bhavana	As required
Bhringaraj Svaras (भृंगराज)	Eclipta prostrata juice — Bhavana	As required
Ardraka Svaras (आद्रिक)	Fresh Ginger juice — Bhavana	As required
Tulasi Svaras (तुलसी)	Basil juice — Bhavana	As required
Langali Kalk (लांगलीकन्द)	Gloriosa superba paste — for Samputa lining	As required
preparation:
31.	Prepare Kajjali from Shu. Parada and Shu. Gandhaka. Add Tuthya Bhasma, Vatsanabha churna, Teekshna Loha Bhasma and Moti Pishti. Triturate all together.
32.	Give sequential Bhavanas — 1 each with: Agniparni (Arani) Svaras, Brahmi/Aparajita Svaras, Bhringaraj Svaras, Ardraka Svaras and Tulasi Svaras.
33.	Form into a large ball. Dry separately. Coat inside of two clay saucers with Langali (Gloriosa superba) paste and dry.
34.	Place the ball (coated with Langali paste) in the clay saucer. Cover, seal and fire in Varahaputa. Cool to body temperature and remove medicine.
35.	Add 1/4 quantity Rajmriganka Pottali Ras and 2 Ratti Shu. Vatsanabha churna. Collect in glass. This is Mahaveer Ras.
shloka:
निष्कौ द्वौ तुत्थभागस्य रसादेकं सुसंस्कृतात् । निष्कं विषस्य द्वौ तीक्ष्णात्कर्षांशं गन्धमौक्तिकात् ।। ६७।।
अग्निपर्णीहरिलता भृङ्गार्द्रसुरसारसैः । मर्दितं लाङ्गलीकन्दप्रलिप्ते सम्पुटे पचेत् ।। ६८ ।।
अर्धपादं च पोटल्याः काकिन्यौ द्वे विषस्य च । लिहेन्मरिचचूर्णं च मधुना पोटलीसमम् ।। ६९ ।।
क्षयग्रहण्यतीसारवह्निदौर्बल्यकासिनाम् । पाण्डुगुल्मवतां श्रेष्ठो महावीरो हितो रसः ।।७०।।
अतिस्थूलस्य पूयासृक्कफानुद्वमतः क्षये । न योजयेत्क्षीररसान् विरुद्धक्रमतत्त्वतः ।।७१।।

name: Panchamrit Ras
benefits: Rajyakshma (Tuberculosis)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Rasa Sindura (रससिन्दूर)	Processed Mercury / Red Mercuric Sulphide	Equal part
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica 	Equal part
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron 	Equal part
Shu. Shilajatu (शु. शिलाजतु)	Purified Asphaltum / Shilajit	Equal part
Shu. Vatsanabha Churna (शु. वत्सनाभचूर्ण)	Purified Aconitum ferox (aconite) powder	Equal part
Shu. Guggulu (शु. गुग्गुलु)	Purified Commiphora mukul resin	Equal part
Guduchi Kwath (गुडूची काथ)	Tinospora cordifolia decoction — for Guggulu shodhana	As required
Trifala Kwath (त्रिफला काथ)	Trifala decoction — for Guggulu shodhana	As required
preparation:
36.	First purify Guggulu (resin) using Guduchi and Trifala decoction (Shodhana).
37.	In a clean stone mortar, Triturate Rasa Sindura finely. Add Abhraka Bhasma, Loha Bhasma, Shu. Vatsanabha churna and triturate together.
38.	In Trifala decoction, warm Shu. Guggulu and Shu. Shilajatu together until both liquify. Stir continuously. When both are fully dissolved and cooled, mix the Rasa Sindura mixture into the liquid Guggulu in the mortar and triturate thoroughly.
39.	Form tablets of 2 Ratti (250 mg) each. Dry well in shade and store in a glass vessel.If Parada Bhasma is unavailable, substitute with Tamra Bhasma (Incinerated Copper ).
shloka:
भस्मसूताभ्रलोहानां शिलाजतु विषं समम् । गुडूचीत्रिफलाक्वाथैः संस्कृतं गुग्गुलं तथा ।। २७।।
मृतं नेपालताम्रं च सूतस्थाने नियोजयेत् । एकीकृत्य द्विगुवं तद्भक्षयेद्राजयक्ष्मनुत् ।। २८ ।।
पञ्चामृतरसो नाम ह्यनुपानं च पूर्ववत् ।। २९ ।।

name: Praananatha Ras
benefits: Yakshma/Rajayakshma (TB), Shosha, Udara Roga, Arsha, Grahani, Jwara, Gulma
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron	60 gm (20 Nishka)
Svarna Makshika Bhasma (स्वर्णमाक्षिकभस्म)	Incinerated Chalcopyrite/Iron Pyrite	60 gm
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	3 gm
Tuttha Bhasma (तुत्यभस्म)	Incinerated Copper Sulphate 	3 gm
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	6 gm
Triphala Kwatha (त्रिफलाक्वाथ)	Three-fruit decoction — for trituration	As required
Maricha Churna (मरिचचूर्ण)	Black Pepper powder — added after firing	21 gm (7 Nishka)
Tuttha Bhasma (तुत्यभस्म)	Incinerated Copper Sulphate  — added after firing	30 gm (10 Nishka)
Shu. Tankana (शु. टङ्कण)	Purified Borax — added after firing + cowrie sealing	30 gm (10 Nishka)
Badi Kaudi (Varataka) (बड़ी कौड़ी / वराटका)	Large Cowrie shells — 4 for firing container	4 nos.
Bhringaraja Svaras (भृंगराजस्वरस)	Eclipta alba juice — 7 day Bhavana on Loha Bhasma	3 litres over 7 days
Dhattura Svaras (धत्तूरस्वरस)	Datura leaf juice — for trituration with Loha+Makshika	As required
Bhagini Svaras (भागिनीस्वरस / एक्लिप्टा)	Eclipta alba/Bhangra juice — for trituration	As required
Ardraka Svaras (आर्द्रकस्वरस)	Fresh Ginger juice — for trituration	As required
Bakri Dugdha (बकरीदूध)	Goat's milk — for making Tankana paste (cowrie sealing)	As required
preparation:
1.	First, make good Kajjali of Parada + Gandhaka.
2.	In another mortar, take Loha Bhasma 60 gm and give 7-day Bhavana with Bhringaraja Svaras (3 litres total — 6–7 day process).
3.	Then add Svarna Makshika Bhasma 60 gm to this Loha Bhasma and triturate with Dhatura Svaras, Bhagini Svaras, Triphala Kwatha, and Ardraka Svaras. Fire in Gajaputa. Next day when cool, open Samputa.
4.	Then mix the Kajjali (Parada+Gandhaka) into this fired medicine. Fill into 4 large Varataka (cowrie shells).
5.	Triturate Tankana in goat's milk to make paste and seal the cowrie mouths.
6.	Place all four cowries in Sharava Samputa, clay-seal (Kapadi Mitti), and fire in Gajaputa.
7.	When Svangasheetal, open, remove the clay-coated cowrie shells, remove the Tankana coating, triturate shells with medicine finely.
8.	Then add Maricha Churna 21 gm, Tuttha Bhasma 30 gm, and Shu. Tankana 30 gm — mix thoroughly and store in a glass vessel. This is Praananatha Ras.
shloka:
अयोरजः विंशतिनिष्कमानं विभावितं भृङ्गरसाढकेन । धत्तूरभाङ्गित्रिफलारसार्द्धं तुल्यांशताप्यं विपचेत्पुटेषु ।।५३।।
सूतश्च निष्कं समभागतुत्थं गन्धोपलौ द्वौ चतुरो वराटान् । पक्त्वा पुटाग्नौ समलोहचूर्णान् पचेत्तथा पूर्वरसैर्विमिश्रान् ।।५४।।
चूर्णेऽस्मिन्मरिचाः सप्त तुत्थटङ्कणयोर्दश । संसृजेत्तत्पृथङ्निष्कान् प्राणनाथाह्वयोदितः ।।५५।।
अद्धर्पपादो रसाद्भक्ष्यः केवलाद्राजयक्ष्मिभिः । शोषोदराऽ ोंग्रहणीज्वरगुल्माद्युपद्रुतैः ।।५६।।

name: Rajamrigankura Ras
benefits: Rajyakshma (Tuberculosis)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Rasa Sindura (रससिन्दूर)	Red Mercuric Sulphide	3 parts
Svarna Bhasma (स्वर्णभस्म)	Incinerated Gold 	1 part
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper  (Mruta Tamra)	1 part
Shu. Manaahshila (शु. मन:शिला)	Purified Realgar (Arsenic disulphide)	2 parts
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	2 parts
Shu. Haritala (शु. हरताल)	Purified Orpiment (Arsenic trisulphide)	2 parts
Pippali Churna (पिप्पलीचूर्ण)	Long Pepper powder — Anupana	10 grains per dose
Maricha Churna (मरिचचूर्ण)	Black Pepper powder — Anupana	19 grains per dose
Varataka (Kaudi) (वराटका / कौड़ी)	Large Cowrie shells — 8–10 shells for firing	8–10 nos.
Shu. Tankana (शु. टङ्कण)	Purified Borax — for sealing cowrie mouth	As required
Bakri Dugdha (बकरीदूध)	Goat's milk — toTriturate Tankana paste	As required
preparation:
1.	In a stone mortar, first triturate Rasa Sindura very finely.
2.	Then add all other substances (Svarna Bhasma, Tamra Bhasma, Shu. Manaahshila, Shu. Gandhaka, Shu. Haritala) and triturate together for 1 hour.
3.	Take 8–10 large cowrie shells (the type used as paper weights/Varataka). Triturate Tankana in goat's milk to make a paste.
4.	Fill the triturated medicine into the cowrie shells. Apply the Tankana paste to seal the cowrie mouths. Dry in sun.
5.	Place all medicine-filled cowries in a Sharava Samputa sealed with clay (Kapadi Mitti) and fire in Gajaputa.
6.	Next day when Svangasheetal, open the Samputa, remove the Tankana coating from cowrie mouths, and triturate cowries with medicine together finely.
7.	Filter through 200-mesh strainer and store in a glass vessel. This is Rajamrigankura Ras.
shloka:
रसभस्म त्रयो भागा भागैकं हेमभस्मकम् । मृतताम्रस्य भागैकं शिलागन्धकतालकम् ।।१४।।
प्रतिभागद्वयं शुद्धमेकीकृत्य विचूर्णयेत् । वराटान् पूरयेत्तेन अजाक्षीरेण टङ्कणम् ।।१५।।
पिष्ट्वा तेन मुखं रुद्ध्वा मृद्धाण्डे तन्निरोधयेत् । शुद्धं गजपुटे पच्याच्चूर्णयेत्स्वाङ्गशीतलम् ।। १६ ।।
रसो राजमृगाङ्कोऽयं चतुर्गुञ्जः क्षयापहः । दशपिप्पलिकाक्षौद्वैर्मरिचैकोनविंशतिः ।।
सघृतैर्दापयेद्वैद्यो रोगराजप्रशान्तये ।।१७।।

name: Shankeshwara Ras
benefits: Rajyakshma (Tuberculosis)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shankhanaabha Bhasma (शंखनाभिभस्म)	Conch-navel ash (Turbinella pyrum ash)	3 gm (1 Nishka)
Kaudi Bhasma (Varataka) (कौड़ीभस्म / वराटका)	Incinerated Cowrie shell 	12 gm (4 Nishka)
Shu. Tuttha Bhasma (शु. तुत्यभस्म)	Purified Incinerated Copper Sulphate 	1.5 gm (half Nishka)
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur — equal to all above combined	16.5 gm
Naga Bhasma (नागभस्म)	Incinerated Lead — equal to Gandhaka	16.5 gm
Rasa Sindura (रससिन्दूर)	Red Mercuric Sulphide — equal to Naga Bhasma	16.5 gm
Shu. Tankana (शु. टङ्कण)	Purified Borax — equal to Rasa Sindura	16.5 gm
Pippali Churna (पिप्पलीचूर्ण)	Long Pepper powder — Anupana	As required
Bakri Dugdha (बकरीदूध)	Goat's milk — for Tankana paste (cowrie sealing)	As required
Madhu (मधु)	Honey — Anupana	As required
preparation:
1.	In a stone mortar, first triturate Rasa Sindura finely.
2.	Then add Shankhanaabha Bhasma, Kaudi Bhasma, Shu. Tuttha Bhasma, Shu. Gandhaka, and Naga Bhasma and triturate well with Rasa Sindura for 1 hour.
3.	Take large cowrie shells and fill with the medicine. Triturate Tankana in goat's milk to make paste, and seal the cowrie mouths.
4.	Dry, then place in Sharava Samputa sealed with clay, and fire in Gajaputa.
5.	When Svangasheetal, open, remove Tankana coating, triturate cowries with medicine, filter finely through cloth and store in a glass vessel. This is Shankeshwara Ras.
shloka:
शङ्खस्य वलयान्निष्कं चतुर्निष्कं वराटकम् । निष्कार्द्धं नीलतुत्थस्य सर्वतुल्यं तु गन्धकम् ।। २४ ।।
गन्धतुलं मृतं नागं नागतुल्यं मृतं रसम् । टङ्कणं रसतुल्यं स्यान्मर्थं पाच्यं मृगांकवत् ।।
राजयक्ष्महरः सोऽयं नाम्ना शंखेश्वरो मतः ।। २५ ।।

name: Vajra Ras
benefits: Kshaya Roga / Rajayakshma (Pulmonary Tuberculosis)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Yashadha Bhasma (Kharpara Sattva) (यशदभस्म / खर्परसत्त्व)	Incinerated Zinc oxide — pre-soaked in Svarna 6 months	12 gm (1 Karsha)
Svarna Bhasma (स्वर्णभस्म)	Incinerated Gold 	6 gm
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	18 gm (6 Nishka)
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	24 gm (8 Nishka)
Pravala Bhasma (प्रवालभस्म)	Incinerated Coral 	6 gm
Mukta Bhasma (मुक्ताभस्म)	Incinerated Pearl 	6 gm
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron	6 gm
Naga Bhasma (नागभस्म)	Incinerated Lead 	9 gm
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper 	12 gm
Mahajambira Nimbu Svaras (महाजम्बीरनीरस)	Large lemon juice — forTriturate all ingredients	2 Prastha (~3 litres)
Maricha Churna (मरिचचूर्ण)	Black Pepper powder — for final dose preparation	As required (half Masha per dose)
Chaagneri Svaras (चाङ्गेरीस्वरस)	Oxalis corniculata juice — for trituration (3 hours)	As required (2 Prastha / ~1.5 litres)
Madhu (मधु)	Honey — for mixing dose on betel leaf	As required
Tambula Patra (ताम्बूलपत्र)	Betel leaf — for applying and licking the dose	As required
preparation:
1.	First make Kajjali from Parada + Gandhaka.
2.	Add all Bhasmas (Yashadha, Svarna, Pravala, Mukta, Loha, Naga, Tamra) to the Kajjali and triturate in mortar with Chaagneri Svaras for 9 hours. Note: Neelavata is resinous — leave it out.
3.	Then take Abhraka Bhasma, Kanta Loha Bhasma, and Shu. Haritala — 6–6 gm each. Also add: Ankkolanka Bija Churna (Alangium salvifolium), Malakaanguni Bija Churna, and Shu. Tuttha — 4 Nishka (12 gm) each; Shu. Tankana Kshara 24 gm; Kaudi Bhasma 60 gm.
4.	Triturate everything together in the Chaagneri-triturated medicine with 2 Prastha (1,500 ml) Jambiri Nimbu Svaras for 2–3 days and form a large ball.
5.	Dry, seal in Sharava Samputa, and fire in 1 Khari (2 quintals) rice husk fire.
6.	Then fire once more with Vanaupala (stone cooking) 1 Bhara (94 kg).
7.	When Svangasheetal, triturate in mortar and store in a glass vessel. This is Vajra Ras.
anupana: Maricha Churna + Gandhaka + Madhu on Tambula Patra (betel leaf)
shloka:
कर्षं खर्परसत्त्वस्य षण्मासे हेम्नि विद्रुते । षण्निष्कसूतं गन्धाश्मन्यष्टनिष्के प्रवेशितम् ।।५७।।
प्रवालमुक्ताफलयोश्चर्णं हेमसमांशयोः । क्रमाद्वित्रिचतुर्निष्कं मृतायः सीसभास्करम् ।। ५८ ।।
चाङ्गेर्यम्लेन यामांस्त्रीन्मर्दितं चूर्णितं पृथक् । द्वौ निष्कौ नीलवटकव्योमायस्कान्ततालकात् ।। ५९ ।।
अङ्कोल्लकंगुणीबीजतुत्थेभ्यश्चतुरः पृथक् । अष्टौ च टङ्कणक्षाराद्वराटानां च विंशतिः ।।६० ।।
महाजम्बीरनीरस्य प्रस्थद्वन्द्वेन पेषयेत् । एतदष्टशरावस्थं शुद्धं खार्यास्तुषस्य व ।।६१।।
करीषभारे च पचेदथ माषद्वयं ततः । एतावद्गन्धकात्पादं मरिचाद्भावितादपि ।।६२।।
मधुनाऽ ऽ लोडितं लिह्यात्ताम्बूलीपत्रलेपितम् । गतेऽस्य घटिकामात्रे प्रतियामं च पथ्यभुक् ।। ६३ ।।
नो चेदुद्दीपितो वह्निः क्षणाब्द्धातून्पचत्यतः । दिनमेकं निषेव्यैनं त्याज्यान्यामण्डलं त्यजेत् ।। ६४ ।।
ततः परं यथेष्टाशी द्वादशाब्दं सुखी भवेत् । एकमेकं दिनं भुक्त्वा वर्षे वर्षे महारसम् ।। ६५ ।।
वर्षादौ च त्यजेत्त्याज्यं द्वादशाब्दं जरां जयेत् । एष वज्ररसो नाम क्षयपर्वतभेदनः ।।६६।।

name: Mrigankupottali Ras
benefits: Kshaya / Rajayakshma (Pulmonary Tuberculosis)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shankhanaabha Churna (शंखनाभिचूर्ण)	Conch-navel powder — for making the Musha crucible	48 gm (16 Nishka)
Rasa Sindura (रससिन्दूर)	Red Mercuric Sulphide	1,500 mg (1.5 gm)
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	3 gm
Pippali Churna (पिप्पलीचूर्ण)	Long Pepper powder — Anupana	As required
Gau Ksheera (गौक्षीर)	Cow's milk — for trituration to make Musha paste	As required
Mritika (Clay) (मिट्टी)	Fine clay — for coating the cloth-wrapped Musha	As required
Vastra (Cloth) (वस्त्र)	Two layers of clean cloth — for wrapping Musha	As required
Madhu (मधु)	Honey — Anupana	As required
preparation:
1.	First, take Shankhanaabha Churna 48 gm and triturate thoroughly with Gau Ksheera (cow's milk) for 4–5 hours.
2.	From this thick paste, form a Musha (small crucible pot) of dose size with a lid — dry well in sunlight.
3.	In a separate clean mortar, triturate Rasa Sindura and Shu. Gandhaka to form very fine powder-mix.
4.	Fill this Rasa Sindura + Gandhaka powder into the dried Shankhanaabhi Musha. Close the lid tightly.
5.	Wrap the sealed Musha in two layers of clean cloth (Vastrabaddha). Apply Mritika (clay) all around the outside. Dry well.
6.	Place this clay-coated Musha inside a Sharava Samputa, seal the Samputa with Kapadi Mitti (clay), and fire in Gajaputa.
7.	Next day when Svangasheetal (cooled to body temperature), open the Samputa, remove the Musha, break it open gently and collect the medicine inside.
8.	Triturate finely in mortar and store in a glass vessel. This is Mrigankupottali Ras.
shloka:
शङ्खनाभिं गवां क्षीरैः पेषयेन्निष्कषोडश । तेन मूषा प्रकर्त्तव्या तन्मध्ये भस्मसूतकम् ।। १८ ।।
निष्कार्द्ध गन्धकात्त्रीणि चूर्णीकृत्य विनिक्षिपेत् । रुद्ध्वा तद्वेष्टयेद्वस्त्रे मृत्तिकां लेपयेद्बहिः ।।१९।।
शोष्यं गजपुटे पच्यान्मूषया सह चूर्णयेत् । गुचैकमनुपानेन क्षयं हन्ति मृगाङ्कवत् ।। २० ।।

name: Chandrakala Ras
benefits: Raktapitta, Pitta Roga, Jwara, Mutra-kricchhra
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	12 grams
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper 	12 grams
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	24 grams
Chirayata Churna (चिरायताचूर्ण)	Swertia chirata powder	12 grams
Guduchi Satva (गुडूचीसत्त्व)	Tinospora cordifolia extract	12 grams
Pitpapada Churna (पितपापडाचूर्ण)	Fumaria officinalis powder	12 grams
Ushira Churna (उशीरचूर्ण)	Vetiveria zizanioides (khus root) powder	12 grams
Pippali Churna (पिप्पलीचूर्ण)	Long Pepper powder	12 grams
Singhada Churna (सिंघाडाचूर्ण)	Trapa bispinosa (water chestnut) powder	12 grams
Anantamool Churna (अनन्तमूलचूर्ण)	Hemidesmus indicus powder	12 grams
Bhavana Dravyas	Musta Kwath, Dadima Svaras, Durva Svaras, Ketaki Vrikshatva Ras, Sahadevi Ras, Kumari Svaras, Parpata Kwath, Ramashetalika Svaras, Shatavari Svaras — one Bhavana each per day. Then add equal parts of: Tikta Guduchi Satva, Parpata, Ushira and Pippali powder, Shringata and Sariva (Hemidesmus indicus) — as fine powder. Then give 7 Bhavanas with Drakshaadi Kwath (raisin/grape decoction compound). Form tablets of Chanak size (250 mg). Dry in shade and store in glass.	As required
preparation:
41.	Grind Parada and Tamra Bhasma in a mortar for three days, making small balls each time and then drying them on fire. After drying, re-grind until fine.
42.	Combine with Shu. Gandhaka and all 10 dry ingredient powders (12 grams each) and prepare Kajjali.
43.	Give sequential Bhavanas — one per day — with each of the 9 Bhavana dravyas listed above.
44.	Add the fine powders of Tikta Guduchi Satva, Parpata, Ushira, Pippali, Shringata and Sariva (equal parts — 12 grams each) to the Kajjali.
45.	Give 7 Bhavanas with Drakshaadi Kwath. Form tablets of 250 mg (Chanak size). Dry in shade and store in glass. This is Chandrakala Ras.
shloka:
प्रत्येकं तोलमानेन सूतकं ताम्रभस्मकम् । दिनानि त्रीणि गुटिकां कृत्वा चाग्नौ विनिक्षिपेत् ।।७।।
ततः शुष्कं समादाय पुनरेव च मर्दयेत् । समस्तैः समगन्धैश्च कृत्वा कज्जलिकां च तैः ।।८।।
मुस्तादाडिमदूर्वाभिः केतकीस्तनवारिभिः । सहदेव्याः कुमार्याश्च पर्पटस्यापि वारिणा ।।९।।
रामशीतलिकातोयैः शतावर्या रसेन च । भावयित्वा प्रयत्नेन दिवसे दिवसे पृथक् ।।१०।।
तिक्तं गुडूचिकासत्त्वं पर्पटोशीरमागधीः । शृङ्गाटं सारिवा चैषां समानं सूक्ष्मचूर्णकम् ।।११।।
द्राक्षादिककषायेण सप्तधा परिभावयेत् । ततः पोताश्रयं क्षिप्त्वा वट्यः कार्याश्चणोपमाः ।।१२।।
अयं चन्द्रकलानामा रसेन्द्रः परिकीर्तितः । सर्वपित्तगदध्वंसी वातपित्तगदापहः ।।१३।।
अन्तर्बाह्यमहादाहविध्वंसनमहाक्षमः । ग्रीष्मकाले शरत्काले विशेषेण प्रशस्यते ।।१४।।
कुरुते नाग्निमान्धं च महातापज्वरं हरेत् । श्रमं मूर्च्छा हरत्याशु स्त्रीणां रक्तमहास्त्रवम् ।।१५।।
ऊर्ध्वाधो रक्तपित्तं च रक्तवान्ति विशेषतः । मूत्रकृच्छ्राणि सर्वाणि नाशयेन्नात्र संशयः ।।१६।।
द्राक्षामधूकमधुकं रोध्रकाश्मर्यसारिवाः । मुस्तामलकहीबेरपद्मकेशरपद्मकम् । मृणालचन्दनोशीरनीलोत्पलपरूषकम् ।।

name: Patoladi Yog
benefits: Raktapitta, Raktasrava (bleeding/haemorrhage)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Patola Patra (पटोलपत्र)	Trichosanthes dioica (pointed gourd) leaf powder	1 part
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron 	1 part
Rasa Sindura (रससिन्दूर)	Processed Mercury / Red Mercuric Sulphide	1 part
Loharivarga Kwath (लोहारिवर्ग काथ)	Loharivarga group decoction — for Bhavana	As required
preparation: 1.	Take Patola Patra (Trichosanthes dioica/pointed gourd leaf), Loha Bhasma (Incinerated Iron ) and Rasa Sindura (processed mercury) — one part each.\n2.	Give Bhavana with the decoction of Loharivarga group of herbs.\n3.	Form tablets of 250 mg. Dry in shade and collect in a glass vessel.
shloka:
पटोलमायसं चूर्णं सूतेन्द्रं समचारितम् । लोहारिवर्गसङ्घृष्टं रक्तपित्तहरं परम् ।। २ ।।

त्रिफला त्रिवृता दन्ती कटुकी तालमूलिका । वृद्धदारकवृश्चीरवृषपत्रकचित्रकाः ।।१।।
शृङ्गवेरविडङ्गौ च भृङ्गभल्लातकौषधम् । दाडिमस्य च पत्राणि शतपुत्री पुनर्नवा ॥२॥
कुठारक्रमकौ कन्दः तन्त्री भेकस्य पर्णिका । हस्तिकर्णपलाशश्च कुलिशः केशराजकः ॥३॥
माणः खण्डितकर्णश्च गोजिह्वा लोहमारकः । गिरिशान्तनकः प्रोक्तः त्रिफलादिरयं गणः ॥४।।

name: Rasendra Yog
benefits: Darunam Raktapittam (Severe haemorrhagic disorders)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Vasa Patra Svaras (वासापत्रस्वरस)	Adhatoda vasica (Malabar nut) leaf juice	12 ml (1 Karsha)
Rasa Sindura (रससिन्दूर)	Processed Mercury / Red Mercuric Sulphide	125 mg
Madhu (मधु)	Honey	5 grams
Shakkara / Cheeni (शक्कर/चीनी)	Sugar	5 grams
dose: 125 mg Rasa Sindura + 12 ml Vasa juice
preparation: 46.	Take fresh Vasa (Adhatoda vasica) leaves and extract juice to get 12 ml (1 Karsha).\n47.	Mix Rasa Sindura (125 mg), Madhu (5 grams) and Shakkara (5 grams) together with the Vasa juice.\n48.	Administer as Lehan (licking preparation) — take morning and evening daily.
anupana: Vasa Patra Svaras + Madhu + Sugar (as Lehan)
shloka:
वृषादलानां स्वरसस्य कर्ष रसेन्द्रगुञ्जामधुशर्करायुतम् ।
लिहन् प्रभाते मनुजो निहन्याद्दुःखाकरं दारुणरक्तपित्तम् ।। ३ ।।

name: Kapardak Ras
benefits: Raktapitta
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Rasa Sindura (रस सिन्दूर)	Processed Mercury / Red Mercuric Sulphide	As required
Karpasa Pushpa Ras (कपास के फूलों का रस)	Cotton flower juice (Gossypium herbaceum)	For 1-day trituration
Varatika (कौड़ियाँ)	Cowrie shells — as container for firing	As required
Kali Mirch (काली मिर्च)	Black Pepper — double the medicine weight	Double quantity
Ghrita (घी)	Ghee — for Lehan and for cooking Udumbara	As required
Udumbara Phala (गूलर का फल)	Ripe Ficus racemosa (cluster fig) fruits	As required
Sita / Mishri (मिश्री)	Sugar candy	As required
preparation:
49.	Grind Rasa Sindura thoroughly in cotton flower (Karpasa Pushpa) juice for one full day.
50.	Fill the medicine inside cowrie shells (Varatika). Seal inside an Andhamusha (blind crucible) and fire in Puta.
51.	When cooled to body temperature (Svaang Sheetal), remove andTriturate very finely with double quantity of black pepper (Kali Mirch).
52.	Administer 1 Gunja (125 mg) as Lehan (licking) with Ghee. This is Kapardak Ras.
53.	Additionally: Cook ripe Udumbara (Gular/Ficus racemosa) fruits in Ghee with Mishri (sugar candy). Eat with Kali Mirch totreats significantly even difficult (Dussadhya) Raktapitta.
reference: Bharat Bhaishajya Ratnakar, part-1, verse 950, page no 285
shloka:
मृतं वा मूर्छितं सूतं कार्पास पुष्पजैर्द्रवैः ।
मर्दयेद्दिनमेकन्तु तेन पूर्त्या वराटिका ।।
निरुध्य चान्धमूषायां भाण्डे रुद्ध्वा पुटे पचेत् ।
उद्धृत्य चूर्णयेच्छलक्ष्णं मरिचैर्द्विगुणैः सह ॥
गुञ्जकैकं घृतैर्लेद्यं रक्तपित्तं नियच्छति ।
कपर्दकरसोनामासाध्यं च साधयत्यलम् ॥
उदुम्बरफलं पक्कं घृतैःपाच्यं सितायुतम् ।
भक्षयेन्मरिचैर्युक्तमनुस्याद्रक्तपित्तनुत् ॥

name: Amalkyadi Loha
benefits: Amalkyadi Lohatreats significantlys: Raktapitta (haemorrhagic disorders), Amla-pitta (hyperacidity/acid reflux) and many diseases of Pitta and Vata origin. It is also: Vrishya (aphrodisiac/reproductive tonic), Agni-deepana (digestive stimulant/kindles Agni) and Balakarak (strength-giving).
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Amalaa / Amalaki (आमला)	Phyllanthus emblica (Indian gooseberry)	1 part
Peepal / Pippali (पीपल)	Long Pepper (Piper longum)	1 part
Cheeni / Sita (चीनी/सिता)	Sugar / Mishri (sugar candy)	2 parts
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron 	4 parts
preparation: 54.	Take Amalaki powder (1 part), Pippali powder (1 part), Cheeni/Sita (2 parts) and Loha Bhasma (4 parts).\n55.	Grind all finely and mix thoroughly until homogeneous.\n56.	Store in a glass vessel. This is Amalkyadi Loha (also called Yogaraja).
reference: Bharat Bhaishajya Ratnakar, part-1, verse 443, page no 153
shloka:
आमलापिप्पलीचूर्ण तुल्यया सितया सह ।
रक्तपित्तहरं लौहं योगराजमिदं स्मृतम् ॥
वृष्याग्निदीपनं बल्यमम्लपित्तविनाशनम् ।
पित्तोत्थानपि वातोत्थन्निहन्ति विविधान् गदान्

name: Arkeshwar Ras
benefits: Sudaarunam Raktapitta (Severe haemorrhagic disorders)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper 	Equal part
Vanga Bhasma (बंगभस्म)	Incinerated Tin 	Equal part
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica 	Equal part
Svarna Makshika Bhasma (स्वर्णमाक्षिकभस्म)	Incinerated Chalcopyrite/Iron Pyrite 	Equal part
Guduchi Svaras (गुरुचके स्वरस)	Tinospora cordifolia juice — 21-day Bhavana	As required
preparation: 57.	Take all four Bhasmas in equal parts and mix together.\n58.	Give Bhavana with Guduchi (Giloy/Tinospora cordifolia) juice for 21 consecutive days (3 Saptaha = 3 weeks),Triturate well each day.\n59.	After Bhavana is complete, give Puta (fire). When cooled (Svaangasheetal), remove andTriturate well. This is Arkeshwar Ras.
anupana: Adusa/Vasa Svaras or Ksheeravidari Kanda Churna
shloka:
मृतार्क मृतवङ्गञ्च मृताभ्रञ्च समाक्षिकम् ।
अमृतास्वरसैर्भाव्यं पुटे त्रिःसप्तकं पचेत् ॥ १ ॥
वासाक्षीरविदारीभ्याञ्चतुर्गुञ्जाप्रमाणतः ।
भक्षणाद्विनिहन्त्याशु रक्तपितं सुदारुणम् ॥ २ ॥

name: Raktapitta Ankusha Ras
benefits: Raktapitta, Grahani-Raktadosha, Jwara, Daha
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Jeera Kwath (जीरा क्वाथ)	Cumin decoction — for administration	As required
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	12 grams
Shu. Hingula (शु. हिंगुल)	Purified Cinnabar (Mercuric Sulphide)	12 grams
Murgi ka Anda (मुर्गी का अण्डा)	Hen's eggs — for trituration medium	2 eggs
Shu. Tankana-kshara (शु. टंकणक्षार)	Purified Borax alkali	12 grams
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	12 grams
Goghrita (गोघृत)	Cow's Ghee	12 grams
preparation:
60.	Grind Parada and Hingula together in a mortar. Give Bhavana with hen's egg liquid (Murgi ka Anda Drava). Process through Urddhvapatan Yantra (upward distillation apparatus) to obtain distilled Parada.
61.	In a clean mortar, triturate the Urddhvapatita Parada (distilled mercury) with Shu. Gandhaka to make good Kajjali.
62.	Add Tankana-kshara (borax alkali) and triturate. Then triturate the whole Kajjali with Goghrita (cow's ghee).
63.	Form tablets of 250 mg each. Dry in shade and collect in glass vessel. This is Raktapitta Ankusha Ras.
64.	Administer 250 mg with Jeera Kwath (cumin decoction) for 3 days up to 3 Masha (3 months).
shloka:
पारदं हिङ्गुलूकं च ऊर्ध्वयन्त्रेण मेलयेत् । कुक्कुटाण्डरसं भागं टङ्कणक्षारमेव च ।।४।।
गन्धकस्य तथा भागं घृतेन परिमर्दयेत् । सिद्धं रसं समादाय जीरतोयेन दापयेत् ।।५।।
दिनानि त्रीणि माषं च ग्रहणीरक्तदोषजित् । ज्वरदाहविनाशश्च रक्तपित्तविनाशनम् ।।६।।
पारदं हिङ्गुलोत्थं च ह्यूर्ध्वपातनतो भवेत् । कुक्कुटाण्डरसं भागं टङ्कणक्षारमेव च ।।
गन्धकस्य तथा भागो घृतेन परिमर्दयेत् । सिद्धं रसं समादाय जीरतोयेन दापयेत् ।।
माषत्रयं प्रतिदिनं योजयेत् पित्तशान्तये ।।

name: Rasamrit Ras
benefits: Pitta, Amla-pitta, Raktapitta, Sarva Jwara
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	1 part
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	2 parts
Svarna Makshika Bhasma (स्वर्णमाक्षिकभस्म)	Incinerated Chalcopyrite/Iron Pyrite 	1 part
