Shu. Shilajatu (शु. शिलाजीत)	Purified Asphaltum / Shilajit	1 part
Guduchi (गुरुच)	Tinospora cordifolia	1 part
Chandana (चन्दन)	Sandalwood (Santalum album)	1 part
Munakka / Draksha (मुनका)	Raisins (Vitis vinifera)	1 part
Mahua / Madhupushpa (महुआ)	Madhuca longifolia flower	1 part
Dhania (धनियाँ)	Coriander (Coriandrum sativum)	1 part
Kutaja Chhal (कुटज की छाल)	Holarrhena antidysenterica bark	1 part
Indrajou / Kutaja Beej (इन्द्रजौ)	Holarrhena antidysenterica seeds	1 part
Dhataki Phool (धायके फूल)	Woodfordia fruticosa flowers	1 part
Neem Patti (नीमकी पत्ती)	Azadirachta indica (neem) leaf	1 part
Mulethi / Yashtimadhu (मुलेठी)	Glycyrrhiza glabra (licorice)	1 part
Madhu (मधु)	Honey — for mixing and administration	As required
Mishri (मिश्री)	Sugar candy — for administration	As required
Dharoshna Dugdha (धारोष्ण दूध)	Fresh warm milk — for administration	As required
preparation: 1.	Prepare Kajjali from Shu. Parada (1 part) and Shu. Gandhaka (2 parts). Add all other ingredients (each 1 part) as fine powders.\n2.	Add honey and Mishri. Triturate all together thoroughly until homogeneous.\n3.	Store in a glass vessel. This is Rasamrit Ras.
shloka:
गुडूचीं चन्दनं द्राक्षां मधुपुष्पञ्च धान्यकम् ॥ ११ ॥
कुटजस्य त्वचं बीजं धातकी निम्बपत्रकम् ।
यष्टीमधु समायुक्तं मधुशर्करयांऽन्वितम् ॥ १२ ॥
विधिना मर्दयित्वा तु कर्षमात्रन्तु भक्षयेत् ।
धारोष्णययसा युक्तं प्रातरेव समुत्थितः ॥ १३ ॥
पित्तं तथाऽम्लपित्तश्च रक्तपित्तं विशेषतः ।
निहन्ति सर्वदोषञ्च ज्वरं सर्वं न संशयः ।
रसामृतरसो नाम गहनानन्दद्भाषितः ॥ १४॥

name: Shatashoolyas Loha
benefits: Raktapitta (haemorrhagic disorders), Trishna, Daha, Jwara, Vamana, Raktapitta
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shatavara / Shatamool (शतावर)	Asparagus racemosus	Equal part
Mishri / Sita (मिश्री)	Sugar candy	Equal part
Dhania (धनियाँ)	Coriander (Coriandrum sativum)	Equal part
Nagakeshar (नागकेशार)	Mesua ferrea (cobra's saffron)	Equal part
Chandana (चन्दन)	Sandalwood (Santalum album)	Equal part
Trifala (त्रिफला)	Haritaki + Bibhitaki + Amalaki	Equal part
Sonth (सोंठ)	Dry Ginger	Equal part
Mirch (मिर्च)	Black Pepper	Equal part
Pippali (पिप्पली)	Long Pepper	Equal part
Motha (मोथा)	Cyperus rotundus (nut grass)	Equal part
Vayavidanga (बायविडंग)	Embelia ribes	Equal part
Chitraka (चीता)	Plumbago zeylanica	Equal part
Til (तिल)	Sesame (Sesamum indicum)	Equal part
Adusa / Vasa (अड़ूसा)	Adhatoda vasica — for auxiliary decoction	As required
Munakka (मुनका)	Raisins — for auxiliary decoction	As required
Harad / Haritaki (हरड़)	Terminalia chebula — for auxiliary decoction	As required
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron 	Equal to total of all above
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica  — for auxiliary treatment	As required
Pitpapada Svaras (पितपापडे रस)	Fumaria officinalis juice — auxiliary	As required
preparation: 68.	Take all 13 herbal ingredients in equal powder parts. Add Loha Bhasma equal to the combined total weight.\n69.	Grind all together thoroughly and form tablets (Goli). Dry in shade and store in glass. This is Shatashoolyas Loha.
anupana: With Abhraka Bhasma + Pitpapada juice; or Adusa + Munakka + Harad decoction with sugar
shloka:
शतमूली सिताधान्यनागकेशरचन्दनैः ।
त्रिकत्रयतिलैर्युक्तं लौहं सर्वगदापहम् ॥ ६ ॥
तृष्णादाहज्वरच्छर्दिरक्तपित्तविनाशनम्
रक्तपित्ते पिबेद्वयोमसहितं पर्पटीरसम् ।। ७ ।।
वासाद्राक्षाऽभयानाञ्च काथं वा शर्करान्वितम् ।
योगवाहिरसान् सर्वान् रक्तपित्ते प्रयोजयेत् ॥ ८ ॥

name: Sudhanidhi Ras
benefits: Raktapitta (Haemorrhagic disorders)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारा)	Purified Mercury	Equal part
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	Equal part
Svarna Makshika Bhasma (स्वर्णमाक्षिकभस्म)	Incinerated Chalcopyrite/Iron Pyrite 	Equal part
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron 	Equal part
Trifala Kwath (त्रिफलाके काथ)	Trifala decoction — for cooking	As required
Gomutra (गोमूत्र)	Cow's urine — alternative to Trifala Kwath	As required
preparation:
70.	Take Shu. Parada and Shu. Gandhaka in equal parts. Prepare Kajjali (black sulphide mixture) in a clean mortar.
71.	Add Svarna Makshika Bhasma and Loha Bhasma (equal parts each). Mix all together.
72.	Place all in a Loha Patra (iron vessel). Cook with Trifala Kwath or Gomutra using Upala (cowdung cake) fire until solidified.
73.	When cooked, remove and form tablets (Goli). Store in glass. This is Sudhanidhi Ras.
shloka:
सूतं गन्धं माक्षिकञ्चैव लौहं सर्वे घष्ट्वा त्रैफलेनोदकेन ।
लौहे पात्रे गोमयैः पाचयित्वा रात्रौ दद्याद्रक्तपित्तप्रशान्त्यै ॥ ३ ॥

name: Shirорogari Ras
benefits: Suryavarta (solar migraine) and Shiro Roga (head diseases)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Parada Bhasma (पारदभस्म)	Incinerated Mercury ash	Equal part
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica 	Equal part
Tiksna Loha Bhasma (तीक्ष्णलोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron 	Equal part
Kanta Loha Bhasma (कान्तलोहभस्म)	Incinerated Magnetic Iron	Equal part
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper 	Equal part
Snuhi Ksheera (स्नुहीक्षीर)	Euphorbia nerifolia milk sap — for 1-day trituration	As required
preparation: 1. Take Parada Bhasma, Abhraka Bhasma, Tiksna Loha Bhasma, Kanta Loha Bhasma, and Tamra Bhasma — all in equal parts. Combine in a mortar and triturate with Snuhi Ksheera (Euphorbia nerifolia milk sap) for one full day.\n2. Form pills of Udad (black gram/urad) size. Store in a glass vessel.
reference: Bharat Bhaishajya Ratnakar, part-5, verse 7588, page no 121
shloka:
मृतमूताभ्रकं तीक्ष्ण कान्तं ताघ्रं मृतं समम् ।
स्नुहीक्षीरैर्दिनं मद्यै पिण्डं तन्मापमात्रकम् ॥
सप्ताहात्सूर्यवर्तादीन् शिरोरोगान्विनाशयेत् ॥

name: Chandrakanta Ras — Shiroroga Hari
benefits: Suryavarta (solar headache/migraine) and all Shiro Roga (head diseases)
ingredients:
Take equal parts (Sama Bhaga) of all five Bhasmas:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Rasa Sindura (रससिन्दूर)	Red Mercuric Sulphide (Mruta Soota)	Equal part
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica 	Equal part
Tiksna Loha Bhasma (तीक्ष्णलोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron 	Equal part
Kanta Loha Bhasma (कान्तलोहभस्म)	Incinerated Magnetic Iron	Equal part
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper 	Equal part
Snuhi Ksheera (स्नुहीक्षीर)	Euphorbia nerifolia milk sap — for 1-day Bhavana	As required
Sukhoshan Goghrita (सुखोष्ण गोघृत)	Warm cow's ghee — Anupana vehicle	As required
preparation:
1. Take all five Bhasmas in equal parts and combine in a mortar.
2. Triturate together with Snuhi Ksheera (Euphorbia nerifolia milk sap) for one full day, giving repeated Bhavana until well incorporated.
3. Form pills of 1 Masha (Udad/black gram size = 65 mg / half Ratti). Dry in shade and store in a glass vessel.
4. Consuming 1–2 pills with Sukhoshan Goghrita (warm cow's ghee) cures Suryavarta (solar migraine/headache that worsens with sunlight) and all types of Shiro Roga (head diseases) within one week.
5. This is called Chandrakanta Ras — also known as Shiroroga Hari (Treats significantlyer of head diseases).
shloka:
मृतसूताभ्रकं तीक्ष्ण कान्तं ताभ्रं मृतं समम् । स्नुहीक्षीरैर्दिनं मर्धं पिण्डं तन्माषमात्रकम् ।।
सप्ताहात्सूर्यवर्तादीन् शिरोरोगान् विनाशयेत् ।। ७८ ।।

name: Mahalakshmi Vilas Ras
benefits: Sannipata Roga (tri-Dosha fever/critical conditions) and Shiro Roga (head diseases)
ingredients:
Take equal parts of all the following:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron 	Equal part
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica 	Equal part
Shu. Visha (शु. विष)	Purified Aconitum ferox (Vatsanabha)	Equal part
Musta Churna (मुस्ताचूर्ण / मोथा)	Cyperus rotundus powder	Equal part
Haritaki Churna (हरीतकीचूर्ण / हरां)	Terminalia chebula powder	Equal part
Bibhitaka Churna (बिभीतकचूर्ण / बहेड़ा)	Terminalia bellirica powder	Equal part
Amalaki Churna (आमलकीचूर्ण / आँवला)	Emblica officinalis powder	Equal part
Shunthi Churna (शुण्ठीचूर्ण / सोंठ)	Dry Ginger powder	Equal part
Maricha Churna (मरिचचूर्ण / मिर्च)	Black Pepper powder	Equal part
Pippali Churna (पिप्पलीचूर्ण)	Long Pepper powder	Equal part
Dhattura Bija Churna (धत्तूरेबीजचूर्ण)	Datura metel seed powder	Equal part
Vriddhadaru Bija Churna (विधारेकेबीजचूर्ण)	Argyreia nervosa seed powder	Equal part
Indraashana Bija Churna (इन्द्राशनबीजचूर्ण / भॉगकेबीज)	Citrullus colocynthis seed powder (both large + small)	Equal part
Laghu Gokshura Churna (लघुगोखरूचूर्ण)	Small Tribulus terrestris powder	Equal part
Brihad Gokshura Churna (बृहदगोखरूचूर्ण)	Large Tribulus terrestris powder	Equal part
Pippali Mool Churna (पिप्पलीमूलचूर्ण)	Long Pepper root powder	Equal part
Dhattura Svaras (धत्तूरस्वरस)	Datura metel juice — for Bhavana	As required
preparation: 1. Take all the above substances in equal parts and prepare fine Churna. Combine all together in a mortar.\n2. Give Bhavana with Dhattura Svaras (Datura metel juice). Triturate well and form pills of 2 Gunja (approx. 250 mg) each.\n3. Dry in shade and store in a glass vessel.
shloka:
लौहमभ्र विषं मुस्तं मलत्रयकटुत्रयम् ।
धुस्तूरं वृद्धदारं च बीजमिन्द्राशनस्य च ॥ १३ ॥
द्वयं गोक्षुरकञ्च व पिप्पलीमूलमेव च ।
एतत् सर्वं समं ग्राह्य रसे धुस्तूरकस्य च ॥ १४ ॥
भावयित्वा वटी कार्या
द्विगुञ्जाफलमानतः ।
महालक्ष्मीविलासोऽयं सन्निपातनिवारकः ।॥ १५ ॥

name: Mihirodaya Vati
benefits: Ardhavabhedaka, Anantavata, Suryavarta, Shankha Roga — all Shiro Roga
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron 	1 part
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica 	1 part
Svarna Bhasma (स्वर्णभस्म)	Incinerated Gold 	1 part
Vidruma / Pravala Bhasma (विद्रुम / मूँगाभस्म)	Incinerated Coral 	1 part
Kanta Pashana Bhasma (कान्तपाषाण / राजपट्टक)		1 part
Rasa Sindura (रससिन्दूर)	Red Mercuric Sulphide	2 parts
Jatamamsi Kwatha (जटामांसीक्वाथ)	Nardostachys jatamansi decoction — 1 day Bhavana	As required
Haritaki Churna (हरीतकीचूर्ण)	Terminalia chebula powder — Anupana	As required
Gau Dugdha (गौदुग्ध)	Cow's milk — Anupana vehicle	As required
preparation: 1. Take Loha Bhasma, Abhraka Bhasma, Svarna Bhasma, Pravala Bhasma, and Kanta Pashana Bhasma — 1 part each — and Rasa Sindura 2 parts. Combine all in a mortar and triturate together.\n2. Give 1 day Bhavana with Eranda Mool Svaras (castor root juice), and then 1 day Bhavana with Jatamamsi Kwatha (Spikenard decoction). Form pills of 2 Ratti (250 mg) each. Dry in shade and store in a glass vessel.
anupana: Haritaki Churna (or Murabba) with Gau Dugdha (milk)
reference: Bharat Bhaishajya Ratnakar, part-4, verse 5606, page no 234
shloka:
लौहमभ्रं सुवर्णश्च विद्रुमं राजपट्टकम् ।
सर्व समं प्रदातव्यं सिन्दूरश्च द्विभागिकम् ।।
एरण्डमूलजेनैव रसेन परिभावयेत् ।
क्वाथैस्तथा जटामांस्या वटी रक्तिद्वयात्मिका ।।
पथ्या पयोऽनुपानेन वटीयं मिहिरोदया ।
अविभेदकं हन्ति पीता वातमनन्तकम् ॥
सूर्यावर्त तथा शङ्खञ्चैकजश्च द्विदोषजम् ।
त्रिदोषजं शिरोरोगं साध्यासाध्यं न संशयः ॥

name: Rasachandrika Vati
benefits: Shiro Roga (all head diseases), Amavata (rheumatoid arthritis), Shleshma Roga (Kapha diseases), Manyastambha (cervical spondylosis), Galagraha (throat obstruction), Grahani (malabsorption), Shleepada (elephantiasis), Antravriddhi (hernia), Bhagandara (anal fistula), Kamala (jaundice), Shotha (oedema), Pandu (anaemia), Peenas (sinusitis), Arsha (haemorrhoids), and Guda Roga (rectal diseases).
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Trailokya Vijaya Bija (त्रैलोक्यविजयाबीज)	Cannabis sativa seed	Equal part
Unmatta Bija (उन्मत्त बीज / धतूरेकेबीज)	Datura metel seed	Equal part
Kantakari Bija (कण्टकारीबीज / कटेरीकेबीज)	Solanum xanthocarpum seed	Equal part
Ela Bija (एलाबीज / इलाइचीबीज)	Cardamom seed	Equal part
Vriddhadaru Bija (वृद्धिदारु बीज / विधारेकेबीज)	Argyreia nervosa seed	Equal part
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	Equal part
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury — for Kajjali with Gandhaka	Equal part
Ardraka Svaras (आर्द्रकस्वरस)	Fresh Ginger juice — for Bhavana	As required
Sheetal Jala (शीतल जल)	Cold water — Anupana	As required
preparation: 1. First make Kajjali from Shu. Parada and Shu. Gandhaka in a mortar.\n2. Then add all other seed powders (Trailokya Vijaya Bija, Unmatta/Datura Bija, Kantakari Bija, Ela Bija, Vriddhadaru Bija) — all in equal parts — to the Kajjali and triturate together.\n3. Give Bhavana with Ardraka Svaras (fresh ginger juice). Triturate until well incorporated. Form pills of Kalaya (pea) size. Store in a glass vessel.
anupana: Sheetal Jala (cold water) with Pathya diet
shloka:
त्रैलोक्यविजयावीजं बीजमुन्मत्तकस्य च ।
कण्टकारीबीजकञ्च ऐज्जलं बीजमेव च ॥ १ ॥
बीजञ्च वृद्धदारस्य समौ गन्धकपारदौ ।
आर्द्रकैर्वटिका कार्या कलायपरिमाणतः ॥ २ ॥
घ्घा तोयानुपानेन प्रातः खाद्या हिताशिना ।
चिरजं सर्वजञ्चैव शिरोरोगं सुदारुणम् ॥ ३ ॥
आमवातं श्लेष्मरोगं मन्यास्तम्भं गलग्रहम् ।
ग्रहणीं श्लीपदं हन्ति ह्यन्त्रवृद्धिं भगन्दरम् ।। ४ ।।
कामलां शोथपाण्डुत्वं पीनसार्शोगुदामयान् ।
वासुदेवेन कथिता वटिका रसचन्द्रिका ॥ ५ ॥

name: Shirovajra Ras
benefits: All types of Shiro Roga — Vataja, Pittaja, Kaphaja, Sannipataja
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारा)	Purified Mercury	1 Pala
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	1 Pala
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron 	1 Pala
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper 	1 Pala
Guggulu (गुग्गुलु)	Commiphora mukul resin	4 Pala
Trifala Churna (त्रिफलाका चूर्ण)	Trifala powder (Haritaki + Bibhitaki + Amalaki)	2 Pala
Mulethi / Yashtimadhu (मुलेठी)	Glycyrrhiza glabra (licorice)	1 Tola
Pippali (पिप्पली)	Long Pepper (Piper longum)	1 Tola
Sonth (सोंठ)	Dry Ginger (Zingiber officinale)	1 Tola
Gokshura (गोखरू)	Tribulus terrestris	1 Tola
Vayavidanga (वायविडंग)	Embelia ribes	1 Tola
Dashamool (दशमूल)	Ten-roots compound	1 Tola
Dashamool Kwath (दशमूलके रस)	Ten-roots decoction — for Bhavana	As required
Ghrita (घी)	Ghee — for tablet forming	As required
preparation: 74.	Prepare Kajjali from Shu. Parada and Shu. Gandhaka (1 Pala each). Add Loha Bhasma and Tamra Bhasma (1 Pala each).\n75.	Add Guggulu (4 Pala), Trifala churna (2 Pala) and all herbal powders (1 Tola each). Mix all together.\n76.	Give Bhavana with Dashamool (ten roots) decoction. Form tablets of 1 Masha each with Ghee. Dry in shade. This is Shirovajra Ras.
anupana: Goat's milk (Chhagi Dugdha), Honey or Milk
shloka:
पलं सूतं पलं गन्धः पलं लौहं पलं रवेः ।
गुग्गुलोः पलचत्वारि तदर्द्ध त्रिफलारजः ।॥ ६ ॥
यष्टीमधु कणा शुण्ठी गोक्षुरं क्रिमिनाशनम् ।
तोलक दशमूलञ्च प्रत्यकं परिकल्पयेत् ॥ ७ ॥
क्वाथेन दशमूल्याश्च यथास्वं परिभावयेत् ।
घृतयोगेन कर्त्तव्या मा पैकप्रमिता वटी ॥ ८ ॥
छागीदुग्धेन वा सेव्या मधुना पयसाऽथवा ।
वातिकों पैत्तिकीश्चैव श्लैष्मिकी सान्निपातिकीम् ॥ ६ ॥
शिरोऽतिं नाशयत्याशु वज्रमुक्तमिवासुरम् ।
शिरोवज्ररसो नाम चन्द्रनाथेन भाषितः ॥ १० ॥

name: Triyushanadi Gutika
benefits: Treats significantlys: Mukha Roga (oral/mouth diseases), Shiro Roga (head diseases/headaches), Bhrama (vertigo/giddiness), Patal (corneal opacity), Timira (dim vision/cataract), Pithaka (pimples/skin eruptions), Shukra Roga (white oral lesions), Arbuda (tumours/growths) and Palita Roga (premature greying of hair). It is also Pishttahara (removes white lesions), Mukha-Kamakara (enhances attractiveness of face/mouth) and increases Kamashakti (sexual vigour).
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Sonth (सोंठ)	Dry Ginger	1 Karsha each
Mirch (मिर्च)	Black Pepper	1 Karsha
Peepal / Pippali (पीपल)	Long Pepper	1 Karsha
Atees / Ativisha (अतीस)	Aconitum heterophyllum	1 Karsha
Javakhar (जवाखार)	Potassium carbonate	1 Karsha
Sajji-khar (सजी-खार)	Sodium carbonate	1 Karsha
Harad / Haritaki (हरड़)	Terminalia chebula	1 Karsha
Baheda / Bibhitaki (बहेड़ा)	Terminalia bellirica	1 Karsha
Amla / Amalaki (आमला)	Phyllanthus emblica	1 Karsha
Nisoth / Trivrit (निसोत)	Ipomoea turpethum	1 Karsha
Danti-mool (दन्तीमूल)	Baliospermum montanum root	1 Karsha
Vasa / Adusa (वासा)	Adhatoda vasica	1 Karsha
Lodhra (लोध)	Symplocos racemosa	1 Karsha
Tagar (तगर)	Valeriana wallichii	1 Karsha
Chandana (चन्दन)	Sandalwood (Santalum album)	1 Karsha
Gajpeepal (गजपील)	Scindapsus officinalis	1 Karsha
Sugandha-bala (सुगन्धबाला)	Pavonia odorata	1 Karsha
Giloy / Guduchi (गिलोय)	Tinospora cordifolia	1 Karsha
Piplaamool (पीपलामूल)	Piper longum root	1 Karsha
Pokharmool (पोखरमूल)	Inula racemosa root	1 Karsha
Motha (मोथा)	Cyperus rotundus	1 Karsha
Kutaki (कुटकी)	Picrorhiza kurroa	1 Karsha
Kavaphala (काबफल)	Randia dumetorum	1 Karsha
Indrajou (इन्द्रजौ)	Holarrhena antidysenterica seed	1 Karsha
Dalchini (दालचीनी)	Cinnamomum zeylanicum (cinnamon)	1 Karsha
Tejpat (तेजपात)	Cinnamomum tamala (Indian bay leaf)	1 Karsha
Nagarmotha (नागरमोथा)	Cyperus scariosus	1 Karsha
Neelkamal (नीलकमल)	Nymphaea caerulea (blue lotus)	1 Karsha
Kachchi-mooli (कच्ची-मूली)	Fresh radish (Raphanus sativus)	1 Karsha
Shu. Haritala (शु. हरताल)	Purified Orpiment (Arsenic trisulphide)	1 Karsha
Jayaphala (जायफल)	Nutmeg (Myristica fragrans)	1 Karsha
Shilajatu (शिलाजतु)	Purified Asphaltum / Shilajit	8 Pala
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron 	8 Pala
Bansalochana (बंसलोचन)	Bambusa arundinacea (bamboo) silica/tabasheer	2 Karsha
preparation:
77.	Take all 31 herbal/mineral ingredients in specified quantities andperform Mardana procedure each to fine powder.
78.	Combine all powders together with Shilajatu (8 Pala), Loha Bhasma (8 Pala) and Bansalochana (2 Karsha).
79.	Grind all together with water (Pani) in a mortar until homogeneous. Form tablets (Goli). Dry in shade. This is Triyushanadi Gutika.
80.	For Kamashakti (sexual vigour) enhancement, take with milk.
reference: Bharat Bhaishajya Ratnakar, part-2, verse 2784, page no 406
shloka:
त्रीणि कट्टनि तथातिविषाणि
क्षारयुतौ त्रिफला त्रिवृतानि ।
दन्ती निवासकलोधनतानि
चन्दनवारिभकणामृतकानि ।।
ग्रन्थिकपुष्करमूलघनस्य
तिक्तककट्फलकेन्द्रयवस्य ।
त्वग्दलमेघनीलोत्पलकस्य
बालमूलालसजातिफलस्य ।।
द्रव्यमिदं पिचुमात्रक्रमेण
चाष्टपलानि तथायसकस्य ।
अष्टपलन्तु शिलाजतुकस्य
शुभया कृतं द्वयक्षसमम् ।।
शुभवासरखादन् कालशुभम्
मुखदारुणरोगशिरोव्यथनम् ।
इन्ति भ्रमं पटलं तिमिरश्च
पिष्टकशुक्रमथार्बुदकञ्च ।।
पलितहरं सुखकामकामकरं
युवतीरमणे पित्र दुग्धसमम् ।।

name: Abhrakadi Vati
benefits: Suryavarta (migraine/sun-related headache) and Shiro Roga
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Abhraka-jirna Parada / Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकजीर्णपारद / अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica-saturated mercury or Mica	Equal part
Parada Bhasma / Rasa Sindura (पारदभस्म = रससिन्दूर)	Processed Mercury / Red Mercuric Sulphide	Equal part
Snuhi Ksheera (स्नुहीक्षीर)	Euphorbia neriifolia (Sehund) latex/milk	Equal part
Kanta Loha Bhasma (कान्तलोहभस्म)	Incinerated Magnetic iron (magnetite) 	Equal part
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper 	Equal part
preparation: 81.	Take all five ingredients in equal parts.perform Mardana procedure all together in a mortar with water (Jala) until homogeneous.\n82.	Form tablets of 125 mg each. Dry in shade and store in a glass vessel. This is Abhrakadi Vati.
shloka: अभ्रजीर्णस्सस्तीक्ष्णं स्नुहीक्षीरं सुरायसम् । शुल्बं च सूर्यावर्तादीञ्छिरोरोगान्निवर्तयेत् ।।८८।।

name: Gaganmukh Ras
benefits: Suryavarta — Mastakashool Bheda (migraine/piercing headache)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Abhraka Grasa Parada (अभ्रक ग्रास युक्त पारद)	Mercury saturated with Mica (Abhraka-processed mercury)	Equal part
Teekshna Loha Bhasma (तीक्षण लोहभस्म)	Teekshna (sharp) Incinerated Iron 	Equal part
Kanta Loha Bhasma (कान्त लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Magnetic iron (magnetite) 	Equal part
Snuhi Ksheera (स्नुही / सेंड-थूहर दूध)	Euphorbia neriifolia (Sehund) latex/milk — forperform Mardana procedureing	As required
preparation: 83.	Take Abhraka Grasa Parada, Teekshna Loha Bhasma and Kanta Loha Bhasma in equal parts.\n84.	Grind all together in Snuhi (Sehund cactus) milk (Bhanda milk) until homogeneous. Dry and store safely. This is Gaganmukh Ras.
reference: Bharat Bhaishajya Ratnakar, part-2, verse 1489, page no 83
shloka:
गगनं स्याद्रसे जीर्ण तीक्ष्णं शुल्वं सुरायसम् ।
वज्रामयरसे घृष्टं मूर्यावर्त्तविनाशनम् ॥२०५

name: Suryoday Ras
benefits: Sarva-moordhagadaapaha (treats significantly of all head diseases)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Parada Bhasma (पारद-भस्म)	Incinerated Mercury 	Equal part (1 part)
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica  	Equal part (1 part)
Teekshna Loha Bhasma (तीक्षण लोह-भस्म)	Teekshna (sharp) Incinerated Iron 	Equal part (1 part)
Shu. Gandhaka (शुद्ध गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	Equal part (1 part)
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्र-भस्म)	Incinerated Copper 	Equal part (1 part)
Snuhi Ksheera (स्नुही / सेंड-थूहर दूध)	Euphorbia neriifolia (Sehund cactus) milk — for 1-day trituration	As required
Madhu (शहद)	Honey — for administration (in Loha Patra)	As required
preparation: 85.	Take all five Bhasma/mineral ingredients in equal parts. Mix together thoroughly.\n86.	Grind all together in Snuhi (Sehund cactus) milk for 1 day. Dry and store safely. This is Suryoday Ras.
reference: Bharat Bhaishajya Ratnakar, part-2, verse 2784, page no 406
shloka:
मृतसूताभ्रक तीक्ष्णं गन्धं ताम्रं मृतं समम् ।
स्नुही क्षीरैर्दिनं मद्ये भक्षयेन्माषमात्रकम् ।।
मधुना मर्दितं भक्षेल्लोहपात्रे दिने दिने ।
सप्ताहात्सूर्यावर्तादीञ्छिरोरोगान्निवर्त्तयेत् ॥
सूर्योदय रसो नाम्ना सर्वमूर्द्धगदापहः ॥

name: Shwasahara Vataka
benefits: Kasa (cough) and Shwas (asthma/breathing disorders)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	50 gm (1 Pala)
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	50 gm (1 Pala)
Shunthi Churna (शुण्ठीचूर्ण)	Dry Ginger powder (part of Trikatu)	50 gm
Pippali Churna (पिप्पलीचूर्ण)	Long Pepper powder (part of Trikatu)	50 gm
Maricha Churna (मरिचचूर्ण)	Black Pepper powder (part of Trikatu)	50 gm
Vanga Bhasma (वङ्गभस्म)	Incinerated Tin 	50 gm (1 Pala)
Gomutra (गोमूत्र)	Cow's urine — for 3-day secondary trituration	As required
Vasa Patra Svaras (वासापत्रस्वरस)	Adhatoda vasica leaf juice — Anupana	As required
Madhu (मधु)	Honey — Anupana	As required
preparation:
1. In a stone mortar, firmly triturate Parada and Gandhaka together to form good Kajjali.
2. Then add all other substances (Shunthi Churna, Maricha Churna, Pippali Churna, Vanga Bhasma) and triturate all together for 3 days.
3. Then add Gomutra (cow's urine) and triturate for another 3 days.
4. Classical pill size: 12 gm (Aksha/1 Karsha); modern preparation: 375 mg pills. Dry in shade and store in a glass vessel.
anupana: Vasa Patra Svaras (Adhatoda vasica leaf juice) with Madhu (honey)

shloka:
साधारणन्तु वटकं वक्ष्यामि शृणु तत्त्वतः । पारदं गन्धकञ्चैव पलमेकं पृथक् पृथक् ।।५४।।
पलत्रयं त्रिकटुकं वङ्गमेकपलं क्षिपेत् । सर्वमेकत्र संयोज्य दिनानि त्रीणि मर्दयेत् ।।५५।।
मूत्रेण च तथा त्रीणि दिनानि परिमर्दयेत् । अक्षप्रमाणवटकं छायाशुष्कन्तु कारयेत् ।। ५६ ।।
नित्यमेकन्तु वटकं दिनानि त्रिंशदेव च । श्वासकासज्वरहरमग्निमान्द्यारुचिप्रणुत् ।।५७।।

name: Hikkanaashana Ras
benefits: Hikka (hiccups), Vaiswarya (hoarseness), Kasa (cough)
ingredients:
Metals/minerals in progressively increasing proportions (total 21 parts); then 13 herb powders each 1 part equal to each other:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	1 part
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	2 parts
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica (Dhanyaabhra)	3 parts
Shu. Haritala (शु. हरताल)	Purified Orpiment (Arsenic trisulphide)	4 parts
Svarna Makshika Bhasma (स्वर्णमाक्षिकभस्म)	Incinerated Chalcopyrite/Iron Pyrite 	5 parts
Shu. Manaahshila (शु. मन:शिला)	Purified Realgar (Arsenic disulphide)	6 parts
Vacha Churna (वचचूर्ण)	Acorus calamus powder	1 part each
Kushtha Churna (कूठचूर्ण)	Saussurea lappa powder	1 part each
Haridra Churna (हल्दीचूर्ण)	Curcuma longa (turmeric) powder	1 part each
Yavakshara (यवक्षार)	Barley alkali (Incinerated Hordeum vulgare )	1 part each
Chitraka Churna (चित्रकचूर्ण)	Plumbago zeylanica powder	1 part each
Patha Churna (पाठाचूर्ण)	Cissampelos pareira powder	1 part each
Kilahara / Langali Churna (किलहारी / लांगलीचूर्ण)	Gloriosa superba powder	1 part each
Trikatu Churna (त्रिकटुचूर्ण)	Shunthi+Maricha+Pippali combined	1 part each
Saindhava Lavana (सैन्धवचूर्ण)	Rock salt powder	1 part each
Shu. Vatsanabha Churna (शु. वत्सनाभचूर्ण)	Purified Aconitum ferox powder	1 part each
Baheda Tvak Churna (बहेड़ात्वकचूर्ण)	Terminalia bellirica bark powder	1 part each
preparation:
1. In a stone mortar, firmly triturate Parada + Gandhaka to form good Kajjali.
2. Then add Haritala and Manaahshila to the Kajjali and triturate well.
3. Then add all Bhasmas (Abhraka Bhasma, Svarna Makshika Bhasma) and mix thoroughly.
4. Triturate all 13 herbal powders (Vacha, Kushtha, Haridra, Yavakshara, Chitraka, Patha, Kilahara/Langali, Trikatu, Saindhava, Shu. Vatsanabha, Baheda Tvak) into the mineral Kajjali.
5. Give 7 Bhavanas with Bhringaraja Svaras (Eclipta alba/Bhringraj juice).
6. Form 500 mg pills, dry in shade, and store in a glass vessel.

shloka:
रसगन्धकधान्याभ्रतालताप्योपलं क्रमात् । भागवृद्धं वचाकुष्ठहरिद्राक्षारचित्रकैः ।।६८।।
सपाठालाङ्गलीव्योषसैन्धवाक्षविषैः समम् । भावितं भृङ्गनीरेण हिक्कावैस्वर्य्यकासनुत् ।। ६९ ।।

name: Saugandhika Yoga
benefits: Shwas Roga (asthma/breathing disorders) and Kapha Roga
ingredients:
Take equal parts:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Gandhaka Churna (शु. गन्धकचूर्ण)	Purified Sulphur powder	Equal part (1 gm per dose)
Maricha Churna (मरिचचूर्ण)	Black Pepper powder	Equal part (1 gm per dose)
preparation:
1. Take Shu. Gandhaka Churna and Maricha Churna in equal parts.
2. Triturate together in a mortar and store in a glass vessel. This is called "Saugandhika Yoga".

shloka: गन्धक मरिचं साज्यं पिबेच्छ्वासकफापहम् ।।५१।।

name: Suryavarta Ras — for Shwas Roga
benefits: Shwas Roga (asthma/breathing disorders)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	1 part
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	1.5 parts
Shu. Tamra Patra (शु. ताम्रपत्र)	Purified Copper foil sheets — the medium for processing	1.5 parts
preparation:
1. In a stone mortar, triturate Shu. Parada and Shu. Gandhaka for 2–3 days to form good Kajjali.
2. Then give Bhavana with Ghrita Kumari Svaras (Aloe vera juice) and triturate this Kajjali for 1 Yama (3 hours) until well incorporated.
3. Apply the Kajjali paste onto Tamra Patra (copper foil) on both sides evenly. Place the Kajjali-coated copper foil in a Sharava vessel. Seal the Sharava with Kapadi Mitti (clay).
4. Fill the remaining space in the vessel/pot with sand (Baluka). Cook on a stove/fire for 1 full day (Handa Yantra/sand bath method).
5. Next day when Svangasheetal, open the Samputa, remove the medicine, perform Mardana procedure in mortar, and store in a glass vessel.

shloka:
सूतार्धं गन्धकं मर्छ यामैकं कन्यकाद्रवैः । द्वयोः समं ताम्रपत्रं पूर्वकल्केन लेपयेत् ।।४९।।
दिनैकं हण्डिकायन्त्रे पक्वमादाय चूर्णयेत् । सूर्यावर्त्तरसो ह्येष द्विगुञ्जः श्वासजिद् भवेत् ।। ५० ।।

name: Shwasantaka Ras
benefits: Kasa (cough), Shwas (asthma), Gulma, Shoola, Jathara, Pandu (anaemia)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	160 gm (16 parts)
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper — equal to Parada	160 gm
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur — half of Parada	80 gm
Saindhava Lavana Churna (सैन्धवलवणचूर्ण)	Rock salt powder — equal to Gandhaka	80 gm
Pippali Churna (पिप्पलीचूर्ण)	Long Pepper powder	60 gm (6 parts)
preparation:
1. In a stone mortar, firmly triturate Parada + Gandhaka to form good Kajjali.
2. Then add Tamra Bhasma and triturate for 1 day.
3. Then add Saindhava Lavana Churna and Pippali Churna and mix well.
4. Give Bhavana with Jambira Nimbu Svaras (lemon juice) and form a large ball. Dry thoroughly.
5. Place in Sharava Samputa sealed with clay and fire in Baluka Yantra (sand bath) for 1 full day.
6. When Svangasheetal, open the Samputa and remove the medicine.
7. Perform Mardana procedure in mortar, filter through cloth, and store in a glass vessel.

shloka:
सूतः षोडश तत्समो दिनकरस्तस्यार्द्धभागो बलिः सिन्धुस्तस्य समः सुसूक्ष्ममृदितः षट् पिप्पलीचूर्णितः ।
जम्बीरस्वरसेन मर्दितमिदं तप्तं सुपक्वं भवेत् कासश्वासकगुल्मशूलजठरं पाण्डुं लिहन्नाशयेत् ।।५३।।

name: Shiladi Churna
benefits: Shwasa (asthma), Kasa (cough), Kapha Roga
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Manashila (शु. मन:शिला)	Purified Realgar (Arsenic disulphide)	Equal part
Ghritabhrijita Heeng (घृतभर्जित हींग)	Asafoetida fried in ghee	Equal part
Vidanga Churna (विडङ्गचूर्ण)	Embelia ribes powder	Equal part
Mirch Churna (मिरचचूर्ण)	Black Pepper powder	Equal part
Kooth Churna (कूठचूर्ण)	Saussurea lappa (Costus root) powder	Equal part
Sendha Lavan Churna (सैन्धवलवणचूर्ण)	Rock Salt powder	Equal part
preparation:
1.	Take all six ingredients in equal parts.perform Mardana procedure  all together in a mortar to fine powder.
2.	Collect in a glass vessel. This is Shiladi Churna.

shloka: शिला हिंगु विडङ्गं च मरिचं कुष्ठसैन्धवम् । मध्वाज्याभ्यां लिहेत्कर्ष श्वासकासकफापहम् ।। ५२।।

name: Kajjali Yog
benefits: Hikka Roga (Hiccough)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper 	Equal part
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	Equal part
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	Equal part
preparation:
1.	In a clean stone mortar, firmly triturate Shu. Parada and Shu. Gandhaka together until smooth black Kajjali is formed.
2.	Add Tamra Bhasma and triturate for one Prahar (approx. 3 hours). Collect in a glass vessel. This is Kajjali Yog.

shloka: पक्वताम्रे रसः पिष्टो बलिना हिध्मिनां हितः ।।७०।।

name: Neelkanth Ras
benefits: Kasa (cough), Shwasa (asthma)
ingredients:
Ingredients (1 part each; Guda = double total)
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	1 part
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper 	1 part
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron 	1 part
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	1 part
Shu. Vatsanabha Churna (शु. वत्सनाभचूर्ण)	Purified Aconitum ferox (aconite) powder	1 part
Shunthi Churna (शुण्ठीचूर्ण)	Dry Ginger powder	1 part
Pippali Churna (पिप्पलीचूर्ण)	Long Pepper powder	1 part
Mirch Churna (मिरचचूर्ण)	Black Pepper powder	1 part
Haritaki Churna (हरीतकीचूर्ण)	Terminalia chebula powder	1 part
Bibhitaka Churna (बिंभीतकचूर्ण)	Terminalia bellirica powder	1 part
Amalaki Churna (आमलकीचूर्ण)	Phyllanthus emblica powder	1 part
Chhoti Elaichi Churna (छोटीइलायचीचूर्ण)	Small Cardamom powder	1 part
Dalchini Churna (दालचीनीचूर्ण)	Cinnamomum zeylanicum (cinnamon) powder	1 part
Tejpat Churna (तेजपातचूर्ण)	Cinnamomum tamala (bay leaf) powder	1 part
Renuka Beej Churna (रेणुकाबीजचूर्ण)	Vitex agnus-castus seeds powder	1 part
Nagarmotha Churna (नागरमोथाचूर्ण)	Cyperus scariosus powder	1 part
Gandira Durva (गण्डीर दूर्वा)	Cynodon dactylon (couch grass)	1 part
Nagakeshar Churna (नागकेशरचूर्ण)	Mesua ferrea (cobra's saffron) powder	1 part
Chitrakmool Churna (चित्रकमूलचूर्ण)	Plumbago zeylanica root powder	1 part
Guda / Old Jaggery (गुड़)	Old Jaggery — double the total weight	38 parts (double of total 19)
preparation:
1.	Prepare Kajjali from Shu. Parada and Shu. Gandhaka in a clean stone mortar. Add all other fine powders to the Kajjali and triturate together.
2.	Prepare a firm Chasni (syrup/candy) from old Guda (jaggery) — using double the total powder weight (38 parts Guda for 19 parts powder).
3.	Mix the combined powder into the Guda Chasni and form tablets of 6 grams each (Kola/jujube-seed size). Note: if Guda is added directly without making Chasni, tablets will melt. Collect in glass vessel. This is Neelkanth Ras.

shloka:
सूतं शुल्बं सुलोहं बलिममृतयुतं त्रित्रिकं रेणुकाब्दं गण्डीरं केसराग्निं द्विगुणगुडयुतं मर्दयित्वा समस्तम् ।
कुर्यात्कोलास्थिमात्रान् सुरुचिरवटकान् भक्षयेत्प्राग्दिनादौ पथ्याशीसर्वरोगान् हरति च नितरां नीलकण्ठाऽभिधानः ।। ६१।।

name: Surya Ras
benefits: Kasa (cough), Shwasa (asthma)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	Equal part (1 part)
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	Equal part (1 part)
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper 	Equal part (1 part)
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica	Equal part (1 part)
Peepar / Pippali Churna (पीपरचूर्ण)	Long Pepper powder	Equal part (1 part)
Shunthi Churna (शुण्ठीचूर्ण)	Dry Ginger powder	Equal part (1 part)
Mirch Churna (मिरचचूर्ण)	Black Pepper powder	Equal part (1 part)
Bibhitaka Churna (बिभीतकचूर्ण)	Terminalia bellirica powder	Equal part (1 part)
Shu. Vatsanabha Churna (शु. वत्सनाभचूर्ण)	Purified Aconitum ferox powder	Equal part (1 part)
preparation:
1.	In a clean stone mortar, firmly triturate Shu. Parada and Shu. Gandhaka until good Kajjali is formed.
2.	Add Tamra Bhasma and Abhraka Bhasma to the Kajjali and triturate well.
3.	Add all five fine powders (Pippali, Shunthi, Mirch, Bibhitaka, Vatsanabha) successively and triturate well. Collect in glass. This is Surya Ras.

shloka: रसगन्धकताम्राभ्रं कणाशुण्ठ्यूषणं समम् । भूतमेकं विषं चैकं सूर्यः कासादिनाशनः ।।६५।।

name: Shwaskasari Keshari Ras
benefits: Kasa (cough), Shwasa (asthma)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Rajata Bhasma (रजतभस्म)	Incinerated Silver 	Equal part (1 part)
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper 	Equal part (1 part)
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	Equal part (1 part)
Shu. Manashila (शु. मन:शिला)	Purified Realgar (Arsenic disulphide)	Equal part (1 part)
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur — first quantity	Equal part (1 part)
Shu. Haritala (शु. हरताल)	Purified Orpiment (Arsenic trisulphide)	Equal part (1 part)
Trikatu Kwath (त्रिकटु काथ)	Trikatu decoction — 7 Bhavanas post-Puta	As required
preparation:
1.	Prepare Kajjali from Shu. Parada and Shu. Gandhaka. Add Shu. Manashila and Shu. Haritala and make combined Kajjali. Add Rajata Bhasma and Tamra Bhasma. Triturate all together.
2.	Give 3-hour Bhavanas separately with: Vasa Patra Svaras, Tulasi Svaras and Ardraka Svaras (one each).
3.	Form a large ball. Dry well. Wrap in Mrittanya (clay). Fire in Bhudhara Puta (earth pit fire) for 2 Yama (6 hours).
4.	When cooled, open and remove medicine.perform Mardana procedure  in mortar. Add equal quantity of Shu. Gandhaka again.
5.	Give 7–7 Bhavanas with Vasa Patra Svaras and Trikatu Kwath. Form tablets of 375 mg each. Dry in shade and store in glass. This is Shwaskasari Keshari Ras.

shloka:
तारताम्ररसपिष्टिका शिला गन्धतालसमभागिकं रसैः । आटरूषसुरसार्द्रसम्भवैर्मर्दनं प्रकुरु गोलकं ततः ।।६२।।
मृत्स्नया च परिवेष्ट्य गोलकं यामयुग्ममथ भूधरे पचेत् । गन्धकेन कुरु तत्समं ततश्चाऽऽटरूषकटुकैर्विभावयेत् ।। ६३ ।।
श्वासकासकरिकेसरीरसो वल्लमस्य परिसेवयेद्बुधः ।।६४।।

name: Garbhachintamani Ras
benefits: Garbhini Roga (pregnancy disorders) and Sarva Roga (general diseases)
ingredients:
Take equal parts of all the following:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Jatiphala Churna (जायफलचूर्ण)	Myristica fragrans (Nutmeg) powder	Equal part
Shu. Tankana Churna (शु. टङ्कणचूर्ण / भुना सोहागा)	Purified Borax (roasted) powder	Equal part
Trikatu Churna / Vyosha (त्रिकटुचूर्ण / व्योष)	Shunthi+Maricha+Pippali combined	Equal part
Shu. Gandhaka Churna (शु. गन्धकचूर्ण)	Purified Sulphur powder	Equal part
Shu. Hingula / Shu. Singirif (शु. हिंगुल / शु. सिंगरिफ)	Purified Cinnabar (Mercuric Sulphide)	Equal part
preparation:
1. Take all five substances (Jatiphala Churna, Shu. Tankana Churna, Trikatu/Vyosha, Shu. Gandhaka, Shu. Hingula) in equal parts.
2. Combine in a mortar and triturate together for 2 Prahar (approximately 6 hours).
3. Add Jambira Nimbu Svaras (lemon juice) gradually and form pills of 2 Gunja (250 mg).
4. Dry in shade and store in a glass vessel.
anupana: Ardraka Svaras (ginger juice) with Ushna Jala (warm water)

shloka:
जाती फलं टङ्गणञ्च व्योषं दैत्येन्द्ररक्तकम् ।
तच्चूर्ण समभागेन मर्दितं प्रहरद्वयम् ॥ १६ ॥
जम्बीररसयोगेन वटीं कुर्य्याद्विचक्षणः ।
गुञ्जाद्वयप्रमाणान्तु खलु वैद्यः प्रयत्नतः ।। १७ ॥
आर्द्रकस्य रसेनैव भक्षयेदुष्णवारिणा ।
निहन्ति सर्वरोगञ्च भास्करस्तिमिरं यथा ॥ १८ ॥

name: Garbhavinoda Ras
benefits: Garbhini Roga (diseases of pregnant women)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Trikatu Churna (त्रिकटुचूर्ण)	Shunthi+Maricha+Pippali combined powder	3 Karsha (36 gm)
Shu. Hingula (शु. हिंगुल / शु. सिंगरिफ)	Purified Cinnabar (Mercuric Sulphide)	4 Karsha (48 gm)
Jatikoshha Churna / Javitri (जाविश्री / जातीकोशचूर्ण)	Mace (Myristica fragrans aril) powder	3 Karsha (36 gm)
Lavanga Churna (लवंगचूर्ण)	Clove powder	3 Karsha (36 gm)
Svarna Makshika Bhasma (स्वर्णमाक्षिकभस्म)	Incinerated Chalcopyrite/Iron Pyrite 	Half Pala (23 gm)
preparation:
1.	Take Trikatu Churna 3 Karsha, Shu.
2.	Hingula 4 Karsha, Javitri (Jatikoshha) Churna 3 Karsha, Lavanga Churna 3 Karsha, and Svarna Makshika Bhasma half Pala.
3.	Combine all in a mortar and triturate well with water until thoroughly incorporated.
4.	Form pills of Chana (chickpea/Bengal gram) size.
5.	Dry in shade and store in a glass vessel.

shloka:
देयं त्रिभागं त्रिकटु चतुर्भागञ्च हिङ्गलम् ।
जाती कोषं लवङ्गञ्च प्रत्येकञ्च त्रिकार्षिकम् ॥ २६ ॥
सुवर्णमाक्षिकस्यापि पलाद्ध प्रक्षिपेद् बुधः ।
जलेन मर्दयित्वाऽथ चणमात्रा वटी कृता ।
निहन्ति गर्भिणीरोगं भास्करस्तिमिरं यथा ॥ २७ ॥

name: Sutika Vinoda Ras
benefits: Garbhini Shoola, Vishtambha, Jwara, Ajeerna (pregnancy complications)
ingredients:
Take equal parts:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	Equal part
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	Equal part
Shu. Tuttha (शु. तुत्थ)	Purified Copper Sulphate	Equal part
Trikatu Kwatha (त्रिकटुक्वाथ)	Shunthi+Maricha+Pippali decoction — 3 Bhavanas	As required
preparation:
1. Take Shu. Parada, Shu. Gandhaka, and Shu. Tuttha in equal parts. First make Kajjali from Parada and Gandhaka in a clean stone mortar.
2. Then add Shu. Tuttha and triturate all together with Jambira Nimbu Svaras (lemon juice) for 3 full days.
3. After that, give 3 Bhavanas with Trikatu Kwatha (decoction of Shunthi+Maricha+Pippali).
4. When well incorporated, form pills of 4 Ratti (500 mg) each. Dry in shade and store in a glass vessel.

shloka:
रसगन्धकतुत्थञ्च त्र्यहं जम्बीरमर्दितम्।
गर्भिण्याः शूलविष्टम्भज्वराजीर्णेषु योजयेत् ॥ ४ ॥

name: Sutikari Ras
benefits: Sutika Roga (post-partum disorders), Jwara, Trisha, Aruchi, Shwasa, Shotha
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	1 part
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	1 part
Krishna Abhraka Bhasma (कृष्णाभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Black Mica  	1 part
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper  	Half part
preparation:
1. First make good Kajjali from Shu. Parada and Shu. Gandhaka (1 part each) in a clean stone mortar.
2. Add Krishna Abhraka Bhasma (1 part) and Tamra Bhasma (half part).
3. Triturate all well together with Ekaparni Rasa (Centella asiatica/Mandookparni leaf juice) until well incorporated.
4. Form pills of 1 Gunja (125 mg) each. Dry in shade and store in a glass vessel.

shloka:
रसगन्धककृष्णाभ्र तदर्द्ध मृतताम्र कम् ।
चूर्णित मर्दयेद्यत्नाङ्गेकपर्णीरसेन च ॥ १ ॥
छायाशुष्का वटी कार्या गुञ्जाफलमानतः ।
क्षीरत्रिकटुना युक्ता सूतिकाऽऽतङ्कनाशिनी ॥ २ ॥
ज्वरं तृष्णारुचिश्वासं शोथं हन्ति न संशयः ॥ ३ ॥

name: Sutikaahara Ras
benefits: Sutika Roga (post-partum), Atisara (diarrhoea), Shoola (pain), Shotha, Pandu, Sarva Jwara
ingredients:
Group 1 — each 1 Pala (46 gm each); Group 2 — each 1 Karsha (12 gm each):
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Lavanga (लवंग)	Clove (Syzygium aromaticum)	1 Pala (46 gm)
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	1 Pala (46 gm)
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	1 Pala (46 gm)
Yavakshara (यवक्षार / जवाखार)	Barley alkali (potassium carbonate)	1 Pala (46 gm)
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica  	1 Pala (46 gm)
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron  	1 Pala (46 gm)
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper  	1 Pala (46 gm)
Naga / Seesa Bhasma (नाग / सीसाभस्म)	Incinerated Lead  	1 Pala (46 gm)
Jatiphala Churna (जायफलचूर्ण)	Nutmeg powder	1 Karsha (12 gm)
Bhringaraja / Kesharaja Churna (भृंगराज / केशराजचूर्ण)	Eclipta alba powder	1 Karsha (12 gm)
Ela Churna (एलाचूर्ण / भाँगरा)	Cardamom powder	1 Karsha (12 gm)
Musta Churna (मुस्ताचूर्ण / मोथा)	Cyperus rotundus powder	1 Karsha (12 gm)
Triphala Churna (त्रिफलाचूर्ण)	Haritaki+Bibhitaka+Amalaki powder	1 Karsha (12 gm)
Dhataki Phool Churna (धातकीफूलचूर्ण / धायके फूल)	Woodfordia fruticosa flower powder	1 Karsha (12 gm)
Indrayava Churna (इन्द्रजौचूर्ण)	Holarrhena antidysenterica seed powder	1 Karsha (12 gm)
Patha Churna (पाढ़चूर्ण)	Cissampelos pareira powder	1 Karsha (12 gm)
Kakada Shringi Churna (काकड़ासिंगीचूर्ण)	Pistacia integerrima (gall) powder	1 Karsha (12 gm)
Bilva Guda (बेलका गूदा)	Aegle marmelos (Bael) pulp/powder	1 Karsha (12 gm)
Balaka / Sugandhabala (सुगंधबालाचूर्ण)	Valeriana wallichii powder	1 Karsha (12 gm)
preparation:
1. First make Kajjali from Shu. Parada and Shu. Gandhaka in a stone mortar.
2. Add Abhraka Bhasma, Loha Bhasma, Tamra Bhasma, and Seesa Bhasma - 1 Pala each - to the Kajjali.
3. Also add Yavakshara and Lavanga (1 Pala each).
4. Make fine Churna of all the herb group (Jatiphala, Bhringaraja, Ela, Musta, Triphala, Dhataki Phool, Indrayava, Patha, Kakada Shringi, Bilva Guda, and Balaka - 1 Karsha each).
5. Combine all together thoroughly. Perform Mardana procedure with water to make pill mass.
6. Form pills of Bera seed (jujube pit/~500 mg) size. Dry in shade and store in a glass vessel.

shloka:
लवङ्गं रसगन्धौ च यवक्षरं तथाऽत्रकम् ।
लौहं ताम्र सीसकञ्च पलमानं समाहरेत् ॥ २८ ॥
जातीफलं केशराजं भृङ्गेला मुस्तकं वरा ।
धातकीन्द्रयवं पाठा शृङ्गी बिल्वञ्च बालकम् ॥ २९ ॥
कर्षमानञ्च सञ्चूर्ण्य सर्वमेकत्र कारयेत् ।
बद्रास्थिप्रमाणेन वटिकां कारयेद्भिषक् ।। ३० ।।
गन्धालिकापत्रर सैरनुपानं प्रदापयेत् ।
सर्वातीसारशमनः सर्वशूननिवारणः ॥ ३१ ॥
सूतिकाशोथपाण्डुत्वसर्वज्वरविनाशनः ।
सूतिकाहरनामाऽयं रसः परमदुर्लभः ॥ ३२ ॥

name: Chandrakala Rasa
benefits: Chandrakala Rasa treats significantlys: all Pittaja and Vata-Pittaja diseases; internal and external Daaha (burning sensation); great heat-fever; Bhrama (giddiness); Moorchha (fainting); excess blood-flow in weakened women; Urdhva and Adho Raktapitta (haemorrhage upward and downward); blood vomiting; and all Mootrakrichha (urinary pain/dysuria). It does not cause Agnimaandya. Especially useful in summer (Greeshma) and autumn (Sharad) seasons.
ingredients:
Ingredient
(Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	1 Tola (12g)
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper 	1 Tola (12g)
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica  	1 Tola (12g)
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	2 Tola (24g) — double
Kutki (कुटकी)	Picrorhiza kurroa powder — added to base	Equal part
Giloy Sattva / Guduchi Sattva (गिलोयका सत)	Tinospora cordifolia pure extract — added	Equal part
Khas (खस)	Vetiveria zizanioides (Khus grass root) powder	Equal part
Madhavee Lataa (माधवी लता)	Hiptage benghalensis powder	Equal part
Safed Chandan (सफेद चन्दन)	Santalum album (White sandalwood) powder	Equal part
Sariva (सारिवा)	Hemidesmus indicus (Indian sarsaparilla) powder	Equal part
Drakshaadi Kashaya (द्राक्षादिकषाय)	Drakshaadi Gana (grape + cooling herbs) decoction — 7 final Bhavanas	As required
preparation:
1. Prepare kajjali from Shu. Parada (1 Tola), Tamra Bhasma (1 Tola), Abhraka Bhasma (1 Tola) and Shu. Gandhaka (2 Tolas).
2. Give sequential 1-day Bhavanas with each juice separately: Nagarmotha, Dadima, Duurva, Ketaki Kali, Sahadevi, Ghritkumari, Pitta Papada, Ramsheetal and Shatavari.
3. Add equal parts of: Kutki, Giloy Sattva, Pitta Papada, Khas, Madhavee Lata, Safed Chandan and Sariva. Mix all together.
4. Give 7 more Bhavanas with Drakshaadi Gana decoction.
5. Form a ball, wrap in leaves (Pattas) and bury in a grain heap for 7 days. Remove, pound and form pills of Chana-matra (chickpea size). Store in glass vessel. This is Chandrakala Rasa.
anupana: Pitta Papada juice or Nilofar Sharbat (Blue lotus drink)

reference: Bharat Bhaishajya Ratnakar, part-2, verse 1884, page no 207
shloka:
प्रत्येकं तोलमादाय सूतं ताम्र तथाभ्रकम् ।
द्विगुणं गन्धकञ्चैव कृत्वा कज्जलिकां शुभाम् ।
मुस्तादाडिमर्वोत्थैः केतकीस्तनजद्रवैः ।
सहदेव्या कुमार्याश्च पर्पटस्यापि वारिणा ।।
रामशीतलिकातोयैः शतावर्यारसेन च ।
भावयित्वा प्रयत्नेन दिवसे दिवसे पृथक् ॥
तिक्ता गुडूचिकासत्वं पपटोशारमाधवा ।
श्रीखण्ड सारिवा चैषां समानं मूक्ष्मचूर्णितम् ।।
द्राक्षादिककषायेण सप्तधा परिभावयेत् ।
ततो धान्याश्रयं कृत्वा वटयः कार्याश्चणोपमाः।
अयं चन्द्रकलानाम्ना रसेन्द्रः परिकीर्त्तितः ।
सर्वपित्तगदध्वंसी वातपित्तगदापहः ।।
अन्तर्बाह्यमहादाहविध्वंसनमहाक्षमः ।
ग्रीष्मकाले शरत्काले विशेषेण प्रशस्थते ।।
कुरुते नानिमान्यं च महातापज्वरं हरेत् ।
भ्रमं मूर्छा हरत्याशु स्त्रीणां रक्तं महास्रुतिम् ॥
ऊर्ध्वाधोरक्तपित्तं च रक्तवांतिं विशेषतः ।
मूत्रकृच्छ्राणि सर्वाणि नाशयेन्नात्र संशयः ॥

benefits: Garbhini Roga (all diseases arising during pregnancy)

shloka:
त्रिभागं कटुकं देयं चतुर्भागं च हिङ्गलम् ।
जातीकोषं लवङ्गं च प्रत्येकञ्च त्रिकार्षिकम् ।।
सुवर्णमाक्षिकस्यापि पलार्ध प्रक्षिपेद्बुधः ।
जलेन मर्दयित्वाऽथ चणमात्रा वटीकृता ।।
निहन्ति गर्भिणीरोगं भास्करस्तिमिरं यथा ।।

name: Garbha Chintamani Rasa
benefits: Sannipata (all-three-Dosha combined fever) â€” especially in women; Garbhini Jvara and Daaha (fever and burning sensation in pregnant women); Pradar (leucorrhoea / abnormal vaginal discharge / menorrhagia); and Sootika Roga (post-partum / puerperal diseases).
ingredients:
Ingredient
(Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Gokshura (गोखरु)	Tribulus terrestris powder	1 Karsha (12g)
Shatavari (शतावर)	Asparagus racemosus powder	1 Karsha (12g)
Bala Moola (खरैंटी जड़)	Sida cordifolia root powder	1 Karsha (12g)
Atibaala Moola (कंधी जड़)	Abutilon indicum root powder	1 Karsha (12g)
preparation:
1. Take all ingredients in the proportions stated.perform Mardana procedure together with water in a mortar.
2. Form pills of 2 Ratti (250 mg) each. Store in glass vessel. This is Garbha Chintamani Rasa.

shloka:
रसं तारं तथा लौहं प्रत्येकं कर्षमानतः ।
कर्षत्रयं तथा चाभ्रं कर्पूरं बङ्गताम्रकम् ।।
जातीफलं तथा कोषं गोक्षुरश्च शतावरी ।
बलातिबलयोर्मूलं प्रत्येकं तोलकं शुभम् ।।
सन्निपातं निहन्त्याशु स्त्रीणाञ्चैव विशेषतः ।
गर्भिण्या ज्वरदाहश्च प्रदरं मृतिकाभयम् ।।

name: Indu Shekhara Rasa
benefits: In pregnant women (Garbhini): treats Jvara (fever), Shvasa (breathlessness), Kasa (cough), Shiro Ruja (headache), Raktaatisara (bloody diarrhoea), Grahani (IBS/malabsorption), Vomiting, Agnimandya, Aalasya and Daurbalya
ingredients:
Ingredient
(Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Shilajatu (शु. शिलाजीत)	Purified Asphaltum (Shilajit)	Equal part
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica  	Equal part
Rasasindura (रससिन्दूर)	Purified Mercuric Sulphide	Equal part
Pravala Bhasma (मूंगाभस्म)	Incinerated  Coral  	Equal part
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated  Iron  	Equal part
Svarna Maakshika Bhasma (सोनामक्खी भस्म)	Incinerated  Chalcopyrite / Iron pyrite   	Equal part
Shu. Haratala (शु. हरताल)	Purified Orpiment (Arsenic trisulphide)	Equal part
Arjuna Tvak Kaatha (अर्जुन)	Terminalia arjuna bark decoction — for Bhavana	As required
preparation:
1.perform Mardana procedure all equal parts of the 7 Bhasmas/minerals together in a mortar.
2. Give Bhavanas with each of the 7 botanical juices (Bhringaraja, Arjuna, Nirgundi, Vasa, Sthala Padma, Kamala, Kutaja bark) — as per availability and appropriateness.
3. Form pills of Kalaaya-matra (pea size). Store in glass vessel. This is Indu Shekhara Rasa.

reference: Bharat Bhaishajya Ratnakar, part-1, verse 491, page no 163
shloka:
शिलाजत्व असिन्दूरप्रबालायोरजांसि ज ।
माक्षिकञ्च तथा तालं समभागानि मर्दयेत् ॥
भृङ्गराजस्य पार्थस्य निर्गुण्डथा वासकस्य च ।
स्थलपद्मस्य पद्मस्य कुटजस्य च वारिणा ।।
भावयित्वा वटीः कृत्वा कलायपरिमाणतः ।
यथा दोषानुपानेन गर्भिणीषु प्रयोजयेत् ।।
गर्भिणीनां ज्वरं घोरं श्वासं कासं शिरोरुजम् ।
रक्तातिसारं ग्रहणीं वान्ति वद्वेश्च मन्दताम् ।।
आलस्यमपि दौर्बल्यं हन्यादेष न संशयः ।
कलेरादौ ससर्जेमं भगवानिन्दुशेखरः ॥

name: Jayasundara Rasa
benefits: Vandhyatva (Infertility); Stri Roga (Women's diseases)
ingredients:
Ingredient
(Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Ashwagandha Churna (अशगन्ध)	Withania somnifera powder — Anupana	1 Masha (1g) per dose
Gokshura Churna (गोखरु)	Tribulus terrestris powder — Anupana	1 Masha (1g) per dose
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper  — Anupana additive	1 Ratti (125 mg) per dose
preparation:
1. First prepare kajjali from Shu. Parada and Shu. Gandhaka. Add Svarna, Rajata, Tamra, Tapya Sattva and Vaikunta Bhasma.perform Mardana procedure all with Lakshmana juice and Bandhujiva flower juice.
2. Shape the mass appropriately. Fill in a Tamra Patra (copper-lidded vessel). Seal the vessel mouth with copper plate. Cover completely with Kupa Miti (clay from an earth pit). Fire in Gaja Puta (large buried-pit firing) — the cow-dung cake firing material should weigh 4 Masha to 1 Tola each, no more.
3. When completely cool, remove and powder finely. Give 7 Bhavanas with Lakshmana juice. After drying, store in a sealed Kanda (vessel). This is Jayasundara Rasa.
anupana: Ashwagandha + Gokshura Churna + Mishri + Tamra Bhasma - with honey

shloka:
सुवर्ण रजतं ताम्र ताप्यसत्वं च वैकृतम्
एकैकं निष्क्रमानेन संशुद्धं परिमारितम् ॥
एतच्चतुर्गुणं सूतं सूताद्विगुणगन्धकम् ।
मर्दयेल्लक्ष्मणातोयैर्बन्धुजीवरसैरपि ॥
काचकूप्पां तत'क्षिध्वा ताम्रपत्रं मुखे न्यसेत् ।
विलिम्पेदभितः कूपीमङ्गल. त्सेत्र । मृदा ।।
विशोष्य च पुटं द पाद् भूमौ निक्षिण कृषि ताम्
गजाख्यपुटपर्याप्त शाण कर्तमितोत्पलैः ।।
स्वाङ्गशीतं विचूर्णाथ भाव येल्लक्ष्मणाद्रवैः ।
सप्तवारं विशोष्याथ करण्डान्तर्विनिक्षिपेत् ।।
अश्वगन्धारजं युक्तस्ताम्रगोक्षुरसंयुत ।
सेवितो गुञ्जा तुश्च सिता च रसेोत्तम ।।
मासत्रयम योगेण बन्ध्या भवति पुत्रिणी ।

name: Mahavihara Ras
benefits: Jalodar (Ascites/Abdominal dropsy)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	4 parts
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	8 parts
Haldi Churna (हल्दीचूर्ण)	Turmeric powder (Curcuma longa)	2 parts
Trifala Churna (त्रिफलाचूर्ण)	Trifala powder (Haritaki + Bibhitaki + Amalaki)	2 parts
Haritaki Churna (हरीतकीचूर्ण)	Terminalia chebula powder	2 parts
Trikatu Churna (त्रिकटुचूर्ण)	Trikatu powder (Sonth + Mirch + Pippali)	8 parts
Shwetjira Churna (श्वेतजीराचूर्ण)	White cumin seed powder (Cuminum cyminum)	8 parts
Dantimool Churna (दन्तीमूलचूर्ण)	Baliospermum montanum root powder	8 parts
Chitrakamool Kwath (चित्रकमूलकाथ)	Plumbago zeylanica root decoction — 7 Bhavanas	As required
preparation:
6.	Prepare Kajjali from Shu. Parada (4 parts) and Shu. Gandhaka (8 parts). Add all herbal powders in specified parts and triturate together.
7.	Give 7 Bhavanas each — in this order: first Eranda Taila, then Jayanti Svaras, Snuhi Ksheera, Bhringaraj Svaras and Chitrakamool Kwath. (Eranda Taila must be given first — if given last, medicine will remain wet and not dry.)
8.	Collect in glass vessel. This is Mahavihara Ras. Take 375 mg with warm water (Ushna Jala).

shloka:
चतुः सूतस्य गन्धोऽष्टौ रजनी त्रिफला शिवा । प्रत्येकं च द्विभागं स्यात्त्र्यूषजीरकदन्तिकाः ।।१९।।
प्रत्येकमष्टभागं स्यादेकीकृत्य विचूर्णयेत् । जयन्तीस्नुक्पयोभृङ्गवह्निवातारितैलकैः ।। २०।।
प्रत्येकेन क्रमाद्भाव्यं सप्तवारं पृथक्पृथक् । महावह्निरसो नाम निष्कमुष्णजलैः पिबेत् ।।२१।।
विरेचनं भवेत्तेन तक्रभक्तं ससैन्धवम् । दिनान्ते भोजयेत्पथ्यं वर्जयेच्छीतलं जलम् ।।
नाभ्युत्तरे जलस्त्रावं कुर्याद्धन्ति जलोदरम् ।। २२।।

name: Mrityunjaya Ras
benefits: Mrityunjaya Rasa treats significantlys: Vata diseases, Kapha diseases, Mandagni (weak digestion), Jwara (fever), Shool (colic pain), all Maharoga (major diseases), Udara Roga (abdominal diseases), Yakrit Roga (liver), Pandu (anaemia/jaundice), Shotha (oedema), Gulma (abdominal lump), Grahani (malabsorption/IBS), Pliha (spleen), Vibandhana (constipation), Vamana (vomiting), Gulma with cough, Shwasa (asthma) and Hikka (hiccough
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Tankana-kshara Churna (टंकणक्षारचूर्ण)	Borax alkali powder	10 grams
Shunthi Churna (शुण्ठीचूर्ण)	Dry Ginger powder	10 grams
Mirch Churna (मिरचचूर्ण)	Black Pepper powder	10 grams
Pippali Churna (पिप्पलीचूर्ण)	Long Pepper powder	10 grams
Sendha Lavan Churna (सैन्धवलवणचूर्ण)	Rock Salt powder	10 grams
Samudra Lavan Churna (सामुद्रलवणचूर्ण)	Sea Salt powder	10 grams
Vida Lavan Churna (विडलवणचूर्ण)	Vida/Black salt powder	10 grams
Sauvarcha Lavan Churna (सौर्वचलवणचूर्ण)	Sauvarcha salt powder	10 grams
Sambhar Lavan Churna (साम्भरलवणचूर्ण)	Sambhar salt powder	10 grams
Sauf Churna (सौफचूर्ण)	Fennel seed (Foeniculum vulgare) powder	10 grams
preparation:
9.	Prepare good Kajjali from Shu. Parada and Shu. Gandhaka (110 grams each).
10.	Add all 11 salt/herb powders (10 grams each) to the Kajjali. Mix all together.
11.	Give Jala (water) Bhavana and triturate for 3 days. Form tablets of 625 mg (5 Ratti). Dry in shade. Store in glass. This is Mrityunjaya Ras.
anupana: Jala (water); or Chitraka churna + Ardraka juice + Sendha Lavan for Sannipatika

shloka:
द्विक्षारं त्र्यूषणं पञ्चलवणं शतपुष्पिकाम् । समभागमिदं सर्वं पटचूर्णं समाचरेत् ।।७।।
तत्समौ रसगन्धौ च कृत्वा कज्जलिकां शुभाम् । सर्वमेकत्र सम्मेल्य मर्दयेद्दिवसत्रयम् ।।८।।
अयं मृत्युञ्जयो नाम्ना रसः शीघ्रफलप्रदः । कथितो मलयार्येण सन्निपातहरः परम् ।।९।।
सन्निपाते प्रयोक्तव्यो रक्तिकापञ्चमात्रिकः । चित्रकार्द्रकसिन्धूत्थकटुभिर्वा समन्वितः ।।१०।।
पीततोयं त्रिदोषार्तं निर्वाते वासयेत्ततः । पथ्यं दध्योदनं देयं याचमानाय नान्यथा ।।
गुणो न जायते यस्य तस्य देयो रसः पुनः ।।११।।
हन्याद्वातगदं तथा कफगदं मन्दानलत्वं ज्वरं शूलं सर्वमहामयान् जठरजां पीडां यकृत्पाण्डुताम् ।।
शोफं गुल्मरुजं तथा ग्रहणिकां प्लीहामयं विड्ङ्ग्रहं वान्ति गुल्मकृतां सकासमभितः श्वासञ्च हिक्कामपि ।।१२।।

name: Surechanak Ras
benefits: Virechana, Shotha, Gulma, Jalodar, Pliha Roga
ingredients:
Ingredients
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shunthi Churna (शुण्ठीचूर्ण)	Dry Ginger powder	3 grams
Mirch Churna (मिरचचूर्ण)	Black Pepper powder	2 grams
preparation:
12.	Firmly triturate Shu. Parada and Shu. Gandhaka in a mortar to prepare good Kajjali.
13.	Add Shu. Nishthusha Jaypala, Shunthi churna, Mirch churna and Shu. Tankana. Mix all well and give Jala (water) Bhavana.
14.	Form tablets of 125 mg each. Dry well in shade. Store in glass. This is Surechanak Ras.

shloka:
अष्टौ निस्तुषदन्तिबीजमपि चेच्छुण्ठ्यास्त्रयो गन्धकात् द्वौ च द्वौ मरिचस्य टङ्कणरसं चैकैकभागं पृथक् ।
गुञ्जामात्रमिदं सुरेचनकरं देयं च शीताम्बुना शोफं गुल्मजलोदरं प्रशमयेत्प्लीहामयघ्नं परम् ।।६।।

name: Trailokasundar Ras
benefits: Vatajodara (Vata-type abdominal disease group)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	2 parts
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	2 parts
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica 	1 part
Sendha Lavan (सैन्धवलवण)	Rock Salt	1 part
Shu. Vatsanabha (शु. वत्सनाभ)	Purified Aconitum ferox	1 part
Krishna Jeera Churna (कृष्णजीरकचूर्ण)	Black Cumin powder (Nigella sativa)	1 part
Vidanga Churna (विडङ्गचूर्ण)	Embelia ribes powder	1 part
Guduchi Satva (गुडूचीसत्त्व)	Tinospora cordifolia extract	1 part
Chitrakmool Churna (चित्रकमूलचूर्ण)	Plumbago zeylanica root powder	1 part
Chhoti Elaichi Churna (छोटीइलायचीचूर्ण)	Small Cardamom powder	1 part
Yavkshara Churna (यवक्षारचूर्ण)	Barley ash/alkali powder	1 part
preparation:
15.	Prepare Kajjali from Shu. Parada and Shu. Gandhaka. Add Abhraka Bhasma and all other fine powders. Triturate together.
16.	Give Bhavana with Nirgundi Svaras for 1 day and then Bijaura Nimbu Ras for 1 day. Triturate well after each.
17.	Form tablets of 250 mg (2 Ratti) each. Dry in shade and store in glass. This is Trailokasundar Ras.

shloka:
शुद्धसूतं तथा गन्धं मृताचं सैन्धवं विषम् । कृष्णजीरं विडङ्गं च गुडूचीसत्त्वचित्रकम् ।।१४।।
एला चैव यवक्षारं प्रत्येकं स्याद्रसार्द्धकम् । दिनं निर्गुण्डिकाद्रावैर्बीजपूररसैर्बिनम् ।। १५ ।।
 मर्दयेच्छोषयेत्सोऽयं रसस्त्रैलोक्यसुन्दरः । गुञ्जाद्वयं घृतैर्लेह्यो वातोदरकुलान्तकः ।। १६ ।।

name: Jimutakadi Vati — Udaraghna Ras
benefits: Sampurna Udara Roga (all abdominal diseases)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica 	Equal part (1 part)
Loha Bhasma (लोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron 	Equal part (1 part)
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	Equal part (1 part)
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	Equal part (1 part)
Shu. Manashila (शु. मन:शिला)	Purified Realgar (Arsenic disulphide)	Equal part (1 part)
Shu. Tala / Haritala (शु. ताल)	Purified Orpiment (Arsenic trisulphide)	Equal part (1 part)
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper 	Equal part (1 part)
Trikatu Churna (त्रिकटुचूर्ण)	Trikatu powder (Sonth + Mirch + Pippali)	Equal part (1 part)
Chitraka Churna (चित्रकचूर्ण)	Plumbago zeylanica powder	Equal part (1 part)
Kooth Churna (कुठचूर्ण)	Saussurea lappa (Costus root) powder	Equal part (1 part)
Safed Musli Churna (सफदमुसलीचूर्ण)	Chlorophytum borivilianum (white musli) powder	Equal part (1 part)
Shu. Vatsanabha Churna (शु. वत्सनाभचूर्ण)	Purified Aconitum ferox powder	Equal part (1 part)
Ajwain Churna (अजवाइनचूर्ण)	Carom seed (Trachyspermum ammi) powder	Equal part (1 part)
Nimbuka-Neera (निम्बूकनीर)	Lemon/citron juice — 1-day Bhavana	As required
Madhu (मधु)	Honey — for administration	As required
preparation:
18.	Prepare Kajjali from Shu. Parada and Shu. Gandhaka. Add Shu. Manashila and Shu. Haritala and triturate for 1 more day.
19.	Add all remaining fine powders (Abhraka Bhasma, Loha Bhasma, Tamra Bhasma, Trikatu, Chitraka, Kooth, Safed Musli, Vatsanabha, Ajwain) to the Kajjali and triturate together.
20.	Give 1-day Bhavana with Nimbuka-Neera (lemon/citron juice). Form tablets of 500 mg (4 Ratti). Dry in shade and store in glass. This is Jimutakadi Vati (Udaraghna Ras).

shloka:
जीमूतलोहरसगन्धशिलालताम्रव्योषाग्निकुष्ठमुषलीविषदीप्यचूर्णम्
निम्बूकनीरलुलितं गुटिकीकृतं तत् भुक्तं निशासु मधुना सकलोदरघ्नम् ।।३।।

name: Suryaprabha Gutika
benefits: Agnimandya (digestive impairment/weak digestion)
ingredients:
Take all the following substances in equal parts (1 part each):
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Bharggi Churna (भार्गीचूर्ण)	Clerodendrum serratum powder	Equal part
Shu. Bhallataak Churna (शु. भल्लातकचूर्ण)	Purified Semecarpus anacardium (Marking Nut) powder	Equal part
Gambhari Patra Churna (गम्भारपत्रचूर्ण)	Gmelina arborea leaf powder	Equal part
Gambhari Mool Churna (गम्भारमूलचूर्ण)	Gmelina arborea root powder	Equal part
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica 	Equal part
Kadali Kanda Churna (कदलीकन्दचूर्ण)	Musa paradisiaca (Banana) rhizome powder	Equal part
Patha Churna (पाठाचूर्ण)	Cissampelos pareira powder	Equal part
Vacha Churna (वचचूर्ण)	Acorus calamus powder	Equal part
Gorochana (गोरोचन)	Bovine bile stone	Equal part
Chavya Churna (चव्यचूर्ण)	Piper cubeba powder	Equal part
Tejapata Churna (तेजपातचूर्ण)	Cinnamomum tamala (Indian bay leaf) powder	Equal part
Chitraka Mool Churna (चित्रकमूलचूर्ण)	Plumbago zeylanica root powder	Equal part
Shunthi Churna (शुण्ठीचूर्ण)	Dry Ginger powder (part of Trikatu)	Equal part
Maricha Churna (मरिचचूर्ण)	Black Pepper powder (part of Trikatu)	Equal part
Pippali Churna (पिप्पलीचूर्ण)	Long Pepper powder (part of Trikatu)	Equal part
Yavakshara Churna (यवक्षारचूर्ण)	Barley alkali powder	Equal part
Shu. Gandhaka Churna (शु. गन्धकचूर्ण)	Purified Sulphur powder	Equal part
Trayamana Churna (त्रायमाणचूर्ण)	Gentiana kurroo powder	Equal part
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury (Kajjali formed with Gandhaka)	Equal part
Nagakeshara Churna (नागकेशरचूर्ण)	Mesua ferrea flower powder	Equal part
Shu. Vatsanabha Visha Churna (शु. वत्सनाभविषचूर्ण)	Purified Aconitum ferox powder	Equal part
Shu. Vatsanabha Shweta Churna (शु. वत्सनाभश्वेतचूर्ण)	Purified White Aconite powder	Equal part
Lavanga Churna (लवंगचूर्ण)	Clove powder	Equal part
Pipara / Pippali Mool Churna (पीपरचूर्ण)	Long Pepper root powder	Equal part
Kushtha Churna (कुष्ठचूर्ण)	Saussurea lappa powder	Equal part
Shallaphala Churna (शल्लफलचूर्ण)	Shorea robusta (Sal) gum/fruit powder	Equal part
Amalaki Churna (आमलाचूर्ण)	Phyllanthus emblica (Amalaki) powder	Equal part
Bibhitaka Churna (बिभीतकचूर्ण)	Terminalia bellirica powder	Equal part
Haritaki Churna (हरीतकीचूर्ण)	Terminalia chebula powder	Equal part
Samudra Phena Churna (समुद्रफेनचूर्ण)	Cuttlefish bone powder	Equal part
Brahmi Churna (ब्राह्मीचूर्ण)	Bacopa monnieri powder	Equal part
Lata Kasturi Bija Churna (लताकस्तूरीबीजचूर्ण)	Abelmoschus moschatus seed powder	Equal part
Bilva Phala Majja (बिल्वफलमज्जा)	Aegle marmelos (Bael) pulp powder	Equal part
Ankurita Dhana Churna (अङ्कुरितधानचूर्ण)	Sprouted Dhana (grain/coriander) powder	Equal part
Saindhava Lavana (सैन्धवलवण)	Rock salt	Equal part
Samudra Lavana (सामुद्रलवण)	Sea salt	Equal part
Souvarchala Lavana (सौवर्चललवण)	Souvarchala salt	Equal part
Vida Lavana (विडलवण)	Vida/black salt	Equal part
Sambhara Lavana (साम्भरलवण)	Sambhara salt	Equal part
Chameli Phool (चमेलीफूल)	Jasminum grandiflorum flower	Equal part
Juhi Phool (जूहीफूल)	Jasminum auriculatum flower	Equal part
Malli Pushpa (मल्लीपुष्प)	Jasminum sambac (Malli jasmine) flower	Equal part
Beli/Mogra Phool (बेलीफूल/मोगरा)	Jasminum sambac Mogra variety flower	Equal part
Champa Phool (चम्पाफूल)	Michelia champaca flower	Equal part
Nagachampa Pushpa (नागचम्पापुष्प)	Mesua ferrea (Nagakeshara) flower	Equal part
Maulasari Phool (मौलसरीफूल)	Mimusops elengi (Bakul) flower	Equal part
Kadamba Phool (कदम्बफूल)	Neolamarckia cadamba flower	Equal part
preparation:
1.	First make Kajjali from Shu.
2.	Parada and Shu.
3.	Gandhaka in a stone mortar.
4.	Then add fine Churna of all other substances in equal parts into the Kajjali.
5.	Knead all together with Vatari Taila (Eranda Taila/castor oil) and form 500 mg pills.
6.	Dry in shade and store in a glass vessel.

shloka:
भाङ्गवह्निजयायुगाभ्रकदली पाठा वचा रोचना चव्यं पत्रकचित्रकं त्रिकटुकं क्षारद्वयं गन्धकम् ।
त्रायन्तीहरबीजकेसरिविषद्वन्द्वं लवङ्गं कणा कुष्ठं शल्लफलं फलत्रययुतं फेनः समुद्रादपि ।। २६ ।।
ब्राह्मी बीजं लताबीजं बालबिल्वं विरूढकम् । लवणानि तथा पञ्च जात्यादिकुसुमाष्टकम् ।। २७।।
वातारितैलेनैतेषां कल्पिता भिषजां वरैः । एषा सूर्यप्रभा नाम गुटिकाऽग्निप्रदीपनी ।। २८ ।।

name: Vaishvanara Ras
benefits: Jalodara (ascites/abdominal fluid accumulation)
ingredients:
Take all the following in equal parts (2 parts each):
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury (Kajjali with Gandhaka)	2 parts
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	2 parts
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper 	2 parts
Shu. Shilajatu (शु. शिलाजीत)	Purified Shilajit (mineral pitch) — dissolved in warm water	2 parts
Kanta Loha Bhasma (कान्तलोहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron (magnetic) 	2 parts
Trikatu Churna (त्रिकटुचूर्ण)	Shunthi+Maricha+Pippali combined powder	2 parts
Chitraka Mool Churna (चित्रकमूलचूर्ण)	Plumbago zeylanica root powder	2 parts
Kushtha Churna (कुष्ठचूर्ण)	Saussurea lappa powder	2 parts
Nirgundi Churna (निर्गुण्डीचूर्ण)	Vitex negundo powder	2 parts
Shweta Musali Churna (श्वेतमुशलीचूर्ण)	Chlorophytum borivilianum powder	2 parts
Shu. Vatsanabha Churna (शु. वत्सनाभचूर्ण)	Purified Aconitum ferox powder	2 parts
Ajamoda Churna (अजमोदाचूर्ण)	Apium graveolens (carom/ajwain family) powder	2 parts
Nimba Kwatha (निम्बक्वाथ)	Neem (Azadirachta indica) decoction — 21 Bhavanas	As required
preparation:
1.	First make Kajjali from Shu. Parada and Shu. Gandhaka in a stone mortar.
2.	Add Tamra Bhasma and the fine Churna of all other herbal substances (Trikatu, Chitraka, Kushtha, Nirgundi, Shweta Musali, Shu. Vatsanabha, Ajamoda). Dissolve Shu. Shilajatu in warm water and add it to the mixture.
3.	Mix all together and give 21 Bhavanas with Nimba Kwatha (neem decoction), followed by 7 Bhavanas with Bhringaraja Svaras (Eclipta alba juice).
4.	Finally, add a little Madhu (honey) and knead to form 500 mg pills, dry well in shade and store in a glass vessel. (This is Vaishvanara Ras).
anupana: Ushna Udaka (warm water) - taken at night

shloka:
रसगन्धकताम्राणि शिलाजित्कान्तलोहकम् । त्रिकटु चित्रकं कुष्ठं निर्गुण्डी मुसली विषम् ।। २३ ।।
अजमोदश्च सर्वेषां द्वौ द्वौ भागौ प्रकल्पयेत् । चूर्णीकृत्य ततः सर्वं निम्बक्वाथेन भावयेत् ।। २४।।
एकविंशत्प्रकारेण भृङ्गराजेन सप्तधा । मधुना गुटिकां शुष्कां रजन्या तु प्रदापयेत् ।।
वैश्वानराभिधो योगो जलोदरविशोषणः ।।२५।।

name: Vajrakshara
benefits: Agnimandya, Ajeerna, Gulma, Udara Roga, Shotha, Shoola
ingredients:
Group A — Kshara base (12 gm each); Group B — Herb Churnas (6 gm each):
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Samudra Lavana Churna (सामुद्रलवणचूर्ण)	Sea salt powder	12 gm each
Saindhava Lavana Churna (सैन्धवलवणचूर्ण)	Rock salt powder	12 gm each
Kacha Lavana Churna (काचलवणचूर्ण)	Rock crystal salt powder	12 gm each
Yavakshara Churna (यवक्षारचूर्ण)	Barley alkali powder	12 gm each
Souvarchala Lavana Churna (सौवर्चललवणचूर्ण)	Souvarchala salt powder	12 gm each
Shu. Tankana Churna (शु. टङ्कणचूर्ण)	Purified Borax powder	12 gm each
Sarjika Kshara Churna (सर्जिक्षारचूर्ण)	Sodium carbonate (Sajji Khar) powder	12 gm each
Shunthi Churna (शुण्ठीचूर्ण)	Dry Ginger powder	6 gm each
Maricha Churna (मरिचचूर्ण)	Black Pepper powder	6 gm each
Pippali Churna (पिप्पलीचूर्ण)	Long Pepper powder	6 gm each
Amalaki Churna (आमलाचूर्ण)	Phyllanthus emblica powder	6 gm each
Haritaki Churna (हरीतकीचूर्ण)	Terminalia chebula powder	6 gm each
Baheda Churna (बहेड़ाचूर्ण)	Terminalia bellirica powder	6 gm each
Jeera Churna (जीराचूर्ण)	Cuminum cyminum (Cumin) powder	6 gm each
Haridra Churna (हल्दीचूर्ण)	Curcuma longa (Turmeric) powder	6 gm each
Chitraka Mool Churna (चित्रकमूलचूर्ण)	Plumbago zeylanica root powder	6 gm each
Chavya Churna (चव्यचूर्ण)	Piper cubeba powder	6 gm each
dose: 3 gm (classical texts say 2 Nishka = 6 gm but 3 gm is recommended)
preparation:
1.	Combine all 7 Kshara substances (Samudra Lavana, Saindhava, Kacha Lavana, Yavakshara, Souvarchala, Tankana, Sarjika) in equal parts and make fine Churna.
2.	Mix in a mortar and give Bhavanas with Arka Ksheera (Calotropis milk) and Snuhi Ksheera (Euphorbia milk) together for 3 days.
3.	Apply the moist paste on Arka Patra (Calotropis leaves) and wrap.
4.	Seal in Antahputa (inner clay vessel) and fire in Kukkuta Puta.
5.	No extra fuel is needed - only the dry leaves burn.
6.	When Svangasheetal, open - the fired salts with leaves.
7.	Remove and powder together in the mortar.
8.	Separately make fine Churna of the 10 herbal substances (Trikatu, Triphala, Jeera, Haridra, Chitraka, Chavya) in equal parts.
9.	Combine half of the Kshara with half the herbal Churna (equal ratio).
10.	Store in glass vessel.
anupana: Vata: warm water; Pitta: Goghrita; Kapha: Gomutra; Tridosha: Kanji (sour fermented drink)

shloka:
सामुद्रं लवणं काचं यवक्षारं सुवर्चलम् । टङ्कणं सर्जिकाक्षारं तुल्यं चूर्णं विभावयेत् ।।३२।।
अर्कक्षीरैः स्नुहीक्षीरैरातपे भावयेत्त्र्यहम् । अर्कपत्रं लिपेत्तेन रुद्ध्वा चान्तः पुटे पचेत् ।। ३३ ।।
तत्क्षारं चूर्णयित्वाऽथ त्र्यूषणं त्रिफलारजः । जीरकं रजनी वह्निचव्यकं स्यात्समं समम् ।। ३४।।
क्षारार्थमेतदर्थ च एकीकृत्य प्रयोजयेत् । अग्निमांद्येष्वजीर्णेषु भक्ष्यं निष्कद्वयं द्वयम् ।।३५।।
वाताधिके जलैः कोष्णैर्धृतैः पित्ताधिके हितम् । कफे गोमूत्रसंयुक्तमारनालैस्त्रिदोषजे ।। ३६ ।।
वज्रक्षारमिदं सिद्धं स्वयं प्रोक्तं पिनाकिना । सर्वोदरेषु गुल्मेषु शोफशूलेषु योजयेत् ।। ३७ ।।

name: Udayamartanda Ras
benefits: Shotha (oedema/swelling) and Bhagandara (anal fistula)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Tamra Patra (Sukshma) (शु. ताम्र का सूक्ष्म पत्र)	Purified Copper foil — cut into fine small pieces with scissors	46 gm (1 Pala)
Shu. Gandhaka Churna (शु. गन्धकचूर्ण)	Purified Sulphur powder — equal weight to Tamra Patra	46 gm (1 Pala)
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury — added after sunlight processing stage	12 gm (1 Tola / 1 Karsha)
Jala (जल)	Water — for forming 125 mg pills (optional)	As required
preparation:
1.	Cut fine Shu. Tamra Patra (purified copper foil) into small pieces with scissors.
2.	Place Tamra pieces and Shu. Gandhaka Churna (equal weight - 1 Pala each) in a stone mortar and triturate together for 3 hours.
3.	Add Jambiri Nimbu Svaras and triturate firmly for 1 full day, then keep in strong direct sunlight (Teekhna Dhup) for 1 day.
4.	When the lemon juice has dissolved and absorbed the copper (Tamra Dravibhuta), add Shu. Parada 1 Tola (12 gm) and triturate again until a well-incorporated Kajjali is formed.
5.	Optionally perform Mardana procedure with water to form 125 mg pills, dry and store in a glass vessel. (This is Udayamartanda Ras).

shloka:
पलोन्मितस्य शुल्बस्य सूक्ष्मपत्राणि कारयेत् । तत्समं गन्धकं दत्त्वा खल्ले सर्वं विमर्दयेत् ।। २९।।
जम्बीररससंयुक्तं दिनं धर्मे निधापयेत् । ततः शुल्बे द्रवीभूते रसकर्ष नियोजयेत् ।। ३० ।।
तत्सिद्धमुदरे योज्यं शोफे चैव भगन्दरे । नाम्ना तूदयमार्तण्डरस एष प्रकीर्तितः ।। ३१ ।।

name: Vinodavidyadhara Ras
benefits: Udara Roga (abdominal diseases) and Rechaneeya conditions (purgation-responsive)
ingredients:
Take equal parts of all three:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारद)	Purified Mercury	Equal part
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur (for Kajjali with Parada)	Equal part
Shu. Tankana (शु. टङ्कण)	Purified Borax	Equal part
Shu. Jayapala Bija (शु. जयपाल बीज)	Purified Croton tiglium (Purging Croton) seeds	Equal part
preparation:
1.	First make Kajjali by firmly triturating Shu. Parada and Shu. Gandhaka in a stone mortar.
2.	Then add Shu. Tankana (purified borax) and Shu. Jayapala Bija (purified Croton tiglium seeds) in equal parts to the Kajjali.
3.	Triturate all together firmly.
4.	Give Bhavana with Jala (water) and form 125 mg pills.
5.	Dry in shade and store in a glass vessel. (This is Vinodavidyadhara Ras).
anupana: Godugdha (cow's milk) with Guda (jaggery); follow-up: Mudga Kwatha, Takra, or Barbura Tvak Svaras as needed

shloka:
रसेन्द्रबलिटङ्कणैः सजयपालबीजैः समैः रसः सुमृदितो भवेत्खलु विनोदविद्याधरः ।
पयोगुडयुतो हरेत्सकलरेचनीयामयान् ज्वरं च जठरामयान्गुदगदं सशूलं नृणाम् ।।४।।
सम्यग्विरेचनाभावे मुद्गक्वाथं पिबेदनु । भेदाधिक्ये पिबेत्तक्रं बर्नूराणां त्वचो रसम् ।।५।।

name: Apasmara Nashana Rasa
benefits: Apasmara (Epilepsy / Seizure disorder)
ingredients:
Ingredients (Equal Parts — 1 Karsha = 12g each)
Ingredient
(Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Samudra Phena (समुद्रफेन)	Sepia officinalis (Cuttlefish bone) powder	1 Karsha (12g)
Haridra Churna (हरिद्राचूर्ण)	Curcuma longa (Turmeric) powder	1 Karsha (12g)
Jyotishmati Beeja Churna (ज्योतिष्मतीबीजचूर्ण)	Celastrus paniculatus (Intellect tree) seed powder	1 Karsha (12g)
Nasya Oil Ingredients
Ingredient
(Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Vacha (वच)	Acorus calamus powder	1 Karsha (10g)
Shunthee (शुण्ठी)	Zingiber officinale dry ginger powder	1 Karsha (10g)
Maricha (मरिच)	Piper nigrum black pepper powder	1 Karsha (10g)
Pippali (पिप्पल)	Piper longum long pepper powder	1 Karsha (10g)
Vidanga (विडङ्ग)	Embelia ribes powder	1 Karsha (10g)
preparation:
1. Prepare kajjali from Shu. Parada and Shu. Gandhaka. Add Mana:shila and Tuttha; perform Mardana procedure. Add all remaining Bhasmas, Samudra Phena, Haridra and Jyotishmati Beeja; perform Mardana procedure all together. Give Nimbu svaras and leave overnight. Perform Mardana procedure again in the morning.
2. Apply a thick coat of this paste to a copper bowl (1 Pala weight). Allow to dry. Place the paste-coated bowl upside-down (Adhomukha) inside a small earthen Haandi. Cover with a Sharaava (flat lid) and seal with Sandhibandha. Fill remaining space in the Haandi with cow-dung ash. Seal the Haandi mouth with another Sharaava-Samput. Dry completely.
3. Cook on a stove for 2 full days and nights. When completely cool, open and remove the copper bowl. Perform Mardana procedure the bowl together with the adhered medicine. Make fine powder. Store in glass vessel. This is Apasmara Nashana Rasa.
4. Nasya Oil: Cook the 5 herb powders in mustard oil with water in an iron kadahi until all water evaporates. Filter when cool. Store in glass vessel.
anupana: Honey (with Vacha-Trikatu-Vidanga churna); Bakri Mutra 1.5 hr later

shloka:
रसगन्धकशिलातुत्थकान्तहेमाब्धिफेनकम् । रजनी तेजनीबीजं कर्षमात्रं पृथक् पृथक् ।।१९।।
निम्बुद्रवाई तेनान्तर्लिप्तां ताम्रपलोन्मिताम् । पात्रीं न्युब्जां सुभाण्डान्तां रुद्ध्वा खर्परिकां घृताम् ।।  २० ।।
भस्मनाऽ ऽ पूर्य भाण्डान्तधृत्वाऽ  धो द्विनिशं पचेत् । स्वाङ्गशीतं विचूर्य्याथ रसोऽपस्मारनाशनः ।। २१ ।।
वल्लमस्योदये दद्यागचाव्योषविड़ङ्गयुक् । अनुदेयमजामूत्रं ततोऽर्धप्रहरे गते ।। २२ ।।
सार्षपे षोडशपले तैले तल्लेपितां पचेत् । नस्यं तैलेन तेनास्य दद्यात्सव्योषकेण तु ।।२३।।

name: Bhootankusha Rasa
benefits: Bhootonmada (Mania from spirit possession); Apasmara (Epilepsy)
ingredients:
Ingredient
(Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारा)	Purified Mercury	Equal part
Loha Bhasma (लौहभस्म)	Incinerated Iron   	Equal part
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper    	Equal part
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica 	Equal part
Mukta Bhasma (मोतीभस्म)	Incinerated Pearl 	Equal part
Heera Bhasma (हीराभस्म)	Incinerated Diamond 	1/4 part
preparation:
1. Perform Mardana procedure all Bhasmas and mineral ingredients together in a mortar with Bhringaraja juice, Chitraka juice and Snuhi (Sehund) milk throughout the day.
2. In the evening, form balls/tablets, seal in Samput and fire in Gaja Puta. When cool, collect and store. This is Bhootankusha Rasa.

shloka:
सूतायस्ताम्रमभ्रञ्च मुक्तां चापि समं समम् ।
सूतपादोत्तमं वज्रं शिलागन्धकतालकम् ॥ ४ ॥
तुत्थं रसाञ्जनं शुद्धमब्धिफेन शिलाञ्जनम् ।
पञ्चानां लवणानाञ्च प्रतिभागं रसोन्मितम् ॥ ५ ॥
भृङ्गराजचित्रवत्रिदुग्धेनापि विमर्दयेत्
दिनान्ते पिण्डिकां कृत्वा रुध्वा गजपुटे पचेत् ॥ ६ ॥
भूताङ्कुशरसो नाम नित्यं गुञ्जाद्वयं लिहेत् ।
आर्द्रकस्य रसेनापि भूतोन्माद निवारणम् ॥ ७ ॥
पिप्पल्याक्तं पिबेच्चानु दशमूलकषायकम् ।
स्वेदयेत्कटुतुम्ब्या च तीक्ष्ण रूक्षञ्च वर्जयेत् ॥ ८ ॥
माहिष च घृतं क्षीरं गुर्वन्नमपि भक्षयेत् ।
अभ्यङ्ग कटुतैलेन हितो भूताङ्कुशो रसः ॥ ९ ॥

1. Perform Mardana procedure all 7 equal-part ingredients together with Nara Mootra (human urine) until a uniform mass is formed. Roll into balls.
2. Add double quantity of Shu. Gandhaka to the ball. Cook briefly in an iron vessel (Loha Patra) for a short time.
3. Remove, powder finely and store in glass vessel. This is Bhoot Bhairav Rasa.

shloka:
मृतसूतार्कलौ हञ्च शिलागन्धकतालकम् ।
रसाञ्जनश्च तुल्यांशं नरमूत्रेण मर्दयेत् ॥ १ ॥
तद्गोल द्विगुणं गन्धं लोहपात्रे क्षणं पचेत् ।
पञ्चगुञ्जामितं खादेदपस्मारहरं परम् ॥ २ ॥
हिड्नु सौवर्च व्योषं नरमूत्रेण सर्पिषा ।
कर्षमात्रं पिबेच्चानु रसोऽयं भूतभैरवः ॥ ३ ॥

name: Indrabrahma Vati
benefits: Apasmara (Epilepsy)
ingredients:
Ingredient
(Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Rasasindura (रससिन्दूर)	Purified Mercuric Sulphide	Equal part
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica 	Equal part
Teekhna Loha Bhasma (तीक्ष्ण लौहभस्म)	Sharp/reactive Incinerated Iron   	Equal part
Chandi Bhasma (चाँदीभस्म)	Incinerated Silver 	Equal part
Svarna Maakshika Bhasma (स्वर्णमाक्षिकभस्म)	Iron pyrite / Chalcopyrite ash	Equal part
Shu. Visha (शु. विष)	Purified Aconitum (Aconite) — Vatsanabha	Equal part
Padmakesara (पद्मकेशर)	Nelumbo nucifera (Lotus) stamen / pollen	Equal part
preparation:
1. Perform Mardana procedure all equal-part Bhasmas and ingredients together for 1 full day.
2. Give 7 sequential Bhavanas — one day each — with: Snuhi, Vijaya, Eranda, Vacha, Nishpaava, Surana and Nirgundi juices.
3. Cook the resulting mass in Kakuni-Sarshapa Taila (black mustard oil) with Gandhaka added. When fully cooked, remove, perform Mardana procedure in mortar and form pills of Chana-matra (chickpea size). Store in glass vessel. This is Indrabrahma Vati.

shloka:
मृतसूताभ्रकं तीक्ष्ण तारं ताप्यं विषं समम् ।
पद्म केशरसंयुक्तं दिनैकं मर्दयेद्रवैः ॥ ५ ॥
स्नुह्यग्निविजयैरणण्डवचा निष्पावशूरणैः ।
निर्गुड्याश्च द्रवैर्मर्थं तद्गोलं  पाचयेत्पुनः ॥ ६ ॥
कङ्गुनी सर्षपोत्थेन तैलेन गन्ध संयुतम् ।
ततः पक्त्वा समुद्धृत्य चणमात्रा वटी कृता ॥ ७ ॥
इन्द्रब्रह्मवटी नाम भक्षयेदार्द्रकद्रवैः ।
दशमूलकषायश्च कणायुक्तं पिबेदनु ।
अपस्मारं जयत्याशु यथा सूर्योदयस्तमः ॥ ८ ॥

name: Navanga Vatika
benefits: Apasmara (Epilepsy / Seizure disorder)
ingredients:
Ingredient
(Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Svarna Bhasma (सुवर्णभस्म)	Incinerated Gold  	Equal part
Rajata Bhasma (रजतभस्म)	Incinerated Silver 	Equal part
Tamra Bhasma (ताम्रभस्म)	Incinerated Copper    	Equal part
Naga Bhasma (नागभस्म)	Incinerated Lead  (Pishta = Naga / Trilohipishta)	Equal part
Srotanjana (स्रोतोञ्जन)	Srotanjana (a natural collyrium/mineral)	Equal part
Shu. Mana:shila (शु. मन:शिला)	Purified Realgar (Arsenic disulphide)	Equal part
Shu. Gandhaka (शु. गन्धक)	Purified Sulphur	Equal part
Rasasindura (रससिन्दूर)	Purified Mercuric Sulphide	Equal part
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica 	Equal part
Classical Commentary (Tika)
Pishta = Naga (lead). Srishtiraya = the trio: Abhraka Bhasma + Shu. Mana:shila + Shu. Gandhaka. Srishti = Vriddhi (power/potency). Traya = also interpreted as Bakuchi Churna (Psoralea corylifolia seed powder). These classical commentaries clarify the compound ingredient names in the original shloka.
preparation:
1. Take all 9 ingredients in equal parts. Perform Mardana procedure together in a clean mortar.
2. Form pills of 1 Ratti (125 mg) each. Dry in shade. Store in glass vessel. This is Navanga Vatika.
anupana: Vacha Churna + Trikatu Churna + Vidanga Churna (3g total) with Honey

name: Sutak Pratyaya
benefits: Apasmara (Epilepsy), Unmada (Insanity)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Purvokt Parpati Ras (पूर्वोक्त पर्पटीरस)	Parpati Ras (as described in Chapter 22)	1 part
Rasa Sindura (रससिन्दूर)	Processed Mercury / Red Mercuric Sulphide	1 part
preparation:
21.	Take Parpati Ras and Rasa Sindura in equal (1:1) parts. Triturate both together in a mortar.
22.	Give Bhavana with Brahmi Svaras (Bacopa monnieri juice). Form tablets of 125 mg (1 Ratti) each.
23.	Dry in shade and store in glass vessel. This is Sutak Pratyaya.

shloka: तथैव पर्पटीसूतं ब्राह्मीरसविमिश्रितम् । सूतकः प्रत्ययाख्योऽसौ उन्मादापस्मृती हरेत् ।।  २५ ।।

name: Unmadgajankush Ras
benefits: Tridosha Unmada (insanity), especially Bhutonnmada (supernatural psychiatric disorder)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Shu. Parada (शु. पारा)	Purified Mercury	Sufficient quantity
Shu. Dhattura Beej (शु. धतूरेके बीज)	Purified Datura metel seeds — post-Puta addition	Equal part
Abhraka Bhasma (अभ्रकभस्म)	Incinerated Mica — post-Puta addition	Equal part
Shu. Vatsanabha Visha (शु. वत्सनाभविष)	Purified Aconitum ferox — post-Puta addition	Equal part
preparation:
24.	Take Shu. Parada. Give 1-day Bhavana each in: Dhattura Ras, Brahmadandi Ras and Kuchela Ras (sequentially, 1 day each).
26.	Add equal weight of Shu. Gandhaka to the processed Parada. Prepare Kajjali in a clean mortar.
27.	Place the Kajjali in a Tamra Samputa (copper sealed vessel). Fire with Laghu Puta. When cooled (Svaangasheetal), remove.
28.	Add Shu. Dhattura Beej, Abhraka Bhasma and Shu. Vatsanabha Visha — all equal parts to the post-Puta medicine. Triturate for 3 days. Form tablets of 1 Ratti (125 mg) each. This is Unmadgajankush Ras.

shloka:
त्रिदिनं कनकद्रा वैर्महाराष्ट्रीद्रयैः पुनः ।
विषमुष्टिजलैः सूतं समुत्थाप्यार्कचक्रिकाम् ॥ १ ॥
कृत्वा तप्तां सगन्धां तां युक्त्या बन्धनमाचरेत् ।
तत्समं कानकं वीजमभ्रकं गन्धक विषम् ॥ २ ॥
मर्दयेत्त्रिदिनं सर्वं वल्लमात्रं प्रयोजयेत् ।
दोषोन्मादं द्रुत हन्ति भूतोन्मादं विशेषतः ॥ ३ ॥

name: Chandbhairav Ras
benefits: Unmada Roga (Insanity/Psychiatric disorders)
ingredients:
Ingredient (Sanskrit)	English Name	Quantity
Svarna Bhasma (सुवर्णभस्म)	Incinerated Gold 	10 parts
Rasa Sindura (रससिन्दूर)	Processed Mercury / Red Mercuric Sulphide	1 part
Shu. Vatsanabha Vishachurna (शु. वत्सनाभविषचूर्ण)	Purified Aconitum ferox powder	1 part
Srotoja / Shilajatu (स्रोतोज्ञन)	Asphaltum/Shilajit	1 part
preparation:
29.	In a clean mortar, first perform Mardana procedure Rasa Sindura finely. Add Svarna Bhasma and triturate well together.
30.	Add Shu. Vatsanabha Vishaчurna and Srotoja (Shilajatu). Give Bhavana with Devadali (Bandal) Svaras (Luffa echinata juice). Triturate until dry.
31.	Cook with Shu. Gandhaka Taila at Mridagni (low/mild fire) for 1.5 hours.
32.	Form tablets of 1 Ratti (125 mg) each. Dry in shade and store in glass. This is Chandbhairav Ras.
